runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-07-12

数据窗口：2026-07-10 00:00 to 2026-07-12 18:10 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub Search API batches for newly created and actively pushed AI agent, MCP, RAG, workflow, browser/code/voice-agent, automation and AI-product repositories; targeted GitHub API metadata/root-content audits for selected candidates.

关键假设：Scores favor repositories created or materially updated in the 2026-07-10 to 2026-07-12 window, with a concrete product surface, runnable CLI/UI/API/MCP/skill workflow, clear user scenario, and enough docs/examples/tests to evaluate. Star and fork counts are unauthenticated GitHub API point-in-time signals and can be noisy; repeated projects from the prior run are only promoted when there is a fresh growth or product-shape signal.

## Top Projects

1. [Alisa0808/vox-director](https://github.com/Alisa0808/vox-director) - Agent Skill for Finished Explainer Videos - Score 86
   - 做什么：Agent skill that turns one topic into a Vox-style paper-collage explainer/ad video using an automated production pipeline around Atlas Cloud and ffmpeg.
   - 面向谁：Creators, marketers and coding-agent users who want Codex/Claude-style agents to produce finished short-form explainers from a topic brief.
   - AI native 点：Packages research, script, visual direction, rendering and QC as an agent-executed production loop rather than a single prompt or template.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-10, pushed 2026-07-11; 76 stars and 9 forks; root audit found package.json, examples, scripts, SKILL.md and README.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong skill/product signal with scripts and examples. Video generation, Atlas Cloud and ffmpeg runtime were not installed or executed locally.
   - 建议动作：Trial with a non-branded 30-second topic and inspect whether the generated timeline, captions and QC artifacts are editable enough for reuse.

2. [ucsandman/marketing-studio](https://github.com/ucsandman/marketing-studio) - Agent-driven Launch Asset Studio - Score 85
   - 做什么：Claude Code marketing studio where one command renders a launch asset suite including logo reveal, demo, launch video, social clips and OG assets.
   - 面向谁：Indie builders and launch teams that want repeatable marketing collateral generated from product context.
   - AI native 点：Turns go-to-market production into an agent skill with docs, examples, scripts and reusable skill assets rather than isolated design prompts.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-10; 66 stars and 10 forks; root audit found docs, examples, scripts, skills and README.
   - 可运行性判断：Good skill/workflow signal from repository structure. No local render, brand asset ingest or video pipeline run was performed.
   - 建议动作：Compare its artifact set with your own launch checklist and test on a disposable product page before trusting brand outputs.

3. [loop-js/loop.js](https://github.com/loop-js/loop.js) - Goal-loop Engineering Framework - Score 84
   - 做什么：JavaScript framework where a user states a goal and execution rounds continue until a skeptical read-only verifier agent settles the result.
   - 面向谁：Coding-agent tool builders who need a compact loop abstraction with explicit verification rather than one-shot task execution.
   - AI native 点：Makes verification a first-class agent in the runtime loop, framing agent work as goal, rounds and settlement.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-10; 64 stars and 0 forks; root audit found package.json, docs and README.
   - 可运行性判断：Promising package signal with docs, but no npm install, example run or verifier behavior test was performed.
   - 建议动作：Run the smallest example and inspect how verifier state, retry limits and failure evidence are represented.

4. [mnemon-dev/mnemon](https://github.com/mnemon-dev/mnemon) - Persistent Memory for CLI Agents - Score 83
   - 做什么：LLM-supervised persistent memory for AI agents with graph-based recall, cross-session knowledge and a single-binary workflow for Claude Code, OpenClaw and other CLI agents.
   - 面向谁：Teams using coding agents across long-lived projects who need durable, inspectable memory outside the chat transcript.
   - AI native 点：Treats memory as a local product surface with graph recall, CLI-agent integration and auditable persistence.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-02-20, pushed 2026-07-12; 379 stars and 55 forks; root audit found Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, docs, scripts, README, Makefile and go.mod.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong engineering surface with container and Go project files. No binary build, Docker run or agent integration smoke test was performed.
   - 建议动作：Test against a small repo and verify how memories are reviewed, deleted and prevented from leaking sensitive project facts.

5. [melandlabs/openloomi](https://github.com/melandlabs/openloomi) - Local-first AI Coworker Workspace - Score 82
   - 做什么：Open-source AI coworker and workspace for builders who want local-first work memory around their AI agents.
   - 面向谁：Builders who use multiple agents and need a workspace layer that remembers project context locally.
   - AI native 点：Combines workspace, memory and agent skills as a product loop around everyday builder work.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-04-10, pushed 2026-07-12; 632 stars and 35 forks; root audit found package.json, pnpm-lock.yaml, skills and README.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong frontend/package signal. No pnpm install, workspace boot or local model/API integration was run.
   - 建议动作：Audit the local-first storage model and try one throwaway project before importing real work memory.

6. [helixmap/sigwood](https://github.com/helixmap/sigwood) - Transparent Local Threat Hunting - Score 81
   - 做什么：Local-first threat hunting over existing logs such as Zeek, Pi-hole, syslog and CloudTrail, with named techniques behind every finding.
   - 面向谁：Security practitioners who want transparent AI-assisted triage without sending logs to a black-box SIEM.
   - AI native 点：Uses AI-like explanation and technique mapping as the interface layer over local security evidence, emphasizing traceable findings.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-10, pushed 2026-07-12; 40 stars and 3 forks; root audit found docs, README, tests and pyproject.toml.
   - 可运行性判断：Good Python/docs/tests signal. No sample-log ingestion, detection run or security benchmark was performed.
   - 建议动作：Run against synthetic Zeek/Pi-hole logs and inspect false positives plus evidence traceability.

7. [calesthio/generative-media-skills](https://github.com/calesthio/generative-media-skills) - Portable Generative Media Agent Skills - Score 80
   - 做什么：Research-backed agent skills for image, video, audio, voice and generative-media production across AI coding assistants.
   - 面向谁：Creative operators building reusable media-generation workflows inside Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI and similar tools.
   - AI native 点：Treats media production expertise as installable, testable agent skills rather than a loose prompt library.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-11, pushed 2026-07-12; 35 stars and 3 forks; root audit found skills, README and tests.
   - 可运行性判断：Good skill/test signal, but actual media-tool integrations and output quality were not exercised.
   - 建议动作：Pick one skill and run it on a small synthetic brief; evaluate repeatability, licensing assumptions and artifact QA.

8. [sxp-studio/subjective-zero](https://github.com/sxp-studio/subjective-zero) - Agentic Creative-coding VFX Harness - Score 79
   - 做什么：Native macOS creative-coding and realtime-VFX harness where visual ideas are described as prompt nodes that agents turn into hot-reloading Metal nodes.
   - 面向谁：Creative coders and realtime visual artists exploring agent-assisted shader/VFX iteration on macOS.
   - AI native 点：Places agents inside the live visual programming loop, translating prompts into editable realtime nodes.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-10; 32 stars and 2 forks; root audit found docs and README.
   - 可运行性判断：Distinct product concept, but root audit did not expose a broad code/test surface and no macOS app run was attempted.
   - 建议动作：Watch for installable builds or examples; test only after a minimal scene can be reproduced locally.

9. [gefsikatsinelou/MetaSearchMCP](https://github.com/gefsikatsinelou/MetaSearchMCP) - MCP Metasearch Backend for Agents - Score 78
   - 做什么：Open-source metasearch backend, MCP server and AI search API for LLM agents with FastAPI, provider fallback, deduplication and structured JSON output.
   - 面向谁：Agent builders who need a controllable search backend instead of scraping or relying on one provider.
   - AI native 点：Exposes search as an MCP-native, structured, provider-swappable tool surface for LLM workflows.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-04-14, pushed 2026-07-12; 51 stars and 3 forks; root audit found Dockerfile, scripts, README, tests and pyproject.toml.
   - 可运行性判断：Good server/test/container signal. No provider keys, Docker run or MCP client test was performed.
   - 建议动作：Compare with existing web-search MCP servers and check provider-cost, fallback and result citation behavior.

10. [zhixuli0406/DuDuClaw](https://github.com/zhixuli0406/DuDuClaw) - Self-hostable Multi-channel Agent Platform - Score 77
   - 做什么：Open-source AI agent platform with 80+ MCP tools, multiple chat channels and a Rust plus Python self-hosted architecture.
   - 面向谁：Teams evaluating self-hosted multi-channel agent deployments across Slack, Discord, LINE, Telegram and similar surfaces.
   - AI native 点：Packages tools, channels and agent orchestration as a deployable platform rather than a single bot demo.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-03-15, pushed 2026-07-12; 46 stars and 5 forks; root audit found docker-compose.yml, docs, scripts, README, tests, pyproject.toml and Cargo.toml.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong multi-language/container signal, but no self-hosted deployment, channel connection or MCP tool smoke test was run.
   - 建议动作：Audit the channel permission model and run locally with one non-production chat connector.

## Watchlist

- [steviebuilds/agent-room](https://github.com/steviebuilds/agent-room) - Local Multi-agent Meeting Rooms - Score 74 - Private local meeting rooms where Codex, Claude Code and other agents collaborate live. 建议：Watch for reliability evidence and try with two disposable agents.
- [swytchcodehq/agent-install-monitor](https://github.com/swytchcodehq/agent-install-monitor) - Agent Installation Monitor - Score 73 - Monitor what an AI agent installs on your system. 建议：Test with a harmless npm/pip install and inspect event fidelity.
- [byte5ai/omadia](https://github.com/byte5ai/omadia) - Signed-plugin Agentic OS - Score 72 - Self-hostable agentic OS for building, running and auditing multi-agent teams from signed plugins. 建议：Watch for a minimal plugin demo and review signing/audit semantics.
- [alchaincyf/doubao-search-mcp](https://github.com/alchaincyf/doubao-search-mcp) - Doubao Search MCP Server - Score 71 - Chinese search MCP server for Claude Code and other agent clients, using Doubao/ByteDance search sources. 建议：Compare answer quality and citation depth against existing web-search MCP servers.
- [TheAwaken1/Spark-Studio](https://github.com/TheAwaken1/Spark-Studio) - Inference Dashboard with Agent Auto-fix - Score 70 - DGX Spark inference dashboard for vLLM, SGLang, llama.cpp, WebGPU and sparkrun with agent-powered auto-fix. 建议：Watch for screenshots, Docker or a reproducible local dashboard demo.
- [realgarit/fable-baton](https://github.com/realgarit/fable-baton) - Token-frugal Claude Code Orchestrator - Score 69 - Claude Code plugin using Fable as a token-frugal orchestrator with tiered Opus/Sonnet/Haiku agents. 建议：Watch for concrete before/after cost and correctness examples.

## Skip Reasons

- [yetone/kill-ai-slop](https://github.com/yetone/kill-ai-slop) - Strong project but already covered as a Top project on 2026-07-11; today it is treated as a growth follow-up rather than repeated Top placement despite rising to 263 stars.
- [amitshekhariitbhu/100-days-of-ai](https://github.com/amitshekhariitbhu/100-days-of-ai) - Educational challenge/content series rather than a runnable AI-native product, app, CLI, API or MCP workflow.
- [JosephHampton/awesome-gemini-cli-subagents](https://github.com/JosephHampton/awesome-gemini-cli-subagents) - Curated subagent collection; useful reference but weaker product surface than installable workflow tools with execution loops.
- [w3cj/how-llms-work](https://github.com/w3cj/how-llms-work) - Interactive education app about LLM internals, not primarily an AI-native product workflow or agent surface.
- [JWM0203/MeetingCopilot](https://github.com/JWM0203/MeetingCopilot) - Real-time stealth meeting/interview copilot has a runnable app surface, but stealth positioning creates consent and workplace-integrity risk.
- [MANOJ21K/agentic-code-review](https://github.com/MANOJ21K/agentic-code-review) - Promising multi-agent review plugin description, but root audit found only README-level evidence, with insufficient runnable code surface.
- [JamesBrownVC/Buddy](https://github.com/JamesBrownVC/Buddy) - Vague productivity-agent positioning and insufficient root/product evidence compared with more concrete skill/workspace candidates.
- [bookunt3d/hermes-agent-fa](https://github.com/bookunt3d/hermes-agent-fa) - Localized documentation/translation of Hermes Agent rather than a distinct runnable product surface.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent skills are becoming end-to-end production surfaces: Vox Director, Marketing Studio and Generative Media Skills package media/launch work as repeatable agent workflows with scripts, examples or tests.
2. Coding-agent reliability is shifting from prompts to loops and memory: Loop.js, Mnemon and OpenLoomi all make verification, recall and workspace state explicit.
3. Local-first and self-hosted agent platforms remain active: Mnemon, OpenLoomi, DuDuClaw and Omadia emphasize ownership, auditability and deployability.
4. Agent safety tools are emerging around the local machine: Agent Install Monitor and security/log products like Sigwood respond to agents taking more real actions.
5. Search/MCP infrastructure is still noisy; candidates with source, tests, Docker or MCP package surfaces outrank README-only wrappers and awesome lists.

## 今日建议动作

- Media skill trial: run Vox Director or Marketing Studio on a synthetic brief and evaluate output editability, not only final video polish.
- Memory/workspace audit: compare Mnemon and OpenLoomi on deletion/review controls before importing real project memory.
- Verification experiment: try Loop.js on a small coding task and inspect how the skeptical verifier records evidence and stopping conditions.
- Safety review: test Agent Install Monitor and Sigwood with harmless local fixtures to see whether their logs/findings are explainable.

## 信息来源

- GitHub Search API snapshots: /tmp/radar_2026_07_12_created_agents.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_12_updated_agents.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_12_created_vertical_agents.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_12_created_mcp_rag_workflow.json.
- GitHub repository metadata and root contents for selected candidates under /tmp/radar_2026_07_12_repo_audit.
- No clone, install, Docker, npm, pnpm, Go, Python, Rust, macOS app, browser, chat-channel, model-serving, security-log ingestion, media rendering, or credentialed runtime audit was performed today.

Star and fork counts are unauthenticated GitHub API point-in-time signals and can be noisy; suspicious fork bursts, README-only repos, adult/consent-sensitive tools, pure collections, broad SDK/eval libraries, paper/benchmark code and generic marketing scaffolds are downgraded or skipped.
runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-07-11

数据窗口：2026-07-09 00:00 to 2026-07-11 11:42 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub Search API batches for newly created and actively pushed AI agent, MCP, RAG, workflow, browser/code/voice-agent, automation and AI-product repositories; targeted GitHub API README/root-content audits for selected candidates.

关键假设：Scores favor repositories created or materially updated in the 2026-07-09 to 2026-07-11 window, with a concrete product surface, runnable CLI/UI/API/MCP/skill workflow, clear user scenario, and enough docs/examples/tests to evaluate. Star and fork counts are unauthenticated GitHub API point-in-time signals and can be noisy; suspicious fork bursts, README-only repos, adult/consent-sensitive tools, pure collections, broad SDK/eval libraries, paper/benchmark code and generic marketing scaffolds are downgraded or skipped.

## Top Projects

1. [vinhhien112/Three.js-Object-Sculptor-Codex-Plugin](https://github.com/vinhhien112/Three.js-Object-Sculptor-Codex-Plugin) - Codex Plugin for Procedural 3D Assets - Score 88
   - 做什么：Codex plugin that turns an attached object image into a code-only, animation-ready procedural Three.js model with quality gates and skill packaging.
   - 面向谁：Codex users, creative coders and frontend builders who need inspectable 3D objects without downloading opaque asset packs.
   - AI native 点：Makes visual asset generation an agent-executed coding workflow: the model reads an image, writes procedural Three.js, and produces an editable runtime object rather than a static bitmap.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-09, pushed 2026-07-10; 152 stars and 20 forks; root audit found .codex-plugin, skills, scripts, assets, LICENSE and README with a concrete Codex plugin workflow.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong plugin/product signal with Codex plugin metadata, skill folder and scripts. No Codex plugin install or Three.js render smoke test was run.
   - 建议动作：Install in a disposable Codex profile and test one simple object image; inspect whether generated geometry is maintainable enough for frontend use.

2. [xiaolongbao0709/ai-virtual-phone](https://github.com/xiaolongbao0709/ai-virtual-phone) - AI Character Virtual Phone Workbench - Score 86
   - 做什么：Next.js browser app that simulates a full phone for AI characters, with chat, group chat, moments, voice messages, red envelopes, story modes, world books, app marketplace, mini-games and PWA polish.
   - 面向谁：Roleplay, interactive fiction and AI companion builders who want a richer diegetic interface than a standard chat box.
   - AI native 点：Treats AI characters as stateful phone-native entities with memory, schedules, relationship state, media, apps and narrative systems embedded in the UI.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-09, pushed same day; 103 stars and 158 forks; root audit found Next.js app, components, docs, scripts, data, tools, package-lock, public assets and a detailed Chinese README.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong frontend product signal with Next.js config, package.json, docs and assets. No npm install, PWA launch or model/API credential test was performed.
   - 建议动作：Review as an AI companion interface pattern; test locally only with non-sensitive fictional data and verify memory/export boundaries.

3. [Matchameleon/moneyclaw](https://github.com/Matchameleon/moneyclaw) - Intent-based Payments for OpenClaw Agents - Score 85
   - 做什么：OpenClaw-oriented agent payment layer with prepaid wallet, virtual card, OTP inbox, docs, examples, skill package and Docker Compose.
   - 面向谁：Agent builders exploring bounded financial actions, prepaid wallets and payment-task delegation.
   - AI native 点：Moves from chat-only assistants to agents that can execute payment intents through constrained cards, inboxes and auditable tasks.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-09; 87 stars; root audit found docs, examples, src, moneyclaw-skill, docker-compose.yml, SECURITY, package.json and pnpm lock.
   - 可运行性判断：Good API/skill/container signal, but financial workflows require credentials, compliance review and sandbox accounts. No payment or credentialed run was attempted.
   - 建议动作：Study the prepaid-card and OTP boundary design; only trial against fake/sandbox payment rails.

4. [Weebapp003/tradingview-mcp](https://github.com/Weebapp003/tradingview-mcp) - TradingView MCP Bridge - Score 83
   - 做什么：MCP bridge connecting Claude Code to local TradingView Desktop through Chrome DevTools Protocol for chart analysis, Pine Script development and workflow automation.
   - 面向谁：Traders and quant tinkerers who want AI assistance inside TradingView without manually copying chart state and scripts.
   - AI native 点：Gives an agent a bounded visual/software control plane over a specialist desktop app, with setup docs, research notes and execution-lane concepts.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-09; 85 stars; root audit found .env.example, package.json, docker-compose.yml, src, tests, scripts, agents, skills, SETUP_GUIDE, RESEARCH and SECURITY docs.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong MCP/server signal, but depends on local TradingView, Chrome DevTools permissions and finance-risk constraints. No desktop connection was run.
   - 建议动作：Evaluate only in paper-trading mode; inspect readback, command scope and anti-automation risks before real usage.

5. [MoisesR7/browser-mcp](https://github.com/MoisesR7/browser-mcp) - Autonomous Browser MCP Server - Score 82
   - 做什么：MCP browser agent server with Docker, Smithery config, public assets, tests and TypeScript source for autonomous browser automation.
   - 面向谁：Developers wiring LLM agents into browser workflows through MCP-compatible tooling.
   - AI native 点：Turns browser actions into a packaged MCP surface so agents can navigate and manipulate web pages through an installable server instead of bespoke scripts.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-09; 86 stars; root audit found Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, smithery.yaml, jest config, package.json, src, public, tests and SECURITY docs.
   - 可运行性判断：Good server/package signal with tests and container files. No browser automation smoke test or Smithery install was run.
   - 建议动作：Compare with existing BrowserSkill/browser-use stacks and test against a disposable local page first.

6. [Litun/bloomy-linkedin-outreach](https://github.com/Litun/bloomy-linkedin-outreach) - Agent-run LinkedIn Outreach Campaign Template - Score 81
   - 做什么：Template for running a self-driving LinkedIn outreach campaign with an AI agent and Bloomy LinkedIn MCP, including ICP, campaign, setup, templates, logs and review artifacts.
   - 面向谁：Founders and GTM operators experimenting with agent-assisted prospecting and follow-up workflows.
   - AI native 点：Packages a recurring agent workflow around sourcing, connection requests, intros, follow-ups and replies, with campaign state and rate-limit guidance as first-class files.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-09; 116 stars; root audit found AGENTS, CLAUDE, ICP, CAMPAIGN, PRODUCT, SETUP, TEMPLATES, logs, prospects.csv and outreach/weekly review outputs.
   - 可运行性判断：Concrete workflow-template signal, but depends on LinkedIn account automation and MCP credentials. No account-connected run was attempted.
   - 建议动作：Use as a workflow-design reference; do not connect a real LinkedIn account until compliance, consent and rate-limit behavior are reviewed.

7. [Jane-xiaoer/paper-collage-ad-codex](https://github.com/Jane-xiaoer/paper-collage-ad-codex) - Codex Skill for End-to-end Ad Video Production - Score 80
   - 做什么：Codex skill for paper-cut collage ad production from concept, script and storyboard through animation, narration, music, sound design, composition and MP4 QC.
   - 面向谁：Creators using Codex as a production operator for short-form ad/video assets.
   - AI native 点：Turns a creative production pipeline into a runnable agent skill with references, scripts, examples and quality-control steps rather than a prompt pack.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-10; 103 stars and 13 forks; root audit found SKILL.md, WORKFLOW.zh-CN.md, agents, examples, references and scripts.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong Codex skill signal, but local audio/video tooling and IndexTTS dependencies were not installed or tested.
   - 建议动作：Run on a short non-branded mock brief and check whether the MP4 QC stage catches real visual/audio defects.

8. [yetone/kill-ai-slop](https://github.com/yetone/kill-ai-slop) - Anti-slop Design Skill and Website - Score 79
   - 做什么：Field guide and agent skill for detecting common AI-generated visual/copy tics in vibe-coded products and stripping them from projects.
   - 面向谁：Product builders and coding-agent users trying to raise UI/copy taste in generated apps.
   - AI native 点：Applies critique as an agent-operable skill: the system scans a project for AI slop patterns and turns taste heuristics into repeatable remediation.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-10; 155 stars and 3 forks; root audit found README, skill folder and website folder plus public site link.
   - 可运行性判断：Clear website/skill surface, but repo is lighter than full apps and no scan was run against a real project.
   - 建议动作：Trial against a disposable generated landing page and compare output with existing frontend taste checklist.

9. [kaeawc/auto-mobile](https://github.com/kaeawc/auto-mobile) - Mobile Automation MCP and Test Suite - Score 78
   - 做什么：Mobile automation suite with MCP, Swift package, Android assets, Docker docs, commands, benchmarks and agent/plugin context for authoring and executing mobile tests.
   - 面向谁：Mobile teams and agent builders who need LLM-controllable mobile automation across app/device workflows.
   - AI native 点：Exposes mobile UI/device operations as agent-addressable tooling, bridging MCP-style commands with native test execution assets.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2025-10-07, pushed 2026-07-11; 36 stars and 2 forks; root audit found Package.swift, android, commands, Dockerfile, DOCKER docs, .mcp example, CI badges, benchmark and extensive agent files.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong engineering surface, but mobile simulator/device setup was not attempted.
   - 建议动作：Watch for stable install docs and compare with XcodeBuildMCP/Appium flows on a small sample app.

10. [takeshy/obsidian-gemini-helper](https://github.com/takeshy/obsidian-gemini-helper) - Obsidian AI Workflow/RAG Plugin - Score 77
   - 做什么：Obsidian plugin for Gemini-powered AI chat, workflow automation, semantic search/RAG, LLM Wiki and dashboards with reading memos across desktop and mobile.
   - 面向谁：Knowledge workers who use Obsidian as their local knowledge base and want AI assistance inside the vault.
   - AI native 点：Embeds model chat, semantic retrieval, workflow automation and dashboard views directly into a local-first note workspace.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2025-12-10, pushed 2026-07-11; 103 stars and 9 forks; root audit found manifest.json, src, styles, docs, package-lock, esbuild/vitest configs and many localized READMEs.
   - 可运行性判断：Good Obsidian plugin signal, but no vault install or Gemini credential test was run.
   - 建议动作：Test in a temporary vault with synthetic notes and inspect what content leaves the local vault.

## Watchlist

- [nicobailon/grill-for-unknowns](https://github.com/nicobailon/grill-for-unknowns) - Agent Skill for Plan Interrogation - Score 74 - Agent skill/plugin that interrogates implementation plans using known/unknown framing before coding. 建议：Watch and compare with existing planning/debugging skills.
- [zjunlp/SkillNet](https://github.com/zjunlp/SkillNet) - AI Skill Discovery and Evaluation Infrastructure - Score 73 - Open infrastructure for discovering, evaluating, composing and orchestrating reusable AI agent skills. 建议：Track as upstream context for the agent-skill marketplace trend.
- [paxlabs-inc/matrix-core](https://github.com/paxlabs-inc/matrix-core) - Intent IR and UX Layer for Non-developer Requests - Score 72 - Cognition/UX layer that translates natural-language requests into typed, inspectable, correctable Intent IR. 建议：Watch for a minimal runnable demo and compare its IR with workflow-builder schemas.
- [chenxi750328ai/agent-jianghu](https://github.com/chenxi750328ai/agent-jianghu) - Multi-agent Collaboration Platform - Score 70 - Chinese multi-agent collaboration project with status/ranking pages, project organization docs, skills and automation scripts. 建议：Watch for concrete scenarios and stable setup docs.
- [KORAYTEACHER/fintech-advisor](https://github.com/KORAYTEACHER/fintech-advisor) - AI Financial Advisor App Scaffold - Score 69 - Next.js portfolio/net-worth tracker with AI financial advisor positioning, Docker files, docs and app/server folders. 建议：Audit provenance and disclaimers before any product reuse.
- [imchine/FinTech-Solution](https://github.com/imchine/FinTech-Solution) - SME AI Financial Assistant SaaS - Score 68 - Next.js/Postgres financial intelligence platform for SMEs with Docker, Prisma and start scripts. 建议：Watch only after checking data model and generated-code provenance.

## Skip Reasons

- [FuelMagistrateLead/photoshop-ai-smart-enhance](https://github.com/FuelMagistrateLead/photoshop-ai-smart-enhance) - Root audit found only README and index.html for a Photoshop AI enhancer despite high same-day stars/forks; insufficient runnable extension proof.
- [chordswallowthrust/undress-design](https://github.com/chordswallowthrust/undress-design) - README-only virtual try-on/garment-editing repo with consent-sensitive adult-adjacent positioning and no runnable code surface.
- [Elias569/fintech-dashboard](https://github.com/Elias569/fintech-dashboard) - High same-day stars/forks and generic fintech dashboard positioning; lower confidence than audited finance candidates.
- [Elias569/fintech-app](https://github.com/Elias569/fintech-app) - Generic fintech app with suspicious high fork count and insufficient product evidence in initial search results.
- [KORAYTEACHER/fintech-forge](https://github.com/KORAYTEACHER/fintech-forge) - Broad AI fintech tools/scaffold positioning; less concrete than fintech-advisor and FinTech-Solution after audit.
- [Forward-Future/gpt-5-6-relay](https://github.com/Forward-Future/gpt-5-6-relay) - Routing/skill concept around speculative model labels; not enough concrete user-facing product evidence for promotion.
- [h4vzz/awesome-ai-agent-skills](https://github.com/h4vzz/awesome-ai-agent-skills) - Curated skill collection rather than a runnable product, app, CLI, API or MCP workflow.
- [PrimeIntellect-ai/verifiers](https://github.com/PrimeIntellect-ai/verifiers) - RL/evaluation library for environments and evals; useful infrastructure but outside this radar’s product-shape filter.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent skills/plugins are becoming product surfaces: Three.js Object Sculptor, Paper Collage Ad, Kill AI Slop and Grill for Unknowns package repeatable agent behavior with manifests, scripts and docs.
2. MCP bridges are moving from generic browser control into specialist desktop/workflow apps: TradingView MCP, Browser MCP and AutoMobile expose concrete action/readback surfaces.
3. AI-native companion and creative UIs are getting richer: AI Virtual Phone shows character memory, apps, media, stories and PWA surfaces as one product loop.
4. Real-world action agents need stricter boundaries: MoneyClaw, LinkedIn outreach and TradingView automation all touch money, accounts or regulated decisions, so sandboxing and consent matter more than raw functionality.
5. Same-day star bursts remain noisy around fintech/image utilities; root-file audits and runnable evidence are the best filter.

## 今日建议动作

- Plugin trial: install Three.js Object Sculptor or Paper Collage Ad in a disposable Codex profile and inspect artifact quality, not just README claims.
- Safety review: study MoneyClaw, Bloomy LinkedIn outreach and TradingView MCP for permission boundaries, account risk and audit logs before any real-world connection.
- UI pattern review: use AI Virtual Phone as a reference for diegetic AI companion interfaces with memory, apps and narrative state.
- Infrastructure watch: compare Browser MCP and AutoMobile against existing browser/mobile automation tools for reliable readback and failure handling.

## 信息来源

- GitHub Search API snapshots: /tmp/radar_2026_07_11_created_agents.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_11_updated_agents.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_11_updated_mcp_rag.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_11_created_llm_workflow.json.
- GitHub repository metadata, README and root contents for selected candidates under /tmp/radar_2026_07_11_repo_audit.
- No clone, install, Docker, npm, pnpm, Bun, Swift, mobile simulator, browser, TradingView, LinkedIn, Obsidian, payment, finance, audio/video or credentialed runtime audit was performed today.

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-07-10

数据窗口：2026-07-07 00:00 to 2026-07-10 11:10 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub Search API batches for newly created and actively pushed AI agent, MCP, RAG, workflow, assistant, browser/code/voice-agent, automation and AI-product repositories; targeted GitHub API README/root-content audits for selected candidates.

关键假设：Scores favor repositories created or materially updated in the 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-10 window, with a concrete product surface, runnable CLI/UI/API/MCP workflow, clear user scenario, and enough docs/examples/tests to evaluate. Star counts are unauthenticated GitHub API point-in-time signals and can be noisy; suspicious star/fork patterns, game cheats, prompt-only repos, paper/benchmark repos, SDK wrappers, and README-only marketing surfaces are downgraded or skipped.

## Top Projects

1. [bkingfilm/lapian-notes](https://github.com/bkingfilm/lapian-notes) - AI-native Film Analysis Notebook - Score 88
   - 做什么：Local film-analysis workspace that turns a movie into editable shot notes with frame extraction, subtitle alignment, AI analysis packages, story lanes, structure trees and emotion curves.
   - 面向谁：Film creators, editors, students and story analysts doing close reading of movies with local assets.
   - AI native 点：Makes long-form video legible to AI by packaging local frames/subtitles into structured analysis artifacts, then importing AI output back into an editable creative notebook.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-08, pushed 2026-07-09; 174 stars and 25 forks; root audit found Vite/TypeScript app, docs, public assets, package-lock, run scripts, subtitle/transcode plugins and release/download badges.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong product signal with package.json, Vite config, run.bat/run.command/setup.ps1 and docs. No local desktop/browser run was performed.
   - 建议动作：Trial on a short public-domain clip and inspect whether the generated analysis package can become a reusable storyboard/review workflow.

2. [wassermanproductions/blockout](https://github.com/wassermanproductions/blockout) - AI-native Filmmaking Previs Desktop App - Score 87
   - 做什么：Electron desktop app for grey-box staging, camera/cast choreography and motion-reference export for video generators such as Seedance, Veo, Kling, LTX and Wan.
   - 面向谁：AI filmmakers and creative directors who need unambiguous motion references before prompting video models.
   - AI native 点：Treats previs as an AI-control artifact: rough 3D blocking, depth/stills/video and tailored prompts are exported so video generators follow camera and actor intent.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-07, pushed 2026-07-09; 63 stars and 9 forks; root audit found Electron/Vite app, MCP folder, docs, tests, Playwright/Vitest configs, AGENTS/CLAUDE context and screenshots.
   - 可运行性判断：Good runnable signal with package-lock, electron-builder, src, build, tests and docs. No npm install or app launch was run.
   - 建议动作：Compare against the current image/video prompt workflow; especially test whether motion-reference packages reduce regeneration loops.

3. [bolivestilo/Homekit](https://github.com/bolivestilo/Homekit) - Physical-world Agent Control Interface - Score 85
   - 做什么：TypeScript package/CLI that gives AI agents a single interface for Apple Home actions such as lights, locks and sensor reads.
   - 面向谁：Home automation builders experimenting with bounded local agent control over physical devices.
   - AI native 点：Extends agent actions from web/API tasks into the home while foregrounding a typed interface, docs, CI, CodeQL, security and package surfaces.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-08, pushed same day; 66 stars and 1 fork; root audit found packages monorepo, docs, package.json, CHANGELOG, ROADMAP, SECURITY, CI and npm badge for homekit-cli.
   - 可运行性判断：Promising CLI/package signal, but physical-device safety and Apple Home permissions require sandboxed review. No device test was attempted.
   - 建议动作：Review command permissions and dry-run behavior before any real HomeKit bridge; use fake accessories first.

4. [SilentFleetKK/ai-market-pulse](https://github.com/SilentFleetKK/ai-market-pulse) - AI-assisted Market Research Cockpit - Score 84
   - 做什么：Python research cockpit that turns watchlists into daily market reports with screening, signal review, benchmark comparison, AI summaries and publishing paths.
   - 面向谁：Quant researchers and operators who need repeatable daily market intelligence without building a full internal dashboard.
   - AI native 点：Combines market-data pipelines, prompts, report generation and zero-code publishing into a daily AI research loop with Docker/examples/tests.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-09, pushed same day; 63 stars and 12 forks; audit found Dockerfile, docker-compose, pyproject, uv.lock, docs, examples, prompts, tests and bilingual README.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong runnable signal with quick-start claims, Python package metadata, container files and tests. No market-data/API run was performed.
   - 建议动作：Study as a report automation pattern; keep it paper-only until data provenance and financial-risk disclaimers are reviewed.

5. [TristanBrotherton/openclaw-voice-call-realtime](https://github.com/TristanBrotherton/openclaw-voice-call-realtime) - Realtime Phone-call Agent Plugin - Score 82
   - 做什么：OpenClaw plugin that lets an assistant place and receive real phone calls through Twilio and OpenAI Realtime, with in-call tools, transcripts, call screening and structured outcomes.
   - 面向谁：Agent builders who want assistants to handle phone-only workflows such as reservations, store checks or IVR navigation.
   - AI native 点：Gives an agent a bounded voice/telephony actuator, then captures transcript, summary and outcome so the call becomes auditable work.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-08, pushed same day; 47 stars and 3 forks; root audit found OpenClaw plugin manifest, package-lock, src, index.ts, CHANGELOG and README with concrete call scenarios.
   - 可运行性判断：Good plugin signal, but depends on Twilio/OpenAI credentials and real-world phone calls. No credentialed run was attempted.
   - 建议动作：Prototype only with test numbers and strict consent/logging rules; inspect failure behavior around IVR and human escalation.

6. [yangg1224/smart_remarkable](https://github.com/yangg1224/smart_remarkable) - LLM Ink-screen Assistant - Score 80
   - 做什么：Rust Vision-LLM agent for reMarkable tablets that watches handwritten input, sends selected screen regions to an LLM and draws or types responses back onto the ink screen.
   - 面向谁：reMarkable power users who want AI help embedded in handwriting workflows rather than a separate chat surface.
   - AI native 点：Turns handwriting regions into model-addressable objects and returns answers as editable pen strokes, making the agent part of the native tablet interaction.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-07, pushed 2026-07-09; 49 stars and 5 forks; audit found Cargo workspace, docs, assets, evaluations, prompts, tests, build.sh and an xovi extension for an LLM button.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong device-specific engineering signal, but requires compatible reMarkable setup. No device build or install was run.
   - 建议动作：Track for local-device AI UX; test only on a spare device or emulator path after reviewing extension hooks.

7. [thomasunise/visionbridge](https://github.com/thomasunise/visionbridge) - OpenAI-compatible Vision Tool Proxy - Score 78
   - 做什么：Tiny proxy that lets text-only reasoning models inspect images through a separate vision model using tools such as look, OCR, scan, crop and compare.
   - 面向谁：Developers using local/OpenAI-compatible chat stacks who want vision without retraining or switching their reasoning model.
   - AI native 点：Splits reasoning and perception into tool calls, allowing agents to request targeted visual evidence rather than blindly receiving a huge multimodal blob.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-07; 29 stars and 1 fork; root audit found Dockerfile, docker-compose, Makefile, pyproject, examples, benchmarks, tests and OpenWebUI/LibreChat-style proxy docs.
   - 可运行性判断：Good API/server signal with container and test assets. No local server or model backend was run.
   - 建议动作：Try with local Ollama/LM Studio plus a known VLM and inspect tool-call trace quality.

8. [Northwood-Systems/foreman](https://github.com/Northwood-Systems/foreman) - Self-hosted LLM Gateway for Coding Agents - Score 77
   - 做什么：Single Go binary LLM gateway that routes requests across providers by cost, policy and determinism while keeping keys and traffic inside the user network.
   - 面向谁：Teams using coding agents across many models who need spend control and provider policy without changing harness code.
   - AI native 点：Puts model routing, cost policy and conversation pinning between agents and providers, making agent model choice governable and auditable.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-08; 19 stars; root audit found Go cmd/internal/shared layout, Dockerfile, Makefile, configs, deploy, docs, assets, SECURITY and goreleaser config.
   - 可运行性判断：Strong Go service signal with binary/package structure and Docker docs. No build or gateway smoke test was run.
   - 建议动作：Compare with existing LiteLLM-style gateways for deterministic routing and local policy ergonomics.

9. [ItsJazii/pane](https://github.com/ItsJazii/pane) - AI Subscription Usage Tray - Score 75
   - 做什么：Windows tray app that aggregates AI subscription limits, resets, spend and usage across Claude, Codex, Cursor, Copilot and other providers.
   - 面向谁：Heavy AI coding-tool users juggling multiple subscriptions and quota windows.
   - AI native 点：Treats AI tool quotas as operational state for power users, bringing provider limits into a local always-visible control surface.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-07, pushed 2026-07-09; 8 stars; audit found Tauri/Rust + Vite app, docs screenshots, install.ps1, package-lock, ROADMAP, SECURITY and provider list.
   - 可运行性判断：Concrete desktop-app signal, but provider integrations and credential handling need inspection. No Windows run was attempted.
   - 建议动作：Use as a pattern for quota-aware agent workbenches; audit local storage before connecting real accounts.

10. [deer-flow/llm-space](https://github.com/deer-flow/llm-space) - Agent Builder Debugging Desktop - Score 74
   - 做什么：Desktop app for prototyping agent ideas, inspecting harness execution steps, debugging failures and evaluating performance, dogfooded with DeerFlow.
   - 面向谁：Agent developers who need local visibility into multi-step harness behavior and evaluation traces.
   - AI native 点：Moves agent debugging from logs into a desktop workbench centered on run steps, failure inspection and eval feedback.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-28, pushed 2026-07-10; 59 stars and 10 forks; audit found apps/packages monorepo, docs, scripts, telemetry policy, AGENTS/CLAUDE files, bun lock and screenshots.
   - 可运行性判断：Good desktop/workbench signal, but no Bun install or app launch was performed.
   - 建议动作：Watch as an agent-observability UI reference; compare with agent-inspect and existing local trace tooling.

## Watchlist

- [pascalorg/lingo](https://github.com/pascalorg/lingo) - Safer LLM Tool Input Parser - Score 72 - Zero-dependency parser/humanizer for quantities, units, dates and ranges so forms and LLM tool calls can normalize messy natural-language values. 建议：Watch for examples around agent tool schemas and validation failure UX.
- [xiaosen2026/flowcanva](https://github.com/xiaosen2026/flowcanva) - Infinite-canvas Multimodal AI Pipeline - Score 71 - Full-stack infinite canvas for chaining LLM, image, video, ComfyUI and agent/workflow nodes. 建议：Watch for install docs and reusable workflow JSON support.
- [MadBlast0/Cli-launcher](https://github.com/MadBlast0/Cli-launcher) - Desktop Launcher for AI Coding CLIs - Score 70 - Electron desktop launcher to install, update, uninstall and launch 17 terminal AI agents from one panel. 建议：Track for provider install/update safety and account isolation.
- [ninemindai/agentgem](https://github.com/ninemindai/agentgem) - Portable Coding-agent Session Distillation - Score 69 - Distills coding-agent sessions into reusable portable “Gems” with secret redaction and deployment across harnesses. 建议：Watch alongside LCO/Decapod-style session memory tools.
- [wellwelwel/lagune](https://github.com/wellwelwel/lagune) - Agent-guided Security Hardening - Score 68 - Security copilot that guides supported AI agents through project-specific hardening across many languages. 建议：Evaluate on a disposable service and compare findings with established scanners.
- [MongLong0214/logic-pro-mcp](https://github.com/MongLong0214/logic-pro-mcp) - Logic Pro MCP Control Server - Score 67 - Local MCP server for controlling Logic Pro, writing MIDI, operating transport/mixer state and verifying live project data. 建议：Watch for permission model and readback reliability.

## Skip Reasons

- [lewisondako2005-commits/Fortnite-Aimbot-Softaim-Mod-Menu-2026](https://github.com/lewisondako2005-commits/Fortnite-Aimbot-Softaim-Mod-Menu-2026) - Game cheat/aimbot repository; excluded for safety and not a legitimate AI-native product.
- [R0f1ida/Rust-Aimbot-ESP-Hack-2026-Undetected](https://github.com/R0f1ida/Rust-Aimbot-ESP-Hack-2026-Undetected) - Game cheat/ESP repository with suspicious growth pattern; excluded.
- [zhouwei713/seedance-prompt](https://github.com/zhouwei713/seedance-prompt) - Prompt/skill collection for video prompts rather than a runnable product surface.
- [youssefeltot123-commits/AI-Photo-Enhancer-2026-Restore-Old](https://github.com/youssefeltot123-commits/AI-Photo-Enhancer-2026-Restore-Old) - Generic AI photo enhancer repo with suspicious same-day 100-star/no-fork pattern and insufficient audited product evidence before rate limit.
- [davidguilfarras09/AI-Face-Swap-Tool-2026-Real-Time-Video](https://github.com/davidguilfarras09/AI-Face-Swap-Tool-2026-Real-Time-Video) - Generic face-swap repo with suspicious same-day star pattern and higher misuse risk; not promoted.
- [webierproductionenv/AI-Background-Remover-2026-Batch](https://github.com/webierproductionenv/AI-Background-Remover-2026-Batch) - Generic image utility with suspicious same-day star pattern; README/root audit was blocked by rate limit before product proof.
- [KORAYTEACHER/fintech-forge](https://github.com/KORAYTEACHER/fintech-forge) - Finance app scaffold looked broad and marketing-heavy compared with more concrete AI Market Pulse and FinTech Advisor candidates.
- [suyiyun/llm-text2sql-taxonomy](https://github.com/suyiyun/llm-text2sql-taxonomy) - Research/benchmark taxonomy code, not a user-facing AI-native product for this radar.

## 今日趋势观察

1. AI-native creative tools are becoming more operational: Lapian Notes and Blockout transform raw media intent into structured assets that downstream models can follow.
2. Physical-world and device-native agents are moving from demos into bounded interfaces: Homekit, Smart Remarkable and Logic Pro MCP all focus on local control/readback.
3. Voice and phone agents are narrowing toward explicit workflows with transcripts, outcomes and tool boundaries, as shown by the OpenClaw realtime call plugin.
4. Agent workbenches now need operational telemetry beyond chat history: Pane, LLM Space, Foreman and AgentGem all expose quota, routing, traces or reusable session knowledge.
5. Suspicious same-day star bursts remain common around generic AI image/video utilities and game-cheat repositories; runnable product evidence and root-file audits matter more than raw stars.

## 今日建议动作

- Creative workflow trial: run Lapian Notes or Blockout against a short non-sensitive clip/scene and compare the artifact loop with current prompt-only video workflows.
- Safety review: inspect Homekit and the OpenClaw voice plugin for dry-run, permission, consent and logging boundaries before any real-world actuation.
- Infra comparison: compare Foreman with LiteLLM-style gateways for coding-agent model routing, cost policy and conversation pinning.
- Workbench follow-up: watch Pane, LLM Space and AgentGem as evidence that AI power users need quota, trace and reusable workflow surfaces.

## 信息来源

- GitHub Search API snapshots: /tmp/radar_2026_07_10_created_agents.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_10_created_llm.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_10_updated_ai.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_10_active_agent_stars.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_10_active_mcp_stars.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_10_active_vertical_agents.json, /tmp/radar_2026_07_10_active_workflow_llm.json.
- GitHub repository metadata, README and root contents for selected candidates under /tmp/radar_2026_07_10_repo_audit.
- GitHub API rate limits blocked the tail of a few low-confidence generic image/utility audits; those repos were not promoted.
- No clone, install, Docker, npm, pip, cargo, Go, Swift, Windows, tablet, HomeKit, Twilio, Logic Pro, brokerage, browser or local runtime audit was performed today.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-07-08

数据窗口：2026-07-05 00:00 to 2026-07-08 15:04 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub Search API batches for newly created and actively pushed AI agent, MCP, RAG, workflow, assistant, browser/code/voice-agent and automation repositories; targeted GitHub API README/root-content audits for selected candidates.

关键假设：Scores favor repositories created or materially updated in the 2026-07-05 to 2026-07-08 window, with a real product surface, runnable CLI/UI/API/MCP workflow, clear user scenario, and enough documentation or examples to evaluate. Star counts are unauthenticated GitHub API point-in-time signals and can be noisy. Mature evergreen infrastructure is included only when this window showed strong product-shape activity; pure training code, prompt collections, awesome lists, SDK wrappers and README-only visions are downgraded.

## Top Projects

1. [Cranot/roam-code](https://github.com/Cranot/roam-code) - Local Code Intelligence MCP - Score 89
   - 做什么：Local codebase intelligence CLI and MCP server for AI coding agents with SQLite graph facts, safety gates, audit evidence and hundreds of agent-readable tools.

## Watchlist

- [RNT56/SEO-workflow](https://github.com/RNT56/SEO-workflow) - Evidence-bound SEO Agent Workflow - Score 72 - Agent-readiness and SEO workflow for scanning live sites and producing validated remediation reports. 建议：Watch as a vertical evidence-bound agent pattern.

- [vishaldev78/Meeting-Insights-Agent](https://github.com/vishaldev78/Meeting-Insights-Agent) - Slack Meeting Memory Agent - Score 67 - Slack agent for meeting summaries, action-item extraction, auto-detection and channel-history Q&A. 建议：Watch alongside SignalRoom for Slack agent UX patterns.
- [yashshelke2106/fno-signal-terminal](https://github.com/yashshelke2106/fno-signal-terminal) - AI-assisted Trading Terminal - Score 66 - Indian F&O trading terminal with FastAPI, Next.js dashboard, scanner, risk engine and an AI-agent desk documented in the repo. 建议：Use only as architecture study; never connect real capital without deep audit.

## Skip Reasons

- [AI-Hypercomputer/maxtext](https://github.com/AI-Hypercomputer/maxtext) - High-quality LLM training/inference code, but not a fresh user-facing AI-native product for this radar.
- [BerriAI/litellm](https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm) - Important mature AI gateway infrastructure; included as context but not promoted because today lacked a new product-specific signal.
- [hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code](https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code) - Awesome/resource collection rather than runnable product surface.
- [xagentAI/.github](https://github.com/xagentAI/.github) - Organization/profile repository with marketplace positioning; root README API returned 404 and no runnable product code was visible.
- [Pitikha/TangkuAgentOS](https://github.com/Pitikha/TangkuAgentOS) - Vision and architecture are broad, but current README reads platform-aspirational and product/runnable surface is less concrete than Top candidates.
- [maimounatonny/Fanar-Hackathon](https://github.com/maimounatonny/Fanar-Hackathon) - Hackathon prototype with a narrow government guidance scenario; root surface looked too thin for Top/Watchlist today.
- [NietzsLe/taskflow](https://github.com/NietzsLe/taskflow) - Interesting loop-engineering state substrate, but early zero-star package and generic automation scope need more proof before promotion.
- [vllm-project/vllm](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm) - Core model-serving infrastructure, not product-shaped discovery for this daily radar.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent tooling is converging on durable work state: LCO, Decapod, Kobe and Forge all treat agent work as something to index, govern, isolate or hand off.
2. Local-first agent surfaces are getting stronger: SoloMD, agterm and qmtcli keep data/control on the user machine while exposing bounded agent interfaces.
3. Coding-agent safety is moving from prompt advice to enforceable evidence: roam-code, Decapod and Wardyn all foreground audit trails, policy gates or identity.
4. Vertical agents are easiest to evaluate when they are embedded in a real channel such as Slack, WhatsApp, QMT, SEO scanners or clinical coding pipelines.
5. Pure platform visions still need runnable proof; today's stronger candidates had package manifests, tests, Docker, MCP configs, screenshots or install commands.

## 今日建议动作

- First trial: run roam-code against a disposable repository and compare the evidence packet against current review expectations.
- Second trial: inspect SoloMD's MCP/AutoGit model as a local knowledge-workbench reference.
- Governance follow-up: compare Decapod, Wardyn and LCO on what each stores as durable agent state.
- UI/workbench follow-up: compare Kobe and agterm for multi-agent visibility and attention management.

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-07-04

数据窗口：2026-07-01 00:00 to 2026-07-04 14:18 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub Search API queries for newly created or recently pushed AI agent, LLM app, RAG, MCP, coding-agent, workflow, browser/voice-agent and automation repositories; targeted GitHub API README/root-content audits for selected candidates.

关键假设：Scores favor repositories created or materially updated in the 2026-07-01 to 2026-07-04 window, with a visible product surface, runnable CLI/UI/API/MCP server, meaningful docs/examples, and clear user scenario. Star counts are unauthenticated GitHub API point-in-time signals and may be noisy. Mature baseline projects such as n8n, opencode, Claude Code, Codex, VS Code and prompt collections were used as context but not promoted without a fresh product-specific signal. Local runtime audits were not performed.

## Top Projects

1. [Aevella/polaris-local-first](https://github.com/Aevella/polaris-local-first) - Local-first AI Workspace - Score 88
   - 做什么：Local-first AI workspace for sustained model work, collaborators, saved materials, project context and portable backups.
   - 面向谁：Power users and teams that need AI collaboration to persist across sessions, files, people, and reusable project artifacts.
   - AI native 点：Treats AI work as a workspace with identity, memory boundaries, cards/materials, tools, and evidence trails rather than a disposable chat transcript.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-01; GitHub Search showed 80 stars and 19 forks; root audit found desktop, mobile, API/server, docs, deployment notes, package-lock, TypeScript/Vite-style app structure, Capacitor config, and security docs.
   - 可运行性判断：README and root files indicate a runnable TypeScript app with package.json, server/api, desktop/mobile folders, .env.example, DEPLOYMENT.md and docs. No install/run audit was performed.
   - 建议动作：Clone in a sandbox and verify whether the local-first data model, project materials, and collaborator boundaries can support a real multi-session AI workbench.

2. [antgroup/Napaxi](https://github.com/antgroup/Napaxi) - Mobile-native Agent SDK - Score 86
   - 做什么：Rust/Flutter mobile-native SDK for embedding on-device agent experiences with sandboxed execution, tools, and x-app/x-agent/x-channel connectors.
   - 面向谁：Mobile app teams that want agent capabilities inside iOS/Android products without pushing the whole experience into a web chat.
   - AI native 点：Moves agent runtime and tool execution into the mobile application layer, including sandboxing and cross-app/channel concepts as product primitives.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-01; GitHub API showed 24 stars, 3 forks, pushed 2026-07-03; Ant Group org; root audit found Cargo.toml, Rust/Flutter codegen config, multilingual docs, changelog, security and contributor materials.
   - 可运行性判断：README signals SDK 1.0 and Rust/Flutter requirements; root structure suggests a real SDK rather than README-only concept. Mobile build was not run.
   - 建议动作：Review license and mobile integration model; run the sample path if available and compare with existing app-agent embedding options.

3. [Brain0-ai/brain0](https://github.com/Brain0-ai/brain0) - Agent Code Provenance / Decision Graph - Score 84
   - 做什么：Black-box recorder for AI-written code that links commits to prompts, read context, trust signals, drift detection and audit evidence.
   - 面向谁：Engineering teams using coding agents who need to know why code changed, what the agent saw, and whether changes remain trustworthy.
   - AI native 点：Adds provenance and accountability to agent-authored code, turning prompts, context reads and trust checks into inspectable engineering artifacts.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-02; GitHub API showed 22 stars and 12 forks; root audit found Rust workspace, packages, pnpm workspace, schemas, docs, CI badge and security/contribution files.
   - 可运行性判断：README is extensive and root files include Cargo, pnpm, schema and scripts, indicating more than a prompt collection. No binary or dashboard was run locally.
   - 建议动作：Test on a small agent-authored repo and check whether it reconstructs prompt/context provenance with low friction.

4. [akseolabs-seo/fable-soul](https://github.com/akseolabs-seo/fable-soul) - Coding-agent Judgment Layer - Score 82
   - 做什么：Markdown/Python judgment layer for AI coding agents that adds verification, communication discipline, and senior-engineer style decision checks.
   - 面向谁：Developers using Claude Code, Codex or similar agents who want lightweight guardrails before accepting edits.
   - AI native 点：Productizes agent judgment as reusable operating discipline: verify, reason, explain and avoid shallow edits inside the coding-agent loop.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-03; GitHub Search showed 50 stars and 17 forks; root audit found README, bilingual README, SKILL.md, examples, references, scripts and changelog.
   - 可运行性判断：Runs as a skill-style workflow with two Python scripts and Markdown instructions; it is executable enough for agent hosts, but less productized than a standalone app.
   - 建议动作：Trial as a Codex/Claude coding skill on one low-risk fix and measure whether it reduces review churn.

5. [msaad00/agent-bom](https://github.com/msaad00/agent-bom) - Agent Supply-chain Security Control Plane - Score 81
   - 做什么：AI supply-chain and cloud security scanner/control plane covering agents, MCP, packages, cloud estate, non-human identities and policy checks.
   - 面向谁：Security and platform teams that need visibility into AI agent dependencies, MCP servers and machine identities.
   - AI native 点：Frames agent/MCP usage as a software bill of materials and security surface, which is a practical gap as agent tools proliferate.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub API showed 24 stars and 7 forks with active push on 2026-07-04; root audit found Dockerfile, Makefile, PyPI/Docker Hub READMEs, .agent-bom example config, pre-commit hooks and project structure docs.
   - 可运行性判断：Root files point to CLI/container distribution and a self-hosted UI path; exact setup was not run.
   - 建议动作：Run the scanner against a small MCP-heavy repo and inspect whether findings are concrete enough for a security review workflow.

6. [medoxisto/toolbox-mcp](https://github.com/medoxisto/toolbox-mcp) - Local MCP Utility Toolbox - Score 79
   - 做什么：Local stdio MCP server exposing OCR, PDF/image/audio/video, spreadsheet, math, QR, regex, JSON/CSV and timezone tools for AI agents.
   - 面向谁：Agent users who want private local file/tool capabilities without sending files to network services.
   - AI native 点：Extends agents with practical local capabilities that LLMs cannot perform reliably alone, while keeping execution on the user machine.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-01; GitHub API showed 19 stars and 6 forks; root audit found TypeScript source, package.json/package-lock, README and OCR trained data.
   - 可运行性判断：README describes npm-style local MCP usage over stdio; root structure is compact and runnable-looking, but no MCP host integration was tested.
   - 建议动作：Add temporarily to a local MCP host and test PDF/OCR/math tasks against real files.

7. [klarlabs-studio/tokenops](https://github.com/klarlabs-studio/tokenops) - Agent Rate-limit Operations MCP - Score 78
   - 做什么：Go-based MCP server and CLI for predicting AI-agent rate-limit cutoffs across Claude, ChatGPT and Gemini-style subscription tiers.
   - 面向谁：Heavy AI-agent operators who need to plan work around subscription, token and rate-limit constraints.
   - AI native 点：Turns model subscription limits into an agent-readable operations signal, helping agents decide when to continue, defer, switch model, or compress work.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub API showed active push on 2026-07-04; root audit found Go module, cmd/internal layout, deployments, docs, integrations, CI/release badges, changelog and goreleaser config.
   - 可运行性判断：README and Go project layout suggest a real CLI/MCP server; no binary install or MCP registration was performed.
   - 建议动作：Watch closely; trial if current agent workflows hit rate-limit uncertainty often enough to justify an ops layer.

8. [liangdabiao/ecom-details-image-ui](https://github.com/liangdabiao/ecom-details-image-ui) - Vertical AI Image Agent App - Score 76
   - 做什么：Chinese e-commerce visual creation assistant that turns product descriptions or reference images into professional product-detail imagery.
   - 面向谁：Small merchants, e-commerce operators and designers who need fast product-scene image generation with a web UI.
   - AI native 点：A vertical user-facing AI workflow rather than a generic image API: prompt, reference image, scene/style change, gateway config and deployable app are packaged together.
   - 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-07-01; GitHub API showed 17 stars and 4 forks; root audit found Vite/TypeScript app, cloud-functions, server, agents folder, EdgeOne deployment config and detailed Chinese README.
   - 可运行性判断：README includes EdgeOne Makers deployment path and environment variables; local app likely runnable via package.json, but not built today.
   - 建议动作：Use as a vertical-product pattern; verify generated image quality and cost controls before deeper adoption.

## Watchlist

- [Oft3r/agentic-trading-desk](https://github.com/Oft3r/agentic-trading-desk) - Vertical Agent Trading Desk - Score 74 - Local AI-assisted trading desk using Robinhood MCP plus deterministic Python technical-analysis engines. 建议：Watch as a vertical-agent design pattern; do not use with real accounts before security and compliance review.
- [kevintsai1202/deep-memory](https://github.com/kevintsai1202/deep-memory) - Agent Memory / Hybrid Retrieval Skill - Score 73 - Self-evolving knowledge accumulation and hybrid retrieval skill for coding agents with local ChromaDB and reranking. 建议：Watch; compare with Hunch and Brain0 on the same repo memory/provenance task.
- [davesheffer/hunch](https://github.com/davesheffer/hunch) - Architectural Conformance for AI Code - Score 72 - Git-native graph of decisions, bugs and invariants exposed to agent hosts for architectural conformance. 建议：Keep on watchlist and test if architectural drift becomes a pain point.
- [Nicnk/mcp-proxy-studio](https://github.com/Nicnk/mcp-proxy-studio) - MCP Proxy Studio - Score 70 - Visual dashboard for creating, running and monitoring MCP proxies with live logs and inspector-style management. 建议：Watch; inspect code before installing binaries or relying on the release artifact.
- [MS33834/autoship-cli](https://github.com/MS33834/autoship-cli) - Local AI Delivery Assistant - Score 69 - Local-first intelligent delivery assistant for cleaning, verifying, committing and shipping project artifacts. 建议：Watch and run only in a disposable repo until commit/upload behavior is fully understood.
- [aipoch/open-science](https://github.com/aipoch/open-science) - AI Science Workbench - Score 68 - Model-agnostic AI workbench concept for scientific discovery. 建议：Track for future runnable releases; skip for immediate trials.

## Skip Reasons

- [amitshekhariitbhu/ai-agents-tutorial](https://github.com/amitshekhariitbhu/ai-agents-tutorial) - Educational tutorial repository; useful learning material but outside product-shaped radar focus.
- [7-e1even/learn-agent](https://github.com/7-e1even/learn-agent) - Promising coding-agent learning project, but positioned as from-scratch educational material rather than a durable app/CLI/API product.
- [Zsun79/ConferenceWatch](https://github.com/Zsun79/ConferenceWatch) - Agent skill for AI conference deadlines; useful niche utility but too narrow and skill-like for Top product placement.
- [DasterProkio/awesome-ai-companion](https://github.com/DasterProkio/awesome-ai-companion) - Curated awesome list; not runnable software.
- [x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools](https://github.com/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools) - Prompt/model collection with high attention, but no standalone user-facing product or runtime.
- [andreanocalvin/autoclaw-autologin](https://github.com/andreanocalvin/autoclaw-autologin) - OAuth auto-login/reverse-proxy automation raises account-safety and policy risk; not suitable for promotion without deeper review.
- [nodobys/Claude-Sonnet-5-Free-Desktop-APP](https://github.com/nodobys/Claude-Sonnet-5-Free-Desktop-APP) - Marketing-heavy free-model desktop-app framing; runnable/product claims need verification and provenance is weak.
- [affaan-m/ECC](https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC) - Repeated abnormal headline star velocity; treat as noisy until independently verified despite frequent search visibility.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent accountability is becoming a product category: Brain0, Fable Soul, Hunch and Agent BOM all focus on why an agent acted, what it touched, and whether the output is trustworthy.
2. Local-first AI workspaces are moving beyond chat logs into project materials, collaborators, evidence and portable backups; Polaris is the clearest fresh signal today.
3. MCP infrastructure is splitting into practical local toolboxes, proxy studios, rate-limit operations and domain-specific servers rather than just connector demos.
4. Mobile embedded agents are emerging as a separate surface from web/desktop chat; Napaxi is notable because it frames sandboxed mobile agent execution as an SDK.
5. Vertical AI products remain interesting when they package a complete workflow, as seen in e-commerce image generation and agentic trading, but they need stronger runtime validation before broad adoption.

## 今日建议动作

- First trial: Polaris, to evaluate whether local-first AI workspace primitives are useful for multi-session product research.
- Second trial: Brain0 or Fable Soul on a disposable coding-agent branch, to test whether provenance/judgment tooling catches review risks.
- MCP utility trial: toolbox-mcp for OCR/PDF/math tasks and tokenops only if rate-limit prediction is a current operational pain.
- Mobile follow-up: inspect Napaxi sample integration and license before considering a mobile agent prototype.

## 信息来源

- GitHub Search API snapshots: `/tmp/radar_2026_07_04_created_agent.json`, `/tmp/radar_2026_07_04_created_assistant.json`, `/tmp/radar_2026_07_04_mcp_updated.json`, `/tmp/radar_2026_07_04_code_agent.json`, `/tmp/radar_2026_07_04_workflow.json`.
- GitHub repository metadata, README and root contents for selected candidates in `/tmp/radar_2026_07_04_repo_audit`.
- No clone, install, Docker, npm, pip, cargo, Go, mobile build or browser run audit was performed today.
