runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-30

数据窗口：2026-06-27T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-30T08:45:00Z; GitHub Search API created>=2026-06-27 and pushed>=2026-06-29 keyword queries, plus GitHub API README/root-content audits for shortlisted repositories.

信息来源：GitHub Search API repository metadata; GitHub repository README and root contents through GitHub API for shortlisted projects. No clone/install/Docker/UI runtime execution audit was performed.

关键假设：Prioritized projects with runnable UI/CLI/API, concrete user workflow, README evidence, root code/assets, and fresh created/pushed signals. Mature projects that were already tracked recently were usually demoted to Watchlist unless they showed a distinct new product surface. Star/fork counts are GitHub API snapshots; runnability is inferred from README/root files, not verified by local execution. Type-level skip reasons are stated in the report without fabricated repos.

## 今日趋势观察

Fresh product-shaped repos are clustering around coding-agent session control, agent-authored QA, visual feedback loops, MCP observability/brokering, and local-first personal or business operating systems built on Claude Code/Codex-style CLIs.

- Coding-agent 操作面继续细分：AgentCarto 管历史/会话，Worktrunk 管 worktree，Hover/VibePin 把浏览器与视觉反馈变成 agent 可消费的任务材料。
- MCP 从“接工具”进入“治理与可观测”：Fennec 补 browser/terminal/process runtime 视野，JanusMCP 补多身份 broker，ROIC MCP 展示垂直数据工具化。
- 本地优先仍是高频叙事，但今天更具体：localmind 把 API/embedding/mem0/RAG/MCP 装进 localhost，Dezin 把生成质量门禁放在本地 agent loop。
- 移动/IM 远程控制有中国语境信号：QQ-AI-Bridge 与 Avibe/Box 类项目共同说明 coding agent 的“离开电脑后怎么管”正在成为产品问题。
- Browser agent 方向要区分开放工具与闭源服务包装；真实 Safari/Chrome/remote Chromium 都有需求，但权限、登录态和滥用风险必须前置审计。

## Top Projects

### 1. [Hyperyond/Hover](https://github.com/Hyperyond/Hover)
- 分类：Agent-authored Web Testing / MCP + VS Code
- AI Native Product Score：89
- 做什么：Local-first Vibe Testing suite where a coding agent explores a web app through Hover MCP and crystallizes flows into plain Playwright tests.
- 面向谁：Frontend teams and agent-assisted developers who want AI to discover flows and produce durable CI tests they own.
- AI native 点：The agent drives real browser tools during authoring, then Hover deterministically saves the same selectors into normal Playwright specs so CI runs without model calls.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub API snapshot: 11 stars, 1 fork, 1 issue; created 2026-05-20, pushed 2026-06-30. README/root show npm MCP package, VS Code extension, docs, site, packages, security notes and CI-facing positioning.
- 可运行性判断：README documents Node >=20, `@hover-dev/mcp`, VS Code review cockpit, generated `@playwright/test` artifacts and CI path. Not locally launched today.
- 建议动作：Run it against one existing dev server and compare generated tests against a manually written Playwright smoke suite.

### 2. [agentcarto/agentcarto](https://github.com/agentcarto/agentcarto)
- 分类：Cross-agent Session TUI
- AI Native Product Score：86
- 做什么：Terminal UI that indexes local Claude Code, Codex, Grok and GitHub Copilot Chat sessions into one searchable browser.
- 面向谁：Heavy coding-agent users who need to find, resume, fork or relocate prior sessions across multiple agent CLIs.
- AI native 点：It treats agent history, running status, branches, turns and working directories as the product surface rather than hiding sessions inside each vendor tool.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-29, pushed 2026-06-29, 1 star; Go repo with Bubble Tea style TUI, README, docs, install script, Makefile, config example, cmd/internal packages.
- 可运行性判断：README describes local disk history readers and live process detection; root includes `go.mod`, `cmd`, `internal`, `install.sh` and config. No `go run` audit today.
- 建议动作：Try on this machine in read-only mode once session path handling is reviewed; useful for cross-thread recall and automation continuity.

### 3. [YIWANG3/vibepin](https://github.com/YIWANG3/vibepin)
- 分类：Visual Feedback to Coding Agent
- AI Native Product Score：85
- 做什么：In-browser annotation tool: pin an element or region, write the desired change, and let a local agent pick up the source-linked task.
- 面向谁：Frontend builders using Claude Code/Cursor/MCP agents who struggle to describe exact UI targets in text.
- AI native 点：It turns visual feedback into agent-readable tasks with React component/file-line hints, local queue draining and optional MCP `watch_annotations` tooling.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-29, pushed 2026-06-29, 2 stars; repo has live demo, demo video, examples for React/Vite/Electron, daemon, adapters, CLI/bin, Claude command and MCP path.
- 可运行性判断：README gives `npm install` / `npm run dev` examples and local overlay flow; no browser test was run.
- 建议动作：Use on a small frontend polish task and measure whether pin-to-file context reduces instruction ambiguity.

### 4. [plumpslabs/fennec](https://github.com/plumpslabs/fennec)
- 分类：Developer Observability MCP
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：MCP server that gives agents unified visibility into browser, terminal and process state for local development debugging.
- 面向谁：Developers asking coding agents to diagnose failing local apps, UI bugs or process/terminal errors.
- AI native 点：It exposes the agent’s missing runtime senses as tools: browser inspection, terminal output and process context become one MCP-observable environment.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-28, pushed 2026-06-30, 1 star; TypeScript monorepo with npm package badges, docs, examples, packages, public assets and security/contribution files.
- 可运行性判断：README positions an npm CLI/MCP server and cross-browser visibility; root has pnpm workspace and examples. No MCP client test today.
- 建议动作：Trial as a debugging companion on one local web app, especially where screenshots plus terminal logs matter.

### 5. [Bayway/janusmcp](https://github.com/Bayway/janusmcp)
- 分类：Multi-account MCP Broker
- AI Native Product Score：83
- 做什么：Local broker that lets one MCP endpoint manage multiple identities for the same underlying MCP service.
- 面向谁：Consultants, agencies and teams switching GitHub/Supabase/Slack-style MCP accounts across clients or environments.
- AI native 点：It adds the missing account/identity layer to MCP sessions, enabling agents to switch credentials without reconnecting clients.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-27, pushed 2026-06-29, 6 stars, 7 open issues; Go repo with Dockerfiles, docs, site, npm wrapper, MCP publisher assets, CI and security file.
- 可运行性判断：README shows local broker concept, one-click Cursor/VS Code config placeholders and package publishing path; root has install script and Go server. No auth-flow audit today.
- 建议动作：Security-review first, then test with a low-risk MCP service to evaluate identity-switch ergonomics and auditability.

### 6. [shaul1991/localmind](https://github.com/shaul1991/localmind)
- 分类：Local AI Stack / CLI Subscription Gateway
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：Local stack that wraps Claude/Codex CLI subscriptions into OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible API, embeddings, mem0 memory, second-brain RAG and MCP tools.
- 面向谁：Individual developers who want one localhost stack for personal AI API, memory and note retrieval without central hosting.
- AI native 点：It connects local CLI agents, API compatibility, embeddings, memory, RAG and MCP into one personal agent substrate.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-27, pushed 2026-06-30, 1 star, 1 fork; TypeScript repo with Docker Compose variants, OpenMemory, examples, docs, scripts and API config.
- 可运行性判断：README documents localhost-only principle, `/v1/chat/completions`, `/v1/messages`, embeddings, mem0/OpenMemory and MCP tools; no Docker run today.
- 建议动作：Evaluate only for personal/local use; check subscription-policy boundaries and command isolation before any automation use.

### 7. [Wang-Yeah623/qq-ai-bridge](https://github.com/Wang-Yeah623/qq-ai-bridge)
- 分类：Mobile IM Remote Control for Coding Agents
- AI Native Product Score：80
- 做什么：QQ bridge for sending tasks to Claude Code/Codex on a desktop and receiving completion notifications/results back in mobile chat.
- 面向谁：Chinese-market developers who want phone-based remote steering and notifications for local coding-agent jobs.
- AI native 点：It turns IM into the operating surface for coding agents: command routing, continuation, Markdown task archives, lock control and watchdog recovery.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-27, pushed 2026-06-30, 3 stars; Python/PowerShell repo with screenshots, NapCat/OneBot integration, notifier scripts, MCP server and autostart/watchdog scripts.
- 可运行性判断：README shows QQ command flow, config example and Windows startup/watchdog scripts; no QQ/NapCat runtime audit today.
- 建议动作：Track as a Feishu/Lark-adjacent remote-agent pattern; borrow notification/archive ideas, but review account/security risks.

### 8. [benis-me/Dezin](https://github.com/benis-me/Dezin)
- 分类：Local-first AI Design Generator
- AI Native Product Score：79
- 做什么：Local design generator that shells out to the user’s coding-agent CLI and enforces an anti-AI-slop lint/repair loop.
- 面向谁：Frontend/design tool builders who want self-contained generated artifacts with stricter taste and visual QA controls.
- AI native 点：It productizes generation quality control: agent CLI selection, design-system tokens, deterministic anti-slop linting, repair loops and optional screenshot QA are central.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-28, pushed 2026-06-30, 1 star; TypeScript repo with apps/content/docs, design systems, roadmap and local daemon positioning.
- 可运行性判断：README describes prototype and Vite/React/GSAP modes, PATH-based agent selection and local `~/.dezin` storage; no install run today.
- 建议动作：Compare its anti-slop rule loop against the existing frontend design standards; useful as a design-agent QA reference.

### 9. [mishahanin/heading-os](https://github.com/mishahanin/heading-os)
- 分类：Executive Agent Workspace
- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：Claude Code-based operating system for executive work across research, communications, CRM, content and operations with code/data separation.
- 面向谁：Operators and founders who want an agentic personal/business workspace with security-first private data handling.
- AI native 点：It packages durable operational state, skills, scripts, hooks and data separation around Claude Code as an executive workflow engine.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-29, pushed 2026-06-29, 3 stars, 7 open issues; Python repo with 2000+ tests claim, docs/assets, examples, config, scripts, skills lock and security files.
- 可运行性判断：README documents two-repository engine/data design and Python project structure; no setup/test execution today.
- 建议动作：Study its engine/data separation and approval patterns; validate claims before treating it as production-ready.

### 10. [roicai/mcp-server](https://github.com/roicai/mcp-server)
- 分类：Finance Data MCP Server
- AI Native Product Score：76
- 做什么：MCP server connecting Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, VS Code and Codex to public-company financial statements, ratios, earnings transcripts and stock data.
- 面向谁：Finance analysts and agent builders who need structured market/fundamental data as model tools.
- AI native 点：It turns financial data retrieval into an MCP tool surface, making live fundamentals and transcripts callable from agent workflows.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-29, pushed 2026-06-29, 2 stars; JavaScript repo with hosted MCP endpoint, npm package, examples, `.env.example`, package files and server code.
- 可运行性判断：README gives hosted Streamable HTTP MCP and local API-key server setup; no API key or MCP call was tested.
- 建议动作：Keep as domain MCP candidate; test with low-risk public tickers and verify data freshness/pricing limits.

## Watchlist

- [memex-lab/memex](https://github.com/memex-lab/memex) — Local-first AI Journal，Score 74。Open-source iOS/Android journal where agents organize text, photos and voice into timeline cards and insights. 建议：Watch as a consumer local-first agent pattern.
- [max-sixty/worktrunk](https://github.com/max-sixty/worktrunk) — Worktree CLI for Agent Workflows，Score 73。Rust CLI for Git worktree management tailored to parallel AI agent workflows. 建议：Use as worktree baseline when testing Superset/Orca/Paseo-style agent workbenches.
- [avibe-bot/avibe](https://github.com/avibe-bot/avibe) — Local-first Agent OS，Score 72。Local-first browser/chat-app workbench for driving Claude Code, Codex and OpenCode from Slack/Discord/Telegram/WeChat/Lark. 建议：Watch alongside QQ-AI-Bridge and incidentfox/box.
- [treyxu23/safari-web-agent](https://github.com/treyxu23/safari-web-agent) — Real Safari Browser Agent Skill，Score 71。macOS skill for controlling the user’s real Safari session when Playwright/headless login state fails. 建议：Watch; useful but must be permission-scoped carefully.
- [bgmacris/quimera-ai](https://github.com/bgmacris/quimera-ai) — Shared Chrome Browser for Claude Code，Score 70。Real-time shared Chrome between user and Claude Code via CDP and Playwright MCP, with user-handled logins/captchas. 建议：Watch as a human-in-browser-control pattern.
- [OnFinality-io/remote-browser](https://github.com/OnFinality-io/remote-browser) — Cloud Browser Runtime for Agents，Score 68。Documentation repo for a hosted Chromium API with CDP/WebSocket, live viewer, profiles and stealth mode. 建议：Watch, but keep below open runnable repos.

## Skip Reasons

- [Pdiamondz1/hma_project_foundation](https://github.com/Pdiamondz1/hma_project_foundation)：Interesting file-first project foundation, but currently reads more like a template/second-brain scaffold than a distinct AI-native product runtime.
- [frangelbarrera/osint-agent-skills](https://github.com/frangelbarrera/osint-agent-skills)：OSINT skill pack with MCP/playbooks; useful domain material, but primarily skills/knowledge packaging rather than standalone product surface.
- [yauld/ai-forge](https://github.com/yauld/ai-forge)：AI engineering learning/notebook repository; educational material rather than runnable AI-native product.
- [Shravan4598/Langchain](https://github.com/Shravan4598/Langchain)：Hands-on LangChain examples and components; tutorial/example repo, not product-shaped.

类型级降权：prompt/rules/skill-only collection、课程笔记、awesome list、单纯 provider wrapper、闭源服务 README 包装、游戏外挂/undetected automation、只有 README 没有可运行代码路径的仓库，本轮均不作为 Top。

## 今日建议动作

1. 先试 Hover 或 VibePin：它们最贴近现有前端/Codex 工作流，能快速验证“agent 看到 UI/生成测试/接收视觉反馈”的价值。
2. 用 AgentCarto 做一次只读审计：看它能否把本机 Codex/Claude 历史统一检索，帮助后续自动化复盘。
3. 对 Fennec + JanusMCP 做安全审计：一个处理 agent runtime visibility，一个处理多账号 MCP 身份，两者都可能成为 MCP 工具链基础件。
4. localmind、QQ-AI-Bridge、Dezin、Heading OS 都值得建长期卡，但要先确认权限边界、账号条款和真实可运行路径。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-29

数据窗口：2026-06-26T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-29T02:40:00Z; GitHub Search API created>=2026-06-26 and pushed>=2026-06-28 queries, plus README/root-content audits for selected repositories.

信息来源：GitHub Search API repository metadata; GitHub repository README and root contents through GitHub API for shortlisted projects. No clone/install/Docker/UI runtime execution audit was performed.

关键假设：Prioritized product-shaped repositories with UI/CLI/API, runnable install paths, docs/examples/screenshots/demo assets, and concrete user workflows. Repositories promoted on 2026-06-28 were demoted unless they showed a distinct fresh signal. Star/fork counts are GitHub API snapshots; all runnability judgments are README/root-file audits, not local runtime proof. Real spam/marketing repos found in GitHub search are listed as skipped; type-level exclusions are described in the report without fabricated repos.

## 今日趋势观察

Today's product-shaped repos concentrate around agent workbenches, local agent substrates, privacy firewalls, MCP observability, and small physical/mobile surfaces that make long-running coding agents easier to operate.

- Agent 工作台继续从单一聊天窗口转向“多会话、多 worktree、多审阅”的本地控制面，`superset-sh/superset` 是今天最强活跃信号。
- 本地 agent substrate 开始变具体：`monlite` 把文档、向量、队列、cron 收进一个 SQLite 文件，`dent8` 把长期记忆加上 authority/freshness 防线。
- 隐私与安全不再只靠“不要上传”：`vault-engine` 和 `mcpsnoop` 分别把 PII 处理、MCP 调用可视化放到 agent 工作流入口。
- 垂直 copilot 值得继续找：MATLAB/Simulink Copilot 虽然 star 很少，但有真实截图、工具链和明确工程场景。
- 今日 GitHub 搜索出现大量游戏外挂/免费模型 SEO repo；这类项目不进入 Top，保留真实 Skip 证据。

## Top Projects

### 1. [superset-sh/superset](https://github.com/superset-sh/superset)
- 分类：Parallel Coding Agent Workbench
- AI Native Product Score：91
- 做什么：Desktop/web code editor for running many Claude Code, Codex and other CLI agents in parallel on local worktrees.
- 面向谁：Developers and teams running multiple coding agents who need task switching, diff review, workspace presets and local control.
- AI native 点：It treats agent sessions as the primary work surface: parallel execution, terminal compatibility, worktree orchestration, agent presets, review/edit loops and local task context are core product objects.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub API snapshot showed 12.1k stars, 1.0k forks, pushed 2026-06-29; README/root include apps, packages, Docker Compose, agent config files, assets and multi-agent compatibility claims.
- 可运行性判断：README documents local agent orchestration and supported Claude Code/Codex/OpenCode style CLIs; root has bun workspace, docker-compose, apps and packages. Not locally launched today.
- 建议动作：High-priority trial: run one sandbox project with 3 parallel Codex/Claude tasks and inspect diff-review ergonomics.

### 2. [qataruts/monlite](https://github.com/qataruts/monlite)
- 分类：Local Agent Backend / SQLite Substrate
- AI Native Product Score：88
- 做什么：Documents, vectors, full-text search, cache, queue and cron in one SQLite file for coding agents, RAG pipelines and autonomous workers.
- 面向谁：Agent app builders who want local-first memory/job/document infrastructure without Redis, vector DB and queue services.
- AI native 点：It packages the boring backend primitives agents need into one embeddable local substrate: memory documents, vector search, persisted jobs and scheduled work in a single database file.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-26, pushed 2026-06-29, 24 stars; TypeScript workspace with docs, live demo, examples, bench, tests, packages and Python bindings.
- 可运行性判断：README shows docs/live browser demo, one-file local backend positioning and examples; root has package.json, pnpm workspace, src, tests, docs and demo. No npm install was run.
- 建议动作：Prototype a tiny radar memory/job queue using monlite to see whether it can replace multiple local services.

### 3. [fishonbike/vault-engine](https://github.com/fishonbike/vault-engine)
- 分类：Local LLM Privacy Firewall
- AI Native Product Score：86
- 做什么：Local-LLM privacy layer that detects, tokenizes and restores PII before text is sent to cloud models, with strong Chinese support.
- 面向谁：People pasting private customer, company or personal context into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Codex or Claude Code.
- AI native 点：It moves privacy protection into the agent/chat workflow itself: local detection, reversible pseudonymization, evaluation scripts and restore flow become pre-cloud model infrastructure.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-26, pushed 2026-06-28, 22 stars; repo has docs, eval, examples, tests, SECURITY.md and bilingual README.
- 可运行性判断：README includes demo SVG, benchmark reproduction and `pip install vault-engine`; root contains pyproject, scripts, eval and tests. No local eval was run.
- 建议动作：Test on Chinese/English sensitive snippets and compare redaction quality against PasteGuard-style proxy approaches.

### 4. [LongNgn204/local-coding-agent](https://github.com/LongNgn204/local-coding-agent)
- 分类：ChatGPT Web to Local Coding MCP
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：Local MCP server for ChatGPT Web that can read/write files, run commands and manage processes on the user machine through a Windows tray app and secure tunnel.
- 面向谁：ChatGPT Web users who want local coding-agent capabilities without moving repo files into a hosted workspace.
- AI native 点：It turns ChatGPT Web into a local coding surface by exposing file, shell, process, git and note tools over MCP with local tray controls.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-28, pushed same day, 5 stars; repo includes server, tray-app, SECURITY.md, scripts and .env example.
- 可运行性判断：README lists 20+ MCP tools, encrypted Windows tray controls and OpenAI Secure MCP Tunnel flow; no tunnel or command execution audit was performed.
- 建议动作：Security-first watch: inspect allowlists and command boundaries before any real repo test.

### 5. [incidentfox/box](https://github.com/incidentfox/box)
- 分类：Self-hosted Mobile Coding Agent Control
- AI Native Product Score：83
- 做什么：Phone-first self-hosted UI for running real Claude Code and Codex sessions on your own server with chat, voice, files, skills and always-on runs.
- 面向谁：Developers who want to monitor and drive long coding-agent jobs from a phone while keeping the actual CLIs on their own machine/server.
- AI native 点：It wraps long-lived coding-agent sessions in a mobile operations surface: real CLI sessions, file movement, voice input, persistence, logs and server ownership.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-28, pushed 2026-06-29, 3 stars; README has demo gif, install/provision scripts, Caddyfile, harness/server/public structure and Codex/Claude positioning.

### 6. [kerlenton/mcpsnoop](https://github.com/kerlenton/mcpsnoop)
- 分类：MCP Observability / Proxy TUI

- 做什么：Transparent terminal proxy that shows live MCP tool calls between AI clients and MCP servers, positioned as Wireshark for MCP.

- AI native 点：As MCP usage grows, the product need shifts to inspectability: live tool-call visibility, proxying and trace debugging become first-class agent infrastructure.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-27, pushed 2026-06-28, 6 stars; Go repo with demo gif, CI, Makefile, docs, internal/cmd structure and release config.
- 可运行性判断：README shows demo and proxy positioning; root has go.mod, cmd/internal/docs and Makefile. No local MCP proxy test was run.
- 建议动作：Use it in the next MCP experiment to capture exact tool calls and permission surprises.

### 7. [suzike/matlab-simulink-copilot](https://github.com/suzike/matlab-simulink-copilot)
- 分类：Vertical Engineering Copilot
- AI Native Product Score：80

- 做什么：Semantic object graph layer that models enterprise data once and exposes it through SPL, REST, MCP and a React Web UI.
- 面向谁：Enterprise data/platform teams exposing telemetry, service and business objects safely to AI agents.
- AI native 点：It bridges existing enterprise systems into agent-understandable entities and relationships, with MCP/AgentGateway as a first-class access path.

- 建议动作：Use its demo as a checklist for internal data-to-agent semantic layers and MCP governance.

### 9. [xyzzylabs/dent8](https://github.com/xyzzylabs/dent8)
- 分类：Agent Memory Firewall / MCP
- AI Native Product Score：77
- 做什么：Provenance-, authority- and freshness-governed memory firewall for coding agents with tamper-evident replayable event log.
- 面向谁：Agent builders who need long-term memory but also need to reject stale or low-authority facts.

- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-28, pushed same day, 2 stars; Rust workspace with crates, migrations, compose file, demo gif, docs and eval tests.

### 10. [mateaix/loope](https://github.com/mateaix/loope)

- AI Native Product Score：75
- 做什么：Rust CLI/TUI for loop engineering where Claude implements, Codex reviews, OpenCode plugs in and verifier checks each iteration.

- 建议动作：Watch for adoption; test once the adapter docs stabilize because the Claude-implements/Codex-reviews loop maps well to this automation style.

## Watchlist

- [asimons81/hermes-a2a-bridge](https://github.com/asimons81/hermes-a2a-bridge) — A2A Bridge for Hermes，Score 72。Local-first Hermes Agent bridge for Agent-to-Agent Protocol HTTP+JSON subset. 建议：Watch for real cross-agent examples.
- [Yene96/Mercury](https://github.com/Yene96/Mercury) — Android Native Agentic Harness，Score 71。Android harness where an LLM can read workspace state, run local calculations, trigger notifications and compose messages. 建议：Watch for demo/safety controls before testing.
- [ruvnet/agenticow](https://github.com/ruvnet/agenticow) — Branchable Agent Memory，Score 70。Copy-on-write vector branching for embedded multi-agent memory. 建议：Watch; verify benchmark claims before adopting.
- [TNTnext/Lumen](https://github.com/TNTnext/Lumen) — Self-hosted AI Gateway，Score 69。Python self-hosted AI gateway with multi-user governance, provider toggles and onboarding. 建议：Watch as lightweight gateway reference.
- [c-daniele/obsidiaria](https://github.com/c-daniele/obsidiaria) — Obsidian Agent Operating System，Score 68。Agent-run Obsidian vault workflow with inbox routing, daily routines and delegated roles. 建议：Watch, but keep below UI/CLI products.
- [puffinsoft/peek-cli](https://github.com/puffinsoft/peek-cli) — Browser Screenshot Tool for Coding Agents，Score 67。Browser extension plus WebSocket daemon that lets coding agents capture screenshots from open tabs. 建议：Watch; test with local browser only after permission review.

## Skip Reasons

- [dimasarestuprasmanto/Pet-Simulator-99-Auto-Farm-Trainer-2026-Tera](https://github.com/dimasarestuprasmanto/Pet-Simulator-99-Auto-Farm-Trainer-2026-Tera)：Spammy game auto-farm/undetected trainer repo surfaced by automation keywords; not an AI-native product for this radar and carries abuse risk.
- [NagaaSaketh/Pet-Simulator-99-Auto-Farm-Trainer-2026-Ultimate](https://github.com/NagaaSaketh/Pet-Simulator-99-Auto-Farm-Trainer-2026-Ultimate)：Duplicate-pattern game cheat/automation repo with artificial-looking launch cluster; excluded.
- [ahmadrj80/claude-fable-5-free-desktop-app](https://github.com/ahmadrj80/claude-fable-5-free-desktop-app)：Keyword-heavy free/Claude model marketing wrapper with weak credible product evidence.
- [Altair4300/glm-5.2-free-desktop-app](https://github.com/Altair4300/glm-5.2-free-desktop-app)：Model-name/free-desktop-app SEO pattern; likely access/marketing wrapper rather than auditable product.
- [QihongRuan/stanford-cs336-notes](https://github.com/QihongRuan/stanford-cs336-notes)：High-quality notes but educational content, not runnable AI-native product software.
- [estevecastells/awesome-ai-search](https://github.com/estevecastells/awesome-ai-search)：Awesome list/resource collection without product runtime.
- [nabinkhadka/FreeLLMAPI](https://github.com/nabinkhadka/FreeLLMAPI)：Free-tier provider rotation router; mostly provider-access plumbing with compliance and durability concerns.
- [ilindaniel/ponytail-lite](https://github.com/ilindaniel/ponytail-lite)：Agent behavior/prompt guidance, useful as method material but weak standalone product surface.

类型级降权：prompt/rules/skill-only collection、课程笔记、awesome list、单纯 provider wrapper、模型营销下载页、游戏外挂/undetected automation、只有 README 没有可运行代码路径的仓库，本轮均不作为 Top。

## 今日建议动作

1. 先试 `qataruts/monlite`：用一个 SQLite 文件承载 radar 的候选缓存、向量摘要和后续复跑任务。
2. 对 `superset-sh/superset` 做本地工作台试跑：开 3 个 Codex/Claude-style agent session，验证多 worktree、diff review 和 preset 价值。
3. 把 `vault-engine` 和 `mcpsnoop` 作为安全/可观测实验：一个保护出站上下文，一个记录 MCP 调用。
4. 对 `incidentfox/box`、`local-coding-agent` 先做权限审计，再考虑真实账号或 repo 接入。
5. 将 `matlab-simulink-copilot` 单独建垂直 copilot 卡，后续可按“IDE 内嵌 UI + MCP 工具 + Codex/Claude 后端”模式找同类项目。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-28

数据窗口：2026-06-25T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-28T03:40:00Z; GitHub Search API created>=2026-06-25 and pushed>=2026-06-25 queries, plus README/root-content audits for selected repositories.

信息来源：GitHub Search API repository metadata, GitHub README API, GitHub contents API. No clone/install/runtime execution audit was performed.

关键假设：Prioritize product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, Docker/examples/screenshots, and concrete user scenarios. Repositories already promoted on 2026-06-27 were mostly demoted unless they showed a distinct new signal. Star/fork counts are GitHub API snapshots and can include launch spikes; no local runtime audit was performed.

## Top Projects

### 1. [eli-labz/Godcoder](https://github.com/eli-labz/Godcoder) — Local Coding Agent Desktop — Score 90
- 做什么：Local-first desktop coding agent built with Rust/Tauri that lets users bring their own LLM key while keeping project code local except model-provider calls.
- 面向谁：Developers who want a desktop coding agent with stronger local-control posture than hosted coding tools.
- AI native 点：The product surface is the coding agent itself: local workspace, provider routing, agent execution, and desktop app packaging are core to the repo.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-27, pushed 2026-06-28, 240 stars, Rust/Tauri app structure, screenshots/assets, architecture and contributing docs.
- 可运行性判断：Cargo/Tauri mono-repo with apps/crates/services, Cargo.lock, launch-godcoder.bat, architecture docs, screenshots; not locally run in this audit.
- 建议动作：Try locally in a sandbox and compare UX/privacy story with OpenClaw/Orca-style agent workbenches.

### 2. [GraeLefix/GITVERSE](https://github.com/GraeLefix/GITVERSE) — Codebase-to-Prompt Web App — Score 84
- 做什么：Next.js app that reverse-engineers a codebase into architecture notes, ASCII blueprint, and an AI-ready rebuild prompt.
- 面向谁：Vibe coders, product prototypers, and engineering teams who need to transfer or reconstruct repo context inside coding agents.
- AI native 点：The output artifact is explicitly optimized for Cursor, Claude, Codex, and similar agents, turning code analysis into agent-ready build prompts.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-25 with 131 stars, live demo badge, package.json/src/Next.js stack, .env example and security/contribution docs.
- 可运行性判断：Next.js/TypeScript project with package.json, src, config files, and public live demo; no local npm run was performed.
- 建议动作：Open the hosted demo and test on a small repo; evaluate whether prompt output is differentiated from RepoPrompt-style context export.

### 3. [everruns/everruns](https://github.com/everruns/everruns) — Durable Agent Runtime — Score 83
- 做什么：Rust/Postgres platform for defining, deploying, and operating durable agents across Slack, web chat, scheduled jobs, webhooks, A2A, MCP, and HTTP APIs.
- 面向谁：Teams building long-running agent products that need restart-safe sessions, multi-channel delivery, and self-hostable operations.
- AI native 点：Durable execution, provider-neutral Open Responses support, remote MCP tools, and multi-channel harness packaging are central product primitives.
- 增长/活跃信号：Pushed 2026-06-28, 32 stars, broad apps/crates/docs/examples/infra tree, docs site badges, integrations and evals directories.
- 可运行性判断：Cargo workspace with Docker/infra/docs/examples/integrations and PostgreSQL-backed design; no local run or deploy audit was performed.
- 建议动作：Track closely; inspect quickstart next run and compare to Echo Agent/Proma/Holon durable work patterns.

### 4. [hirokawaguchi/open-genai](https://github.com/hirokawaguchi/open-genai) — Local Government AI/RAG Workspace — Score 82
- 做什么：Unofficial local deployment of Japan Digital Agency GENAI-style workspace with local LLM/OpenAI-compatible API, SAML/Keycloak, Qdrant RAG, Whisper, and image generation components.
- 面向谁：Public-sector or enterprise teams evaluating private, local-first AI knowledge workspace patterns.
- AI native 点：Combines chat/RAG/transcription/image generation into a self-hosted team knowledge product with identity and local model options.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-26, pushed 2026-06-27, 34 stars, docker-compose plus backend, web, rag, whisper, sd, and Keycloak modules.
- 可运行性判断：docker-compose.yml, .env.example, backend/genai-web/rag-app/whisper-app/sd-app folders; no container startup audit was performed.
- 建议动作：Use as reference architecture for local enterprise AI workspace; verify license/fork boundaries before reuse.

### 5. [toasterman234/ax-plane](https://github.com/toasterman234/ax-plane) — Agent Control Plane — Score 81
- 做什么：Local-first operations layer around @ax-llm/ax with run history, agent configs, approvals, eval suites, multi-step workflows, and a Next.js dashboard streaming events over SSE.
- 面向谁：Developers using Ax who need a supervised operations surface for local agent runs and eval iteration.
- AI native 点：Moves agent work from library calls into an operations product: approval gates, run events, eval lab, workflow history, and dashboard state.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-25, pushed 2026-06-26, monorepo with apps/packages/docs/scripts, docker-compose and mock mode described.
- 可运行性判断：pnpm workspace, docker-compose, .env.example, docs, launchd, screenshots in README; no local run audit was performed.
- 建议动作：Clone for a quick mock-mode trial; design pattern is relevant for Codex/Claude agent control surfaces.

### 6. [lucianodiisouza/semaphore](https://github.com/lucianodiisouza/semaphore) — Agent Status Desktop Utility — Score 79
- 做什么：Always-on-top traffic-light widget showing whether an AI coding agent is idle, thinking, or writing, driven by hooks and optional Stream Deck integration.
- 面向谁：Developers running long agent sessions who need peripheral awareness without constantly reading terminals.
- AI native 点：It productizes a small but real agent-ops need: visible state from coding-agent hooks, system tray UI, and hardware/status integrations.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-26, pushed 2026-06-27, 29 stars, Rust/Tauri/Vite structure, adapters, locales, onboarding/settings pages.
- 可运行性判断：Cargo/Tauri plus package.json, src-tauri, adapters, scripts, onboarding.html and settings.html; no desktop launch audit was performed.
- 建议动作：Try with Codex/Claude hooks; good candidate for lightweight internal agent-status experiment.

### 7. [EASYHOME-DOORVERSE/dw-mcp-ai-permission-center](https://github.com/EASYHOME-DOORVERSE/dw-mcp-ai-permission-center) — MCP Permission Governance — Score 78
- 做什么：Enterprise MCP permission center using RBAC, API keys/JWT, dynamic tool visibility, JDBC execution, and HTTP proxy tools for multi-user AI clients.
- 面向谁：Enterprise teams exposing internal databases/APIs as MCP tools to Cursor, Claude Desktop, or custom agents.
- AI native 点：Focuses on a core MCP production gap: tool visibility, data access control, key management, and user/role isolation for agent clients.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-26, pushed same day, bilingual README, Java multi-module API/server/UI structure and detailed feature list.
- 可运行性判断：Maven pom, server/api/ui modules, .env.example, README_EN, screenshots/docs implied; no Java build or UI run was performed.
- 建议动作：Watch and compare with MCP gateway/security projects; useful checklist for enterprise MCP permission design.

### 8. [catoncat/workspace-agent-relay-mcp](https://github.com/catoncat/workspace-agent-relay-mcp) — Workspace Agent Callback Dashboard — Score 77
- 做什么：Local MCP relay and dashboard for ChatGPT Workspace Agent callbacks, streaming plan, progress, tool calls, and results back to the user machine.
- 面向谁：Teams experimenting with fire-and-forget workspace agents that need live trace/progress visibility and local callback channels.
- AI native 点：Turns agent trigger callbacks into observable local workflow state through MCP tools and a dashboard.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-26, pushed 2026-06-27, includes dashboard screenshot, Python package, frontend, docs, scripts, tests.
- 可运行性判断：pyproject, src, frontend, assets, docs, tests and .env.example; no local dashboard run was performed.
- 建议动作：High relevance for Codex workspace-agent operations; prototype callback patterns if API access is available.

### 9. [orailnoor/private-agent](https://github.com/orailnoor/private-agent) — Android Automation Agent — Score 75
- 做什么：Flutter Android automation agent using DeepSeek API and Accessibility Services to read screen hierarchy and execute multi-step tasks from text, voice, or Telegram remote commands.
- 面向谁：Android automation builders and personal-agent experimenters who want natural-language control across installed apps.
- AI native 点：Agent loop reads UI tree, asks model for next action, executes native accessibility actions, and repeats until task completion.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-26, 10 stars/7 forks, full Flutter/Android app tree with assets, lib, pubspec, and architecture section.
- 可运行性判断：Flutter project with android/lib/assets and pubspec.lock; no APK build/device accessibility audit was performed.
- 建议动作：Watch for demo video and safety controls; try only on a spare Android profile if testing.

### 10. [therealm-tech/oas2mcp](https://github.com/therealm-tech/oas2mcp) — OpenAPI-to-MCP Tooling — Score 74
- 做什么：Rust service that loads an OpenAPI document from file or URL and exposes every operation as MCP tools.
- 面向谁：Developers turning existing HTTP APIs into agent-callable MCP servers without bespoke glue code.
- AI native 点：Converts conventional API surfaces into MCP-native tool surfaces, directly expanding what agents can safely call.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-25, pushed 2026-06-26, Rust project with Dockerfile, charts, examples, tests, and detailed README.
- 可运行性判断：Cargo project with Dockerfile, Helm charts, examples and tests; no cargo test or container run was performed.
- 建议动作：Add to MCP infrastructure watchlist; compare output schema and auth handling with mature OpenAPI MCP generators.

## Watchlist

- [uudam42/agent-memory-engine](https://github.com/uudam42/agent-memory-engine) — Coding Agent Memory MCP，Score 73。Local-first MCP memory engine for evidence-backed project knowledge, with Docker, examples, tests and bilingual docs. 建议：Watch because yesterday already covered similar memory projects; trial if memory workflow becomes priority.
- [event-catalog/agents](https://github.com/event-catalog/agents) — Architecture Documentation Agents，Score 72。EventCatalog-aware agents that review PRs and keep event-driven architecture docs current through GitHub Actions. 建议：Watch for production license/pricing and real PR examples.
- [Hotakus/opencode-subagent-magazine](https://github.com/Hotakus/opencode-subagent-magazine) — OpenCode Subagent Monitor，Score 71。OpenCode TUI plugin for real-time subagent monitoring in a sidebar with persistent data and bilingual UI. 建议：Watch; try if OpenCode is part of internal workflow.
- [1259665975/risk-ai-ragent](https://github.com/1259665975/risk-ai-ragent) — Vertical Agentic RAG，Score 70。Enterprise risk-control RAG knowledge base with document ingestion, retrieval, QA, management portal, Milvus/MySQL/Redis stack and Spring AI. 建议：Watch as vertical RAG implementation reference.
- [kasumiki/adjudge](https://github.com/kasumiki/adjudge) — AI Security Triage，Score 69。Security scanner output triage tool that dedupes, correlates, labels verification status, and can use AI-inferred judgments. 建议：Watch for adoption; evaluate as evidence-first security-agent pattern.
- [SparkyWen/qcue](https://github.com/SparkyWen/qcue) — Personal Knowledge AI App，Score 68。Rust/Flutter capture-first second-brain app using user-owned LLM keys to turn thoughts into a linked knowledge wiki. 建议：Watch for demo screenshots and sync/export story.

## Skip Reasons

- [winsznx/theeleven](https://github.com/winsznx/theeleven)：High launch stars but crypto/football-market hook product; AI agents appear more narrative than core user-facing AI workflow.
- [YuriCrystal/n8n-marketing-flows](https://github.com/YuriCrystal/n8n-marketing-flows)：Useful automation template collection, but mostly n8n workflow templates rather than a new runnable AI-native product surface.
- [MADEVAL/AngleCraft](https://github.com/MADEVAL/AngleCraft)：Looks like a reusable LLM skill/prompt methodology; lacks standalone UI/CLI/API product surface.
- [sums001/Deepseek-API](https://github.com/sums001/Deepseek-API)：Reverse-engineered API wrapper/access layer; excluded because it is mainly provider access plumbing with unclear compliance risk.
- [codertesla/ai-coding-deals](https://github.com/codertesla/ai-coding-deals)：Guide/list of AI coding deals, not a runnable AI product.
- [Micolaabdi/alibaba-cloud-farm](https://github.com/Micolaabdi/alibaba-cloud-farm)：Bulk account/API-key harvesting automation; excluded for abuse/compliance risk.
- [white-sand-grand/karpathy-claude-md](https://github.com/white-sand-grand/karpathy-claude-md)：Prompt/rules file repository; no product runtime.
- [0x7556/wolfshell](https://github.com/0x7556/wolfshell)：AI-assisted webshell/C2 security tooling; excluded due offensive security posture and not aligned with product radar intent.

## 今日趋势观察

New product-shaped AI repos cluster around local coding-agent desktops, agent control planes with approvals/evals, durable multi-channel agent runtimes, MCP permission/gateway infrastructure, and visible agent-run observability surfaces.

- 本轮最强信号是“本地优先 + 可审计”的 coding-agent 工具链：桌面代理、状态灯、回调 dashboard、trace tree、memory MCP 都在补 agent 工作流的操作面。
- MCP 方向从单个 connector 继续向企业治理演进：RBAC、OpenAPI 转工具、permission center、gateway、callback relay 都开始围绕权限、可见性、工具面收敛。
- 垂直产品仍有价值，但需要强运行入口；本轮保留了 open-genai、risk-ai-ragent、PrivateAgent，降权了模板库、prompt/skill 集合和 API access wrapper。
- 今日没有进行 clone、安装、Docker 启动或端到端运行，所有“可运行性”基于 README、根目录结构、配置文件、examples/tests/docker 信号判断。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 从“聊天窗口”继续外移到真实工作线程：OpenTag 把 GitHub/Slack mention 变成可审计、可审批、可回调的 agent run，是今天最强产品信号。
2. Coding-agent 的本地控制面正在分化：Remote Coder、Better Agent、Manage My Skills 分别覆盖远程操作、多 provider workspace 和技能资产管理。
3. Agent tool runtime 的安全层更具体了：NexusBox、Patchright Browser、DW MCP Permission Center 都在围绕执行隔离、浏览器 profile、RBAC 和工具可见性做产品化。
4. 记忆层从简单 session notes 走向可验证基础设施：memlawb 强调零知识同步，Agent Memory Engine 和 Graphenium 强调 evidence/provenance-backed project memory。
5. 垂直 AI app 仍然有更高复刻价值：Jobsmith 和 ParseHawk 都有明确用户场景、桌面/Web/CLI/API 路径和本地优先叙事，比泛 agent 框架更容易验证。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：试跑 OpenTag 的 GitHub-to-PR 示例，把一个 GitHub issue 路由给 Codex/Claude executor，验证 approval/callback/audit trail。
- 第二优先级：用 NexusBox 做一个 agent sandbox smoke test，确认 shell/file/browser MCP 工具是否真的限制在 workspace 内。
- 第三优先级：给 Jobsmith 建项目卡并拆解其多 agent 求职工作包流水线，作为垂直 AI workflow 参考。
- 安全跟踪：Patchright Browser、Remote Coder、memlawb 都涉及浏览器 profile、远程控制或持久私密记忆，进入实验前先审权限和密钥边界。

## 信息来源与假设

- GitHub Search API：`created:>=2026-06-24` 与 `pushed:>=2026-06-24` 的 agent/MCP/Codex/Claude/browser-agent/workflow/RAG 查询。
- README/root audit：短名单项目使用 GitHub API 读取 repo metadata、README 和 root contents。
- Score 是 AI Native Product Score，偏向可运行产品面、明确用户场景、README/文档完整度、近 24-72 小时新建或活跃、可复刻价值。
- 今天没有本地 runtime audit；所有“可运行性判断”均为 README/目录层判断，需后续 clone/install 验证。
- 类型级跳过原因：awesome/list、book/learning、prompt/rules、纯 skill collection、模型营销 wrapper、折扣信息站、论文/训练代码，即使增长高也不进入 Top。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-26

数据窗口：2026-06-24 10:28 to 2026-06-26 10:28 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub Search API recently created/pushed repositories plus README/root-content spot audit.

关键假设：Scores prioritize runnable product surface, concrete user scenario, README/docs/install completeness, recent push activity, and non-duplication with recent radar picks. Star counts are GitHub API observations and may include abnormal promotional spikes; no clone/install/runtime execution was performed.

## Top Projects

1. [openclaw/openclaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw) - Personal AI Assistant / Agent OS - Score 92
   - 做什么：Cross-platform personal AI assistant with app/workspace structure, Dockerfile, CLI/web surfaces, MCP references, and broad model/provider positioning.
   - 面向谁：Power users and teams wanting a local-first personal assistant spanning OS, apps, and agent workflows.
   - AI native 点：AI is the operating surface: assistant shell, agent actions, workspace memory/process docs, and MCP-capable integrations are core rather than add-ons.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub API shows 380k stars, 79k forks, created 2025-11-24 and pushed 2026-06-26; README and root contain AGENTS.md, Dockerfile, apps, CHANGELOG, VISION, SECURITY.
   - 可运行性判断：Root audit found Dockerfile, package manager config, apps directory, Quick Start/install mentions, CLI/web/MCP signals; no local run performed.
   - 建议动作：Prioritize a controlled local install audit and verify whether the very high star count maps to real community usage.

2. [Hmbown/CodeWhale](https://github.com/Hmbown/CodeWhale) - Terminal Coding Agent - Score 90
   - 做什么：Rust TUI/CLI coding agent for multiple model backends, aimed at reading/editing/running code locally with self-correction loops.
   - 面向谁：Developers who want an open-model-first terminal coding agent instead of a hosted IDE assistant.
   - AI native 点：The product loop is agentic coding: inspect project, edit files, run commands, check failures, and revise through a terminal UI.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub API shows 39k stars, 3.3k forks, created 2026-01-19 and pushed 2026-06-26; root has Cargo workspace, Dockerfile, assets, localized READMEs, CI and docs.
   - 可运行性判断：README/root expose Cargo/Rust, CLI, Docker, install, dashboard/screenshot and MCP/API signals; no build/run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：Compare with Codex/OpenCode baselines on one small repo task and score latency, edit quality, and failure recovery.

3. [multica-ai/multica](https://github.com/multica-ai/multica) - Managed Coding Agent Platform - Score 89
   - 做什么：Open-source platform for assigning work to coding agents, tracking progress, self-hosting, and composing agent skills.
   - 面向谁：Engineering teams trying to turn coding agents into managed teammates with task assignment and supervision.
   - AI native 点：Agent management, skill compounding, task progress, daemon/CLI, and self-hosting docs are product primitives.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub API shows 38k stars, 4.7k forks, created 2026-01-13 and pushed 2026-06-26; root contains CLI/daemon docs, self-hosting docs, Dockerfiles, apps, deploy.
   - 可运行性判断：Dockerfile/Dockerfile.web, Makefile, CLI install docs, self-hosting docs, apps/deploy directories; no runtime audit performed.
   - 建议动作：Add to long-term coding-agent control-plane watch and test self-hosting if docs look stable.

4. [yvgude/lean-ctx](https://github.com/yvgude/lean-ctx) - Agent Context Governance - Score 87
   - 做什么：Local Rust context intelligence layer that controls what agents can read, remember, touch, and prove they saved.

5. [agent-of-empires/agent-of-empires](https://github.com/agent-of-empires/agent-of-empires) - Multi-Agent Coding Workbench - Score 86
   - 做什么：Rust TUI/Web manager for multiple coding agents including Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Copilot CLI and others.

## 今日趋势观察

1. 编码 Agent 工具继续从单个 CLI 走向“多 Agent 指挥台”：Multica、Agent of Empires、Detent 都把任务分派、会话管理、验证门和 dashboard 作为产品面。
2. Agent 的上下文/权限/证据层正在独立成品类：LeanCTX、SBproxy、VERITAS OS 都在回答 agent 能看什么、能碰什么、如何留痕。
3. 终端 Agent 正在获得更多可视化和跨设备界面：Sideshow 给 agent 输出一个实时视觉面，Porterminal 把终端/MCP 控制延展到手机/网页。
4. RAG 正在被“知识编译/结构化 Wiki”替代部分场景：Synthadoc 代表从向量问答转向可读、可维护知识资产的路线。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先本地试跑 CodeWhale 或 Agent of Empires，用同一小型修复任务和 Codex/OpenCode 对比。
- 用 Sideshow 做一次 agent 输出可视化实验，验证是否能减少人工读日志成本。
- 把 LeanCTX/SBproxy/Pipelock 放在同一张治理层对照表里，拆分 context、network、policy、audit 四类边界。

## 数据观察窗口与信息来源

- GitHub Search API queries for created/pushed 2026-06-24..2026-06-26 across agent/LLM/MCP/RAG/workflow/browser/code/voice terms; GitHub repo metadata, README API, and root contents audit for shortlisted repositories.
- 已做实时仓库审计：是，使用 GitHub API 元数据、README API、根目录内容抽样。
- 未做：clone、install、Docker build、npm/pip/cargo/go build、浏览器或本地运行。

runs.sourceSummary: Live GitHub Search API queries plus GitHub repository metadata, README, and root-content audits for shortlisted repositories. No clone, install, Docker, npm, pip, Go, Cargo, Android, browser-extension, or local runtime audit was performed.
runs.trendObservations: Agent-native products are shifting toward media-generation runtimes for agents, security/control planes around agent egress and MCP, browser-native harnesses, local-first coding CLIs, self-hosted app-building workspaces, persistent memory MCP layers, and voice/mobile control surfaces for long-running coding agents.
runs.assumptions: Prioritized product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, clear users, README depth, examples/assets/Docker/CLI commands, and recent pushed activity. Star counts are GitHub API snapshots rather than precise time-series deltas. Mature baselines, pure templates, thin SDK/API wrappers, paper/training repos, prompt collections, and awesome lists were downgraded or skipped. # Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-25

数据窗口：2026-06-22T00:00:00Z 至 2026-06-25T02:20:00Z；重点查看 GitHub Search API 中 `pushed:>2026-06-22`、`created:>2026-06-01` 的 AI agent、LLM app、RAG、MCP、browser agent、code agent、voice agent、AI workflow 方向仓库，并对入选候选做 GitHub API 元数据、README 和根目录文件抽样。

关键假设：本轮做了实时 GitHub API/README/root-content 审计，但没有 clone、安装、Docker/npm/pip/go/cargo/Android/浏览器扩展构建或本地运行。Star 数是 API 快照，不是精确增量。优先保留真实产品形态、可运行 UI/CLI/API、明确用户场景和 demo/安装/截图/文档完整的仓库；成熟基线项目、纯模板集合、薄 MCP wrapper、论文/训练/awesome/prompt collection 继续降权。昨天已覆盖的 Orca、Deco Studio、Stardust、wmux、LocalMind、trvl、AzureAgentForge、callmux、skill-flow、bagidea-office 不重复进入 Top。

## Top Projects

### 1. heygen-com/hyperframes - Agent-native Video Rendering - Score 93
- GitHub: https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes
- 做什么：HTML-to-video rendering framework built so agents can write HTML, preview scenes, and render product-quality videos through a programmable stack.
- 面向谁：AI app builders, agent workflow builders, product/video teams that want agents to generate editable motion assets.
- AI native 点：The core abstraction is agent-readable HTML plus render pipeline, with `.claude-plugin`, `.codex-plugin`, examples, docs, and packages that make video generation a tool-using agent task.
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub API snapshot: 31,064 stars, 2,893 forks, 56 open issues, created 2026-03-10 and pushed 2026-06-25; root contains docs, examples, packages, assets, plugin directories, tests and package metadata.
- 可运行性判断：README exposes npm package, quickstart/showcase links, Node >=22 and docs; root has examples and package.json. No local render audit performed.
- 建议动作：High-priority trial: ask Codex/Claude to generate a short product explainer scene and inspect editability, render time, asset handling, and failure modes.

### 2. luckyPipewrench/pipelock - Agent Security / MCP Firewall - Score 90
- GitHub: https://github.com/luckyPipewrench/pipelock
- 做什么：Open-source agent firewall for mediated HTTP, MCP, A2A, and WebSocket traffic, focused on exfiltration, SSRF, prompt injection, and signed action receipts.
- 面向谁：Teams deploying agents with tool/network access who need auditability and policy enforcement outside the model loop.
- AI native 点：It treats agent egress as a governed runtime surface: mediator-signed receipts, MCP/A2A traffic scanning, deploy configs, charts, CLI/server code, and security workflows.
- 增长/活跃信号：729 stars, 86 forks, 2 open issues, pushed on 2026-06-25; repo includes Dockerfiles, charts, cmd, configs, deploy, bench, security policy and CI/security workflows.
- 可运行性判断：README has release badges, CNCF landscape signal, Docker/build infrastructure and deployment assets; no local proxy/firewall audit performed.
- 建议动作：Prototype around one MCP server plus one HTTP tool and verify whether receipts and prompt-injection/SSRF controls are usable in normal agent runs.

### 3. NotASithLord/peerd - Browser-native Agent Harness - Score 88
- GitHub: https://github.com/NotASithLord/peerd
- 做什么：Chrome/Firefox extension that runs the agent loop in the browser, drives tabs, spins up sandboxed compute, and shares built artifacts peer-to-peer with BYOK/no backend positioning.

### 4. QodeXcli/QodeX - Local-first Coding Agent CLI - Score 86

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent-native media 正在从“生成视频 API”变成“让 agent 编写、预览、渲染可编辑视频”的工程化工作流，HyperFrames 是今天最强信号。
2. Agent 安全与治理正在前移到 egress/MCP/A2A/WebSocket 层，Pipelock、beflow、Friday、ADHDev 都把审批、证据或策略做成运行时能力。
3. 浏览器正在成为本地 agent runtime：peerd、Patchright Browser、Molio、GitNexus 说明扩展、WebGPU、WebClipper、browser-side graph/RAG 都在产品化。
4. Coding-agent CLI/工作台仍在快速分化：QodeX 偏 local-first 模型和 guardrails，ADHDev 偏 session dashboard，WispTerm/cmux 偏终端控制面，AgentWire/PocketShell 偏移动与语音输入。
5. Agent memory 进入“证据、冲突、结构化图谱”竞争期：PMB、dense-mem、Graphenium、Myco Brain、IAI PME 关注点都从简单笔记转向 provenance、graph、SQLite/Postgres/Neo4j 和 MCP 工具化。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先试跑 HyperFrames：用 agent 生成 15-30 秒产品演示视频，记录 HTML 编辑性、渲染稳定性和模板复用方式。
- 用 Pipelock 做一个最小 MCP/HTTP egress 实验，确认 action receipt 是否能进入日常 agent 审计链。
- 试装 peerd 或 Patchright Browser，验证浏览器扩展/MCP 是否能支撑真实登录态任务。
- 用 PMB 跑一次 Codex 项目记忆实验，比较本地 SQLite MCP 与当前 Markdown memory 工作流的差异。
- 把 ADHDev/beflow 放进 coding-agent 运维候选，分别评估 session 控制面和 backlog-to-PR 策略门禁。

## 信息来源

- GitHub Search API：`AI agent MCP pushed:>2026-06-22 stars:>5`、`LLM app pushed:>2026-06-22 stars:>5`、`RAG agent pushed:>2026-06-22 stars:>5`、`browser agent pushed:>2026-06-22 stars:>5`、`code agent pushed:>2026-06-22 stars:>5`、`voice agent pushed:>2026-06-22 stars:>5`、`AI workflow pushed:>2026-06-22 stars:>5`、`MCP server pushed:>2026-06-22 stars:>5`、`AI assistant created:>2026-06-01 pushed:>2026-06-22 stars:>5`、`automation agent created:>2026-06-01 pushed:>2026-06-22 stars:>5`。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-24

数据窗口：2026-06-21T00:00:00Z 至 2026-06-24T02:20:00Z；重点查看 GitHub Search API 中 `pushed:>2026-06-21` 的 AI agent、LLM app、RAG、MCP、browser agent、code agent、voice agent、AI workflow 方向仓库，并对入选候选做 GitHub API 元数据、README 和根目录文件抽样。

关键假设：本轮做了实时 GitHub API/README/root-content 审计，但没有 clone、安装、Docker/npm/pip/go/cargo/Xcode/Android 构建或本地运行。Star 数是 API 快照，不是精确增量。优先保留真实产品形态、可运行 UI/CLI/API、明确用户场景和 demo/安装/截图/文档完整的仓库；成熟基线项目、纯模板集合、薄 MCP wrapper、论文/训练/awesome/prompt collection 继续降权。昨天已覆盖的 `jdilla1277/agentcad` 仅作为 Skip 记录，不重复进入 Top。

## Top Projects

### 1. stablyai/orca - Agentic Development Environment - Score 91

- 面向谁：同时运行多个 coding agent 的开发者和团队，尤其是希望移动端跟进、并行分支、统一审阅的 agent power user。
- AI native 点：产品核心不是单次聊天，而是多 agent fleet、worktree、终端 split、移动 companion 和统一状态追踪。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub API 显示 6,343 stars、466 forks、619 open issues，2026-06-24 继续 push；根目录含 Electron/Vite/mobile/native/tests/skills/previews。
- 可运行性判断：README 明确支持多 coding agent 并行、移动 companion、parallel worktrees 和 terminal splits；未做本地安装审计。
- 建议动作：高优先级试跑。重点看多 agent 输出归并、权限隔离、worktree 清理和移动端通知是否可靠。

### 2. decocms/studio - Agent Control Plane / MCP Ops - Score 90
- GitHub: https://github.com/decocms/studio

### 3. Tianzeyui/stardust - Desktop AI Agent Platform - Score 88

### 7. mrobinson2/AzureAgentForge - Deployable Multi-agent Platform - Score 83
- GitHub: https://github.com/mrobinson2/AzureAgentForge

## Watchlist

- [osaurus-ai/osaurus](https://github.com/osaurus-ai/osaurus) - macOS Agent Harness - Score 77：高星、Swift 原生、memory/autonomous execution/cryptographic identity 很强，但更像成熟活跃基线；等新 release 或可安装审计后再升级。
- [koltyakov/browser-bridge](https://github.com/koltyakov/browser-bridge) - Browser Extension + MCP - Score 75：Chrome Web Store、MCP、CLI skill、docs 完整；star 仍低，适合下轮浏览器实测。
- [phnx-labs/agents-cli](https://github.com/phnx-labs/agents-cli) - CLI Agent Toolchain - Score 74：npm 包、demo video、parallel teams、browser driving、Touch ID secrets；issues 多于 stars，先观察成熟度。
- [boshu2/agentops](https://github.com/boshu2/agentops) - Coding Agent Validation Layer - Score 74：验证、memory、feedback loops、本地 `.agents/` 证据链有价值；需试跑验证是否轻量。
- [nvk/agentnoise](https://github.com/nvk/agentnoise) - Phone Control Surface for Local Agents - Score 72：Rust-first 桌面 helper，用手机控制 Codex/Claude/White Noise；适合观察移动端 agent 控制面。
- [mcpmux/mcp-mux](https://github.com/mcpmux/mcp-mux) - MCP Gateway Desktop App - Score 72：桌面 MCP gateway，把多个客户端接入同一配置；和 callmux 同题，等待差异化验证。
- [racecraft-lab/Paddock](https://github.com/racecraft-lab/Paddock) - AI Software Factory Control Plane - Score 70：issue-driven workflows、isolated sandboxes、review/governance/artifacts，star 低但方向对。
- [dragfly/dictare](https://github.com/dragfly/dictare) - Local Voice Layer for Coding Agents - Score 69：本地 voice interaction/OpenVIP，安装脚本与 UI 目录存在；等 demo/兼容性更明确。

## Skip Reasons

- [jdilla1277/agentcad](https://github.com/jdilla1277/agentcad)：昨天已进入 Top 并创建项目卡；今天仍活跃，但本轮避免重复覆盖同一 CAD/MCP 主题。
- [langgenius/dify](https://github.com/langgenius/dify)：成熟 agent workflow 平台，活跃度高但不是本轮新发现；除非出现重大 release/增长信号，否则作为基线不重复。
- [infiniflow/ragflow](https://github.com/infiniflow/ragflow)：成熟 RAG/agent context layer，高活跃但非新产品信号；暂不重复。
- [promptfoo/promptfoo](https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo)：高质量 eval/red-team 工具，但已是成熟基线，本轮偏向更鲜明的 agent 产品形态。
- [Empreiteiro/langflow-templates](https://github.com/Empreiteiro/langflow-templates)：模板集合，缺少独立产品运行时。
- [justoneapi/justoneapi-mcp](https://github.com/justoneapi/justoneapi-mcp)：更像单 API 的 MCP wrapper，产品面和独立工作流不足。
- [ZclassiC23/zclassic](https://github.com/ZclassiC23/zclassic)：虽带 MCP server，但主体是加密货币 full node，偏离 AI-native product 主题。
- [NHID-Clinical/NHID-Clinical](https://github.com/NHID-Clinical/NHID-Clinical)：医疗 voice-agent conformance proposal 更偏规范/提案，缺少可运行产品面。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Coding agent 正在从“终端工具”进入“工作台/控制台/移动 companion”：Orca、wmux、agents-cli、agentnoise 都在围绕多 agent 并行、终端可视化、移动控制和会话持久化做产品。
2. MCP 进入运行时可靠性阶段：callmux、McpMux、Browser Bridge、trvl 说明关注点从“多一个 server”转向 gateway、hot reload、工具压缩、真实领域数据和跨客户端配置。
3. 桌面 agent 平台继续分化：Stardust 和 Osaurus 强调本地桌面 harness、插件、沙箱和记忆；BagIdea 走可视化 agent office，产品表达更强但需要验证真实任务深度。
4. 私有 research/RAG 轻应用仍有空间：LocalMind 把 search、doc ingestion、RAG memory 和 WebGPU 放进浏览器，说明“不部署后端的 AI workspace”仍是可实验方向。
5. 企业 agent 平台开始补治理/IaC：AzureAgentForge、Paddock、Deco Studio 都把治理、成本、审阅、artifact、部署路径写进 README，显示 demo 到生产的桥接需求在升温。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先试跑 Orca 或 wmux，验证多 agent 并行工作台是否真的降低上下文切换。
- 用 callmux 做一个小 MCP 重启实验：让 downstream MCP server 热重启，观察 Codex/Claude 会话是否保持。
- 把 Deco Studio 与 Stardust 作为两个 agent control plane 样本拆解，一个偏团队工具连接与成本观测，一个偏个人桌面插件/沙箱。
- 对 LocalMind 做浏览器侧 privacy/RAG 试用，记录 WebGPU、文档摄取、离线缓存和引用质量。
- 对 trvl 做一次真实旅行查询，评估垂直 MCP 是否比通用 web search agent 更稳定。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-23

数据窗口：2026-06-21T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-23T02:20:00Z; GitHub Search API for newly created/recently pushed AI repositories plus README/root-content spot checks.

信息来源：GitHub Search API repository metadata; GitHub repository README and root contents API spot checks for selected candidates. No clone/install/runtime execution was performed.

## Top Projects

### 1. [HKUDS/AgentSpace](https://github.com/HKUDS/AgentSpace) - Human-Agent Workspace - Score 90
- 做什么：A TypeScript workspace that positions humans and multiple coding agents as one shared team, with agent routing, app/packages split, deployment assets, and bilingual docs.
- 面向谁：Teams experimenting with Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes, or other coding agents that need a common operating surface.
- AI native 点：The product treats agents as workspace participants that can be routed, coordinated, and deployed inside a shared human-agent environment.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-22; 227 stars, 24 forks, 3 open issues by the 2026-06-23 API snapshot; pushed 2026-06-22; README advertises Claude Code/Codex/OpenClaw/Hermes support and Node/PostgreSQL requirements.
- 可运行性判断：Root includes .env.example, package.json, apps, packages, deploy, TypeScript config, README/README_ZH, and a packaged daemon tarball; no local install run was performed.
- 建议动作：Put on high-priority watch; run a small local workspace trial if setup docs are stable, especially around agent routing and persistence.

### 2. [Tencent/BrowserSkill](https://github.com/Tencent/BrowserSkill) - Browser Agent Control - Score 87
- 做什么：A Rust/TypeScript CLI plus browser extension that lets shell-capable agents borrow a user’s already logged-in browser tab without interrupting other browsing.
- 面向谁：Developers using Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, CodeBuddy, WorkBuddy or similar agents that need authenticated browser actions.
- AI native 点：It exposes a real browser session as an explicit, permissioned agent tool surface, including tab borrowing/returning rather than a separate automation sandbox.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-22; pushed 2026-06-22; modest 6-star early signal but from Tencent and with complete repo structure, bilingual docs, install script, Cargo/pnpm workspace, crates/apps/packages.
- 可运行性判断：Root includes Cargo.toml/lock, rust-toolchain, pnpm workspace, apps, crates, packages, docs, skill, install.sh, AGENT_INSTALL.md; no extension or CLI runtime audit performed.
- 建议动作：Experiment with one logged-in internal web workflow and compare safety/interruptibility against Playwright MCP or Chrome remote-debugging flows.

### 3. [begin0808/LiveCaption](https://github.com/begin0808/LiveCaption) - Local Voice / Subtitle Assistant - Score 84
- 做什么：A local offline browser-tab audio captioning and bilingual translation system using a Chrome extension, backend, SenseVoice, Ollama, and DeepSeek.
- 面向谁：Online learners, accessibility users, meeting watchers, language learners, and privacy-sensitive users who need live captions for browser media.
- AI native 点：ASR plus local LLM translation is the core user loop, turning tab audio into low-latency bilingual subtitles without cloud upload by default.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 50 stars, 14 forks by the 2026-06-23 API snapshot; pushed 2026-06-22; README has Chinese/English docs and live manual link.
- 可运行性判断：Root includes backend, extension, docs, README/README_EN; product architecture references Chrome tabCapture/offscreen document and local ASR/LLM backends; no local extension test performed.
- 建议动作：Run as a privacy-first caption workflow candidate; inspect latency, browser permission model, and local model setup friction.

### 4. [jdilla1277/agentcad](https://github.com/jdilla1277/agentcad) - Agent CAD Tool / MCP - Score 83
- 做什么：A local CAD CLI and MCP server that lets AI agents write CadQuery/build123d scripts, render previews, export STEP/STL/GLB/OBJ, validate geometry, diff models, and return structured JSON.
- 面向谁：Hardware/product designers and coding-agent users who want agents to produce inspectable 3D artifacts.
- AI native 点：It converts CAD execution, validation, rendering, metrics, and browser preview into tool calls suitable for agent loops.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-02; pushed 2026-06-22; 50 stars, 7 forks, 4 open issues; README includes Product Hunt badge, demo video, docs, CLI/MCP positioning.
- 可运行性判断：Python pyproject with src, scripts, tests, tests_b3d, GitHub workflow and README; no CAD dependency install or render run performed.
- 建议动作：Try with a simple mechanical part prompt and measure whether structured JSON plus preview is enough for agent self-correction.

### 5. [tstambulsky/auto-vlog-editor](https://github.com/tstambulsky/auto-vlog-editor) - Content Automation Agent - Score 82
- 做什么：An AI agent that turns daily phone clips into narrated, captioned vertical videos, sends drafts to Telegram for approval, then publishes to X and optionally LinkedIn.
- 面向谁：Solo creators and small content teams that want a review-gated daily vlog pipeline.
- AI native 点：The workflow chains multimodal clip understanding, story writing, cloned-voice narration, video rendering, human approval, and publishing into one agentic production loop.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; pushed 2026-06-22; 6 stars but unusually complete product evidence: Dockerfile, docker-compose, docs, prompts, tests, deploy folder, demo attachment in README.
- 可运行性判断：Root includes .env.example, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, requirements.txt, app, prompts, scripts, tests, pytest.ini; no Google Drive/Telegram/publisher integration run performed.
- 建议动作：Use as a replicable content-ops workflow reference; audit prompt chain and approval gate before connecting social accounts.

### 6. [Intuned/selector-forge](https://github.com/Intuned/selector-forge) - AI Browser Testing Tool - Score 80
- 做什么：A Chrome/Firefox extension that creates robust CSS/XPath selectors with AI and verifies generated selectors against the live DOM.
- 面向谁：QA engineers, scraper builders, browser-agent developers, and teams maintaining flaky E2E tests.
- AI native 点：AI proposes selectors while deterministic DOM re-verification filters brittle output before the user sees it.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-16; pushed 2026-06-22; 43 stars, 1 fork, 1 issue; README links Chrome Web Store and Firefox Add-ons, plus architecture and tests.
- 可运行性判断：TypeScript WXT extension project with package.json, e2e, tests, stories, Playwright/Vitest configs, assets, public, architecture doc; no extension install performed.
- 建议动作：Test on one dynamic internal app and compare selector stability against Playwright codegen and hand-written locators.

### 7. [getgantry/gantry](https://github.com/getgantry/gantry) - Agent-ready Developer Desktop App - Score 79
- 做什么：A native macOS Docker manager for local and SSH hosts with built-in MCP server and App Intents, exposing container operations to agents.
- 面向谁：Mac developers who want GUI monitoring plus agent/tool access to Docker and remote hosts.
- AI native 点：It embeds MCP and App Intents into a conventional developer utility so agents can operate infrastructure through the same local control surface.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-04; pushed 2026-06-22; 41 stars, 2 forks; README has release badge, CI, macOS 26+ target, assets, appcast, and security/contributing docs.
- 可运行性判断：SwiftUI/Xcode project with Gantry.xcodeproj, App, Packages, Tools, scripts, assets, appcast.xml; no macOS build/run audit performed.
- 建议动作：Watch for signed releases; test MCP operations against local Docker once macOS version compatibility is acceptable.

### 8. [madeye/ds-input](https://github.com/madeye/ds-input) - LLM Native Input Method - Score 78
- 做什么：A macOS/Windows whole-sentence pinyin input method where an OpenAI-compatible LLM converts toneless pinyin into inline Chinese without candidate picking.
- 面向谁：Chinese writers and developers willing to trade classic IME candidate selection for sentence-level LLM completion.
- AI native 点：The LLM is the input-method engine, choosing full-sentence Chinese output in the OS text pipeline rather than augmenting a separate writing app.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; pushed 2026-06-22; 31 stars, 1 fork, 1 issue; README explains Rime-style split, Rust C ABI core, macOS and Windows frontends.
- 可运行性判断：Root includes core, macos, windows, DESIGN.md, CLAUDE.md, README; README says core builds/tests and frontends have separate docs; no IME build/install performed.
- 建议动作：Track closely as an AI-native UX pattern; test only in a disposable profile until privacy and latency behavior are clear.

## Watchlist

- [ferdinandobons/CodeDebrief](https://github.com/ferdinandobons/CodeDebrief) - Coding Agent Context / MCP - Score 76：Local-first static analysis that creates deterministic, source-grounded workflow maps for coding agents via MCP. 建议：Try on one medium codebase and compare usefulness against tree-sitter symbol search.
- [norika1207-lab/Code-Duo](https://github.com/norika1207-lab/Code-Duo) - Dual Coding Agent UI - Score 74：A single-window UI for running Claude and Codex side-by-side, cross-reviewing work, monitoring cost, and detecting incomplete agent claims. 建议：Watch for real guardrail depth; test on a toy repo before trusting cost/watchdog claims.
- [Mocha-Yuan/MoChord](https://github.com/Mocha-Yuan/MoChord) - AI Music Practice Workspace - Score 73：AI-powered guitar workspace for chord voicings, tuner pitch detection, tabs/staff notation, playback, metronome practice, and progression generation. 建议：Good vertical AI-workbench example; verify desktop/mobile build maturity.
- [runapi-ai/mcp](https://github.com/runapi-ai/mcp) - Multimodal Model MCP - Score 72：MCP server for model discovery, pricing lookup, LLM chat, image/video/music/TTS task creation across 130+ hosted models. 建议：Watch for pricing/credential safety; useful for media-agent experiments.
- [Pls-1q43/VibeCast](https://github.com/Pls-1q43/VibeCast) - Mobile Voice Prompt Input - Score 71：Mobile-first remote prompt input system that mirrors phone voice text into desktop coding or writing apps. 建议：Watch for stable pairing and target-app automation.
- [7anX/AgentScan](https://github.com/7anX/AgentScan) - Agent Security Scanner - Score 70：Go CLI to discover exposed MCP servers, A2A Agent Cards and open LLM APIs with capability and auth-state output. 建议：Try in a controlled internal network; avoid scanning third-party hosts.

## Skip Reasons

- [FieldofStrawberries/claude-code-fable-5-free-app](https://github.com/FieldofStrawberries/claude-code-fable-5-free-app)：Description and topics are keyword-stuffed around nonexistent/ambiguous Claude/Fable/free-account claims; insufficient trust despite 83 stars.
- [openclaw/openclaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw)：GitHub API returned implausible 379k-star/79k-fork snapshot for a 2025 repository; excluded until verified by independent community/release evidence.
- [affaan-m/ECC](https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC)：Implausible high-star signal and broad agent-harness marketing language; previously flagged as needing API/community validation before promotion.
- [f/prompts.chat](https://github.com/f/prompts.chat)：Prompt/resource collection category, explicitly downgraded by the radar rules even though it is mature and active.
- [lilialla/awesome-legal-ai-zh](https://github.com/lilialla/awesome-legal-ai-zh)：Useful curated legal-AI map, but it is an awesome list/resource index rather than a runnable AI-native product.
- [Simpl3x3/ESEILANE](https://github.com/Simpl3x3/ESEILANE)：Potentially interesting GraphRAG database, but the current README/root read more like infrastructure/database launch than a user-facing AI product; keep as low-priority watch, not Top.

## 今日趋势观察

Fresh productized AI repositories are clustering around human-agent workspaces, real-browser control with login-state reuse, agent-ready local developer tools, and vertical AI workbenches. MCP is increasingly bundled inside end-user tools rather than shipped only as a standalone connector.

## 类型级降权说明

今天继续降权纯 prompt/resource collection、论文/训练代码、模型权重/量化包、单一 SDK wrapper、只有 README 或营销文案没有可运行路径的仓库，以及 star/fork 信号明显异常但缺少独立验证的仓库。这些作为筛选假设记录，不伪造成 skipped_projects。

## 关键假设

Prioritized repositories created or materially pushed in the last 24-72 hours with runnable UI/CLI/API, extension, desktop app, Docker, package, or documented quickstart evidence. Star counts are GitHub API snapshots, not verified time-series deltas. Repeated picks from 2026-06-22 were generally excluded unless useful as skip/watch context. Keyword-stuffed or implausibly inflated repositories were excluded from Top ranking.

## 实时仓库审计说明

已做 GitHub Search API 元数据抓取，并对 Top/Watchlist 候选做 GitHub README 与根目录 API 抽查；未 clone、未安装依赖、未运行 Docker/npm/pip/go/cargo/Xcode，也未验证 demo 服务。
