runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-22

数据窗口：2026-06-19T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-22T02:18:00Z; GitHub Search API for newly created or recently pushed AI repositories, plus README/root-content spot checks.

信息来源：GitHub Search API repository metadata; GitHub repository, README, and root contents API spot checks for selected candidates. No clone/install/runtime execution was performed.

## Top Projects

### 1. [umacloud/umadev](https://github.com/umacloud/umadev) - Coding Agent Governance - Score 88
- 做什么：A Rust project-director agent that wraps Claude Code, Codex, or OpenCode in a nine-stage governed delivery pipeline from requirement to quality gate and package.
- 面向谁：Teams using AI coding CLIs who need repeatable delivery process, artifacts, and governance around agent-written code.
- AI native 点：The product treats the coding agent as an execution substrate and adds process memory, stages, host specs, quality gates, and delivery artifacts around it.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 75 stars and 29 forks by the 2026-06-22 API snapshot; pushed 2026-06-22; README has multilingual docs, command references, specs, tests, npm folder, and website assets.
- 可运行性判断：Rust workspace with Cargo files, npm package directory, tests, specs, docs, .env example, and quick-experience instructions; not locally run in this audit.
- 建议动作：Try on a small Codex/Claude Code repo and evaluate whether the stage model produces useful PRD/architecture/QA artifacts without slowing iteration.

### 2. [Forward-Future/DeployBot](https://github.com/Forward-Future/DeployBot) - Agent Merge Queue / DevOps - Score 86
- 做什么：Provider-neutral GitHub merge queue for coding agents where Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, or MCP clients prepare PRs while humans keep final deploy authority.
- 面向谁：Engineering teams letting multiple AI coding agents prepare changes against the same repository.
- AI native 点：It converts agent output into authenticated GitHub labels/comments, reviewed heads, freeze windows, integration PRs, and failure pauses.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-20; 38 stars, 1 fork, 15 open issues; pushed 2026-06-22; README includes pip install, init policy, action.yml, examples, docs, tests, and MCP adapter references.
- 可运行性判断：Python package with pyproject, GitHub Action, examples, tests, policy template, and documented pip install from a pinned commit; not locally installed.
- 建议动作：Prototype on a low-risk repo where two agents open concurrent PRs; inspect policy ergonomics and failure rollback behavior.

### 3. [Francis1998/nexus-llm-router](https://github.com/Francis1998/nexus-llm-router) - LLM Gateway / Routing - Score 84
- 做什么：OpenAI-compatible multi-LLM routing middleware with task-aware model selection, cost optimization, fallback safety, and production controls.
- 面向谁：AI infrastructure engineers running multiple LLM providers behind one application API.
- AI native 点：Routing, fallback, cost policy, audit rationale, dashboards, and safety controls become first-class runtime behavior for LLM apps.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 32 stars; pushed 2026-06-22; README shows tests passing badge and use-case GIF; root includes Dockerfile, docker-compose, deploy, migrations, dashboards, safety/security docs, tests.
- 可运行性判断：Python 3.11+ project with pyproject, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, Makefile, QUICKSTART, CONFIGURATION, SAFETY, dashboards, and tests; no live API run performed.
- 建议动作：Run docker-compose with two cheap providers or mocked endpoints; compare routing logs and fallback behavior against an existing LiteLLM/OpenRouter setup.

### 4. [HMDSimDev/heartmorrow](https://github.com/HMDSimDev/heartmorrow) - Local LLM Game / Consumer App - Score 83
- 做什么：Local-first LLM dating and world simulator with browser UI, local server, in-game phone, dates, gifts, minigames, calendar, saves, and OpenAI-compatible local model endpoints.
- 面向谁：Indie AI game builders and local-LLM users exploring persistent character simulation.
- AI native 点：The core gameplay loop is streamed in-character dialogue and relationship/world-state evolution driven by a local LLM endpoint.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-20; 53 stars and 4 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README includes screenshots, run scripts, no-model fallback, local privacy positioning, and monorepo apps/packages.
- 可运行性判断：TypeScript pnpm workspace with apps, packages, docs, run.sh/run.bat, .env example, package.json, and local server architecture; no local run audit.
- 建议动作：Run with an Ollama or LM Studio OpenAI-compatible endpoint and study save-state schema plus character/world prompt architecture.

### 5. [tianjiangqiji/nova-image-studio](https://github.com/tianjiangqiji/nova-image-studio) - AI Image Workbench - Score 82
- 做什么：Self-hosted AI image-generation workbench with custom models, multi-mode UI, PWA, real-time task backend, agent/workbench modes, canvas, prompt reverse, prompt gallery, and GIF generation.
- 面向谁：Creators or small teams wanting a configurable image-generation studio rather than a single hosted model UI.
- AI native 点：It packages provider/model routing, task queueing, image workflows, prompt operations, and responsive UI into a product-shaped studio.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 46 stars and 12 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README is detailed in Chinese; root has frontend, backend, scripts, package files, and docs.
- 可运行性判断：Next.js/React frontend plus lightweight Node backend with SQLite/WebSocket per README; package.json, backend, frontend, scripts present; not locally started.
- 建议动作：Compare against ComfyUI/Invoke-like workflows for lightweight hosted image ops; test PWA export and backend queue behavior.

### 6. [ParendumOU/Nexora](https://github.com/ParendumOU/Nexora) - Self-hosted Multi-agent Workspace - Score 81
- 做什么：MIT self-hosted multi-tenant AI-agent orchestration platform with personas, skills/tools, delegation, RAG, semantic memory, marketplace, provider routing, FastAPI backend and Next.js frontend.
- 面向谁：Builders who want a self-hosted agent workspace with chat, tools, memory, and provider choice.
- AI native 点：The workspace model centers on configurable agents that chat, call tools, delegate to sub-agents, use RAG/memory, and stream results across many providers.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 14 stars; pushed 2026-06-21; companion mobile app also launched; README/root show docker-compose, backend/frontend, nginx, setup, Makefile, security docs.
- 可运行性判断：Docker Compose files for full/dev/data stacks, .env example, backend/frontend directories, Makefile and SETUP.md; no local deployment audit.
- 建议动作：Keep on watch and run once if docs remain coherent; evaluate if it has real marketplace/tool depth beyond scaffold breadth.

### 7. [tsouth89/conduit](https://github.com/tsouth89/conduit) - MCP Gateway / Desktop Manager - Score 78
- 做什么：Local MCP gateway and manager that lets users configure MCP servers once and expose them across Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Codex and other AI tools, with OS keychain storage.
- 面向谁：Developers juggling many MCP servers across multiple AI coding tools.
- AI native 点：It productizes MCP server management into a local desktop gateway with activity, playground, screenshots/demo, and cross-client connection model.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 6 stars, 2 forks, 7 open issues; pushed 2026-06-22; README has demo GIF/screenshots; root has Tauri Rust app, Vite/React frontend, docs, scripts.
- 可运行性判断：Tauri/Vite project with src-tauri, package.json, docs, screenshots and demo; early traction but strong product surface; no local desktop build.
- 建议动作：Watch closely; test once releases or install docs stabilize because MCP management pain is recurring across this radar.

### 8. [dondai1234/agent-browser](https://github.com/dondai1234/agent-browser) - Browser Automation MCP - Score 76
- 做什么：Token-efficient browser automation MCP server implemented as one Go binary over chromedp, emphasizing delta snapshots and no Playwright/Node dependency.
- 面向谁：Agent builders who need browser control with lower dependency and token overhead.
- AI native 点：The browser is exposed as an MCP-native tool surface tuned for agent observation/action loops, snapshots, stealth, and command efficiency.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 10 stars, 2 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README has hero/flow assets and MCP positioning; root includes cmd, internal, examples, docs, Go module and CI.
- 可运行性判断：Go module with cmd/internal/examples/docs and CI badge; no binary build or browser session test performed.
- 建议动作：Benchmark against Playwright MCP on observation token size, page-delta quality, and failure recovery on a few dynamic websites.

## Watchlist

- [AtharvaMaik/donecheck](https://github.com/AtharvaMaik/donecheck) - Agent Verification CLI - Score 73：Proof-of-done gate that runs verification commands and writes DONECHECK receipts for AI coding work. 建议：Try as a cheap guardrail in one automation repo.
- [artickc/kiro-telegram-bot](https://github.com/artickc/kiro-telegram-bot) - Mobile Coding Agent Control - Score 72：Telegram bridge for controlling Kiro CLI over Agent Client Protocol with live sessions and queued follow-ups. 建议：Watch ACP adoption and test only if Kiro CLI is part of the workflow.
- [pranjalbhatia710/descartes-mcp](https://github.com/pranjalbhatia710/descartes-mcp) - Planning Critique MCP - Score 71：MCP server that recursively questions plan decisions and grounds them in evidence or user input. 建议：Evaluate as a pre-flight planning tool; avoid overfitting until real workflow examples appear.
- [albertofettucini/Engram](https://github.com/albertofettucini/Engram) - Local AI Memory MCP - Score 70：Native macOS local-first shared memory layer for AI assistants via MCP. 建议：Watch for signed release UX and import/export reliability.
- [TerryCM/vibegroup](https://github.com/TerryCM/vibegroup) - Agent Coordination MCP - Score 69：End-to-end encrypted channel for Claude Code sessions to communicate across repos, machines and networks. 建议：Watch for practical multi-agent case studies before adopting.
- [elghaied/payload-eve-chat](https://github.com/elghaied/payload-eve-chat) - CMS-native AI Agent Starter - Score 68：Payload CMS admin chat agent using Eve, Vercel AI SDK/Gateway, MCP tools, optional voice, Docker and tests. 建议：Good starter for content ops demos; verify dependency on hosted Vercel services.

## Skip Reasons

- [renatogroffe/observabilidade-foundry-build-localhost-sp-2026](https://github.com/renatogroffe/observabilidade-foundry-build-localhost-sp-2026)：Presentation/slides repository around Microsoft Foundry observability; useful content but not a runnable product surface.
- [charlie12345/ROCmFPX](https://github.com/charlie12345/ROCmFPX)：Hardware/quantization-focused code with unclear product workflow for AI-native applications.
- [w512/AI-Vault](https://github.com/w512/AI-Vault)：Curated resource vault; explicitly valuable as learning material but excluded by prompt-collection/resource-list rule.
- [Xiaochengzi2048/find-a-book-mcp](https://github.com/Xiaochengzi2048/find-a-book-mcp)：Narrow MCP for Library Genesis search/download; legal/compliance ambiguity and limited product surface for this radar.
- [dikurdikur/palmier-pro-windows](https://github.com/dikurdikur/palmier-pro-windows)：Description/topics look keyword-stuffed and inconsistent; insufficient trust signal despite high star count.
- [scottstts/Threejs-Awesome-Graphics-Agent-Skills](https://github.com/scottstts/Threejs-Awesome-Graphics-Agent-Skills)：Agent skill collection for graphics prompts/workflows; closer to skill/prompt assets than a runnable AI product.

## 今日趋势观察

Coding-agent products are moving toward governed delivery pipelines, merge queues, mobile/chat control channels, and proof receipts; MCP is shifting from standalone connectors toward local gateways, browser-control surfaces, shared memory, and security/policy proxies; self-hosted AI workbenches are packaging UI plus lightweight backend and provider routing.

## 类型级降权说明

今天继续降权纯资源清单、论文/训练代码、模型量化包、只有 README 的概念仓库、单一 SDK wrapper、明显关键词堆砌仓库，以及没有安装/运行/示例路径的早期 MCP 小工具。这些只作为筛选假设写入，不伪造成 skipped_projects。

## 关键假设

Prioritized repositories created or pushed in the last 24-72 hours with runnable UI/CLI/API evidence, README depth, examples/assets/Docker/CLI commands, and clear user workflow. Star counts are GitHub API snapshots, not time-series deltas. Repeated mature baselines from previous runs were excluded unless there was a fresh launch signal. Type-level exclusions are described in the report and not fabricated as skipped repositories.

已做 GitHub Search API 元数据抓取，并对 Top/Watchlist 候选做 GitHub README 与根目录 API 抽查；未 clone、未安装依赖、未运行 Docker/npm/pip/go/cargo，也未验证 demo 服务。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-20

## Top 8 项目

### 1. [ksimback/looper](https://github.com/ksimback/looper) - Coding Agent Control Plane - Score 88

- 做什么：Visual planner for designing review-gated Claude Code/Codex agent loops before execution.

### 2. [abluva-research/mcp-trust-plane](https://github.com/abluva-research/mcp-trust-plane) - MCP Security / Policy Plane - Score 87

- 做什么：Pluggable filter framework for MCP traffic that can allow, block, redact, modify, or truncate tool calls.
- 面向谁：Teams exposing sensitive data/tools through MCP who need guardrails without rewriting upstream servers.

- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-18; 54 stars, 10 forks; pushed 2026-06-19; README includes quickstart, Docker, npm/API/CLI cues.
- 可运行性判断：README indicates Docker/quickstart/demo/API paths; no live gateway run performed.

### 3. [spronta/crawlie](https://github.com/spronta/crawlie) - Agent-Ready SEO/GEO Crawler - Score 84

- 做什么：Local technical SEO and generative-engine optimization crawler with CLI and MCP server surfaces.

- AI native 点：Turns crawler findings into agent-consumable checks and exposes an MCP server, making website audits callable from assistants.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-18; 27 stars, 2 forks; pushed 2026-06-19; README advertises npm package, CLI, MCP server, setup docs and CI.
- 可运行性判断：npm/CLI/MCP setup documented; no crawl was executed locally.
- 建议动作：Run on one controlled site and evaluate whether the MCP output is usable for automated remediation.

### 4. [joeseesun/qiaomu-llm-mcp](https://github.com/joeseesun/qiaomu-llm-mcp) - Local LLM Provider Gateway - Score 82

- 做什么：Local MCP gateway for multi-provider LLM routing, secrets, and multi-model discussion workflows.

- AI native 点：Makes model choice, key storage, multi-model comparison, and HeavySkill-style discussion callable as one MCP tool surface.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 36 stars, 1 fork; README describes local-first registry, macOS Keychain, provider routing and MCP client usage.
- 可运行性判断：Python/pip/MCP/CLI examples present; no keychain or provider call was tested.
- 建议动作：Watch closely; useful experiment for local model routing and secret-handling patterns.

### 5. [ByteAsk/ByteAsk-Embedded-MCP](https://github.com/ByteAsk/ByteAsk-Embedded-MCP) - Domain RAG MCP - Score 80

- 做什么：Source-grounded, page-cited retrieval MCP server for embedded and firmware reference docs.

- 可运行性判断：Python 3.10+/uv and MCP setup documented; no hosted endpoint or local server run tested.

### 6. [browser-use/browser-agent-template](https://github.com/browser-use/browser-agent-template) - Browser Agent App Template - Score 78

- 做什么：Fork-and-deploy Vercel template for a web-browsing agent backed by Browser Use cloud browser.

- 可运行性判断：Vercel deployment path and npm-style app cues are present; no deployment performed.
- 建议动作：Use as a reference scaffold for browser-agent UX and deployment ergonomics.

### 7. [Gentleman-Programming/tmux-agent-state](https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/tmux-agent-state) - Agent Runtime Observability - Score 76

- 做什么：tmux tab-bar status indicator that shows whether coding agents are working, blocked, idle, or need attention.

- 建议动作：Prototype with concurrent local coding-agent sessions; small but practical workflow value.

### 8. [ponikar/phone-for-ai-agent](https://github.com/ponikar/phone-for-ai-agent) - Device Control Agent Runtime - Score 74

- 做什么：Android app plus Node.js server that lets an AI agent control a phone through accessibility/WebSocket commands.
- 面向谁：Agent researchers and automation builders needing a real mobile-device action surface.
- AI native 点：Gives an agent a phone-like actuator layer: tap, swipe, navigate, read UI, and operate apps through Android accessibility APIs.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-18; 18 stars, 2 forks; README clearly describes architecture, network warning, Android app and Node server.
- 可运行性判断：Native Android plus Node server path documented; high safety risk and no device run performed.
- 建议动作：Track as a risky but important mobile-agent control surface; audit permissions before any hands-on test.

## Watchlist

- [cloudflare/security-audit-skill](https://github.com/cloudflare/security-audit-skill) (Coding Agent Security Skill, Score 73)：Agent skill for multi-phase security audits with machine-readable findings and independent verification. 活跃信号：Created 2026-06-18; 50 stars; Cloudflare provenance; README is strong but product surface is a skill rather than standalone app. 建议：Watch and borrow the six-phase audit structure for internal agent QA.
- [Hanyuyuan6/remote-gpu-trainer](https://github.com/Hanyuyuan6/remote-gpu-trainer) (Agent Skill / Remote Training Ops, Score 72)：Agent skill for deploying, monitoring, and tearing down long GPU jobs across rented infrastructure. 活跃信号：Created 2026-06-18; 38 stars, 6 forks; README lists platform profiles and verification status. 建议：Watch for production proof and safety controls around teardown/cost limits.
- [MikkoParkkola/trvl](https://github.com/MikkoParkkola/trvl) (Vertical MCP Travel Agent, Score 72)：Go CLI/MCP travel agent for Google Flights and Hotels with trip optimization tools. 活跃信号：Older repo, but pushed 2026-06-20; 40 stars, 5 forks; README has releases, CI, Go install, MCP, examples. 建议：Watch for reliability and legal/API stability; evaluate as vertical-agent case study.
- [jaswanthsurya007-source/recall-mcp](https://github.com/jaswanthsurya007-source/recall-mcp) (Local Knowledge RAG MCP, Score 70)：Local private knowledge-base MCP server with semantic search for notes/documents. 活跃信号：Created 2026-06-18; 8 stars; README has quickstart, screenshots, demo and CI. 建议：Watch until more adoption or differentiated memory features appear.
- [allen-hsu/hush](https://github.com/allen-hsu/hush) (Agent-Safe Secrets, Score 69)：Local per-worktree secret injector for keeping .env values out of agent-visible repositories. 活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 7 stars; README includes demo and concrete `hush run` workflow. 建议：Keep in safety watchlist; compare with existing secret-management flows.

## Skip Reasons

- [abdokhalil5555/AgenticDeFi-Trainer](https://github.com/abdokhalil5555/AgenticDeFi-Trainer)：Many near-identical forks appeared in search results; high marketing/crypto-agent claims, weak evidence of unique runnable product maturity in this pass.
- [MADEVAL/MindFluence](https://github.com/MADEVAL/MindFluence)：Prompt-skill/copywriting playbook shape; useful content artifact but outside product-shaped AI app/agent priority.
- [zyn26/minimax-m3-desktop-app-free-api](https://github.com/zyn26/minimax-m3-desktop-app-free-api)：Model/free-API desktop app claim looked too marketing/SEO-heavy from metadata; not enough trustworthy README/runtime evidence promoted today.
- [preangelleo/workflow-design-bible](https://github.com/preangelleo/workflow-design-bible)：Meta prompt/constitution generator and skill-style artifact; lower than runnable UI/CLI/API products for this radar.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Coding-agent 周边正在从“启动一个 agent”转向“管理一组 agent loop”：可视化 loop、review gate、tmux 状态、审计 skill 都在解决人机协作控制问题。
2. MCP 的新机会更偏安全、网关和领域工具面：trust plane、LLM provider gateway、embedded-doc RAG、travel MCP 都把工具调用治理或垂直数据接入做成产品。
3. Mobile/device control surface 开始出现更直接的 agent actuator，价值高但安全边界更敏感，需要先审权限、网络暴露和可回滚机制。

## 数据观察窗口和关键假设

- 数据窗口：2026-06-18T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-20T07:10:33Z; GitHub Search API queries for newly created and recently pushed AI/agent/MCP/RAG repositories, plus README/root metadata spot checks.
- 信息来源：GitHub Search API repository metadata; GitHub repository README API spot checks for selected candidates; local SQLite history for dedupe against 2026-06-16..2026-06-19 picks.
- 关键假设：Scores prioritize product-shaped repos with runnable CLI/UI/API/MCP surfaces, recent creation/update signals, README install/use guidance, and clear user scenario. This run did not clone, install, run Docker, execute tests, or verify demos locally; stars/forks are GitHub API point-in-time signals, not confirmed velocity deltas.
- 是否做过实时仓库审计：做过 GitHub API 元数据和 README API 抽查；未做 clone/install/Docker/npm/pytest/本地运行审计。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-19

## 数据观察窗口

- 窗口：2026-06-16 00:00 UTC 至 2026-06-19 05:55 UTC，重点看新创建仓库、近 24-72 小时更新和明显增长的 AI agent / MCP / RAG / workflow / coding-agent 项目。
- 信息来源：GitHub Search API 首次返回结果、GitHub 仓库页面、README/根目录页面抽样审计。
- 实时仓库审计：已做在线元数据与页面审计；未 clone、未安装依赖、未运行 Docker/CLI/UI。
- 网络说明：当前 shell 默认代理 127.0.0.1:7890 不可用，后续 GitHub API 单仓库补查失败；本报告保守使用已成功抓取的 GitHub API 批量结果和可打开的 GitHub 页面证据。

## Top Projects

### 1. [aresyn/codex-control-plane-mcp](https://github.com/aresyn/codex-control-plane-mcp)

- 分类：Codex/MCP control plane
- AI Native Product Score：90
- 做什么：为 Codex Desktop 长任务提供 durable async MCP 控制面，支持 operation/workflow 状态、Plan Mode、审批、恢复、诊断和本地 SQLite 历史。
- 面向谁：需要把 Codex Desktop 纳入自动化编排、长任务队列或内部 agent ops 的工程团队。
- AI native 点：把单次 Codex 会话抽象成可轮询、可恢复、可去重、可审批的 agent operation/workflow，是 agent orchestration 的基础设施层。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-17 创建；首次 GitHub API 返回约 201 stars、2 forks、7 issues，2026-06-18 push；页面显示 PyPI、CI、docs、examples、tests、app-server/SQLite/diagnostics 设计。
- 可运行性判断：README 提供 pipx/uvx/pip install、MCP client config、admin init、hook install、pytest，本轮未本地安装运行。
- 建议动作：优先试用：用一个长 Codex 任务验证 operationId 轮询、Plan Mode 审批和重试去重。

### 2. [Plaer1/junction](https://github.com/Plaer1/junction)

- 分类：Local coding-agent IDE sidebar
- AI Native Product Score：88
- 做什么：VS Code chat sidebar for local AI coding agents，把本地 coding agent 以 IDE 侧边栏方式接入。
- 面向谁：使用本地 coding agents 且希望留在 VS Code 内操作的开发者。
- AI native 点：把 agent 会话从终端迁到 IDE 控制面，强调本地 agent、代码上下文、可视化交互与持续会话。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-17 创建；首次 GitHub API 返回约 510 stars、6 forks，2026-06-17 push，2026-06-19 updated；昨天已入选但仍是窗口内最强产品信号。
- 可运行性判断：TypeScript 项目，页面元数据指向 VS Code chat sidebar；本轮未 clone/安装，需补 VSIX 或 extension dev host 实测。
- 建议动作：继续跟踪但避免重复投入；若要试验，重点看 OpenCode/Codex/Claude 等本地 agent 桥接深度。

### 3. [luckeyfaraday/athena-loops](https://github.com/luckeyfaraday/athena-loops)

- 分类：Agent orchestration loop / MCP + CLI
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：后端无关的 Python agent 编排循环，围绕 orchestrator -> worker -> reviewer 模式驱动 Claude、Codex、opencode、aider 等后端。
- 面向谁：需要把多个 LLM/coding-agent 后端放入可重复执行 loop 的个人开发者和 agent 平台团队。
- AI native 点：把 agent 执行过程显式拆成 orchestrator/worker/reviewer，并同时提供 MCP server 与 CLI，适合做自动化流程的控制骨架。
- 增长/活跃信号：首次 GitHub API 输出显示 2026-06-17 创建，仓库描述明确包含 MCP server + CLI；星标较低但主题与产品形态集中。
- 可运行性判断：Python 项目；由于后续 API/README 请求受代理影响，本轮只做页面/元数据审计，未安装运行。
- 建议动作：加入复刻候选：用一个小型代码审查任务测试 loop 是否能稳定产出 review 与修复建议。

### 4. [KongFangXun/sofagent](https://github.com/KongFangXun/sofagent)

- 分类：Agent governance skill layer
- AI Native Product Score：80
- 做什么：为 AI Agent 增加纪律层、复杂任务拆解、loop 检查和反思沉淀，面向 OpenClaw、Codex、Claude Code、Hermes 等平台。
- 面向谁：高频使用 coding/research agents、希望降低跑偏和重复错误的个人或团队。
- AI native 点：把 agent 使用经验产品化成可安装 skill + scripts + constitution + reflection memory，强调治理、边界、闭环与平台适配。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-18 创建；GitHub 页面显示 17 commits、6 stars、docs/images/sofagent/scripts、Handbook/Developer/Design/Evidence/Testing 等完整文档。
- 可运行性判断：README 给出 git clone、bash install.sh --platform codex、verify.sh smoke test、首次任务流程；本轮未执行安装。
- 建议动作：适合做低成本实验：在隔离 Codex profile 中安装，观察是否提升复杂任务收口质量。

### 5. [MacWulf/adaptive-zero-token-router](https://github.com/MacWulf/adaptive-zero-token-router)

- 分类：Local intent router / model routing
- AI Native Product Score：76
- 做什么：本地 zero-token intent routing，用于 chat、tooling、coding、planning prompt 的轻量分类与路由。
- 面向谁：想在调用大模型前做本地 prompt 路由、工具选择或多模型分流的 agent/app builders。
- AI native 点：把是否需要模型、需要哪个模型/工具前移到本地路由层，可降低成本并改善 agent tool selection。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-17 创建；首次 GitHub API 返回 6 stars、1 fork，TypeScript，topics 包含 intent-classification、model-routing、offline-first、local-first、zero-token。
- 可运行性判断：仓库体量很小，证据显示 TypeScript 项目；本轮未看到足够 demo/bench，需补实际准确率和 API 形态审计。
- 建议动作：Watchlist-plus：先看是否补 benchmark 和集成示例，再决定是否纳入路由实验。

### 6. [ColCh/paperless-ngx-skill](https://github.com/ColCh/paperless-ngx-skill)

- 分类：Vertical agent skill / document ops
- AI Native Product Score：72
- 做什么：面向 Paperless-NGX REST API 的可复用 CLI + agent skill，用 openapi-to-cli 和 urllib helpers 管理文档上传与字段更新。
- 面向谁：自建 Paperless-NGX、希望让 agent 管理票据/文档归档流程的个人和小团队。
- AI native 点：把垂直 SaaS/自托管系统包装成 agent 可调用 skill，与通用 MCP connector 相比更贴近日常工作流。
- 增长/活跃信号：2026-06-17 创建；首次 GitHub API 返回 6 stars、1 fork，Python，描述明确提到 env-driven、multipart upload、array-field PATCH。
- 可运行性判断：应具备 CLI/skill 入口，但本轮未获取完整 README；需验证环境变量、认证和上传流程。
- 建议动作：保留观察；如后续补 demo，可作为 agent 管个人文档库的垂直样板。

## Watchlist

- [Keljian/JSE](https://github.com/Keljian/JSE) - Local-first job-search automation - Score 70：本地优先求职自动化/ATS/RAG/selenium desktop app，昨天已入选，今天继续 active push。 建议：等待 demo/安装体验补强后再复审。
- [leonardochalhoub/vozes-das-escrituras](https://github.com/leonardochalhoub/vozes-das-escrituras) - Vertical AI knowledge/voice assistant - Score 68：葡语 scripture/bible knowledge-base + LLM/AI agents 项目，垂直场景清楚但产品证据较早期。 建议：只观察场景，不进入 Top 复刻。
- [nnecrkvenuOX/formcms](https://github.com/nnecrkvenuOX/formcms) - Headless CMS with AI-labeling signal - Score 64：ASP.NET Core + React headless CMS，描述中带 AI Agent，但核心更像 CMS。 建议：除非后续证明 agent 工作流，暂不投入。
- [KongFangXun/sofagent](https://github.com/KongFangXun/sofagent) - Agent governance skill layer - Score 80：若社区 evidence 补齐，可从个人方法论升级为 agent governance 产品。 建议：一周后复查 Evidence.md 和第三方案例。

## Skip Reasons

- [TrenchesofChirac/claude-fable-5-free-desktop-app](https://github.com/TrenchesofChirac/claude-fable-5-free-desktop-app)：命名和关键词高度营销化，类似免费桌面 wrapper/下载导流，缺少可信 AI native 产品证据。
- [nnecrkvenuOX/formcms](https://github.com/nnecrkvenuOX/formcms)：有 CMS 产品形态和 stars，但 AI Agent 只出现在描述中，未验证到 agent workflow 或 AI-native core。
- [Plaer1/junction](https://github.com/Plaer1/junction)：已在 2026-06-18 Top 项目中重点覆盖；今天只保留为持续强信号，不重复创建深度复刻任务。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Codex/agent 的控制面正在产品化：从 IDE 侧边栏、MCP durable queue 到 Plan Mode/approval/polling，都在补多小时 agent 任务的可靠性。
2. Agent governance 从提示词规范走向可安装 skill：sofagent 这种项目把宪法、安装脚本、验证脚本和反思日志组合起来，说明“让 agent 别跑偏”正在成为独立产品诉求。
3. 轻量本地路由值得观察：zero-token router 代表在调用 LLM 前做 intent/model/tool routing 的低成本层，但需要 benchmark 和真实集成证明。
4. 垂直 agent skill 比通用 wrapper 更有机会：paperless-ngx-skill 这类项目如果补齐 demo，可能比又一个 MCP server 更接近用户工作流。
5. 昨日强项目仍在窗口内活跃，但今天不应机械重复；重复项目只在有新 release、产品面变化或复刻价值变化时再升入 Top。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先试 aresyn/codex-control-plane-mcp：这是今天最值得跑通的 agent ops/control-plane 项目。
- 做一个小实验：用 athena-loops 或同类 loop，把一个代码审查任务拆成 orchestrator / worker / reviewer，再比较 Codex 原生单线程任务质量。
- 对 sofagent 做隔离 profile 安装测试，重点看 verify.sh、任务日志、反思沉淀是否真的减少重复错误。
- 暂缓 CMS/desktop-free 类高关键词仓库，除非后续出现可验证的 agent workflow。

## 关键假设

- GitHub stars/forks 是发现线索，不等于真实采用；新仓库尤其可能被营销和关键词污染。
- Score 是 AI Native Product Score，优先看可运行入口、用户场景、agent-native 工作流和文档完整度。
- 本轮未做本地 runtime audit，因此“可运行性判断”只到 README/结构层；需要二次任务补 clone/install/smoke test。
- 与 2026-06-18 已覆盖的项目尽量避免重复深写，除非今天仍代表窗口内最强信号。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-18

**数据窗口**：2026-06-16 10:20 至 2026-06-18 10:20（Asia/Shanghai，约近 48 小时，覆盖最近 24-72 小时新建/活跃更新仓库）  
**信息来源**：GitHub Search API（created/pushed/stars/forks/topics）、GitHub repository README 与 root contents spot check  
**实时仓库审计**：已做 API 元数据 + README/目录结构审计；未 clone、未安装依赖、未运行 Docker/npm/pytest  
**关键假设**：优先收录有真实 UI/CLI/API、示例、Docker、测试或文档的 AI native 产品形态；纯论文复现、prompt collection、活动页、SDK wrapper 降权。

## Top Projects

### 1. [Plaer1/junction](https://github.com/Plaer1/junction) - 88/100
- **分类**：Code Agent UI / VS Code Extension
- **做什么**：VS Code 侧边栏聊天界面，统一连接本地 AI coding agents，包括 OpenClaw、Hermes、Goose、OpenCode、OpenHands 等。
- **面向谁**：已经在本机跑多个 coding agent 的开发者和团队。
- **AI native 点**：把 IDE 内的对话、workspace context 和本地 agent runtime 连接成一个可切换的控制面。
- **增长/活跃信号**：2026-06-17 新建，GitHub API 显示 500 stars、2 forks；同日有代码推送。
- **可运行性判断**：TypeScript VS Code extension；根目录有 package.json、src、tests、media、quickstart.sh、install.sh 和截图资源。
- **建议动作**：优先试用并做项目卡片；观察它是否能成为多 agent 本地工作台入口。

### 2. [yolfinance/yolfi-agent](https://github.com/yolfinance/yolfi-agent) - 84/100
- **分类**：Agent Commerce / MCP Payments
- **做什么**：面向 AI coding agents 的稳定币 checkout 集成包，提供 SDK、CLI、MCP server、Agent Skill 和 webhook 工具。
- **面向谁**：需要让 AI agent 帮应用接入支付、付费墙或 access logic 的开发者。
- **AI native 点**：把支付接入拆成 agent 可调用的 JSON-first 工具链，让 Codex/Claude Code/Cursor 等能直接完成商业化流程。
- **增长/活跃信号**：2026-06-16 新建，2026-06-18 仍在推送；GitHub API 显示 89 stars、0 forks。
- **可运行性判断**：根目录有 Dockerfile、package.json、src、test、examples、docs、server.json、SKILL.md，并带 npm badge 和 Glama MCP badge。
- **建议动作**：加入复刻候选：验证 MCP host 中创建 payment link 和 webhook verification 的最短路径。

### 3. [wellwelwel/blue-spec](https://github.com/wellwelwel/blue-spec) - 82/100
- **分类**：Agent Security Workflow
- **做什么**：Security-Driven Hardening 工具包，让 AI agent 先理解系统行为，再引导项目做有针对性的安全加固。
- **面向谁**：希望把安全审计、加固和 agent 编码流程结合的工程团队。
- **AI native 点**：把安全流程产品化为 agent skills 和命令，让多种 coding agents 能按同一 hardening spec 工作。
- **增长/活跃信号**：2026-06-17 新建，36 stars；README 声称支持 37 agents，同日完成推送。
- **可运行性判断**：TypeScript 项目；根目录有 package.json、src、test、tools、scripts、spec、website、AGENTS.md、CLAUDE.md、GEMINI.md。
- **建议动作**：跟踪其 npm 包和实际命令体验，适合做安全 agent workflow 对照样例。

### 4. [HankLEE-1/AI-Guardian](https://github.com/HankLEE-1/AI-Guardian) - 80/100
- **分类**：AI Security Operations Platform
- **做什么**：Agent 驱动的网络安全流量监控与分析平台，覆盖告警研判、资产关联、协同处置和自动化报告。
- **面向谁**：安全运营、护网、企业 SOC 和安全平台原型团队。
- **AI native 点**：把 LangGraph agent 放进安全告警处理链路，强调证据闭环、协同处置和报告生成。
- **增长/活跃信号**：2026-06-17 新建，2026-06-18 有推送；GitHub API 显示 20 stars、2 forks。
- **可运行性判断**：Python/FastAPI + React；根目录有 backend、frontend、core、integration、docs、docker-compose.yml、Dockerfile.backend/frontend 和操作手册。
- **建议动作**：适合作为垂直安全 agent 产品卡片；后续验证 docker-compose 是否可跑通。

### 5. [VisionForge-OU/foreman](https://github.com/VisionForge-OU/foreman) - 78/100
- **分类**：Coding Agent Orchestrator / TUI
- **做什么**：Textual TUI 编排器，监督 headless Claude Code agents 按 plan、ADR/PRD、issues、TDD build、e2e 的门禁流程交付。
- **面向谁**：想把 coding agent 变成受控软件交付流水线的独立开发者和工程团队。
- **AI native 点**：把多个 agent loop 和交付门禁组合成可观察的本地 TUI，而不是单次聊天式编码。
- **增长/活跃信号**：2026-06-17 新建，12 stars、2 forks；README 标注 0.6.0 并有 dogfood、validation、examples。
- **可运行性判断**：Python 3.11+；根目录有 pyproject.toml、uv.lock、src、tests、docs、examples、config.sample.yaml。
- **建议动作**：Watch + 试跑 TUI；重点看 gating 事件流和 Claude CLI 依赖是否稳定。

### 6. [phuhao00/bony-agent](https://github.com/phuhao00/bony-agent) - 77/100
- **分类**：AI Content Operations Platform
- **做什么**：全链路内容生产与分发数字员工，覆盖 AI 对话、图片/视频/音乐生成、智能编辑和多平台定时发布。
- **面向谁**：内容团队、自媒体运营、短剧/多媒体创作者和个人自动化生产者。
- **AI native 点**：用 27+ specialized agents 把内容生产、媒体生成、发布运营和数据洞察组织成工作台。
- **增长/活跃信号**：2026-06-17 新建，4 stars；当日多次推送，README 有主界面、伙伴、工作台截图。
- **可运行性判断**：FastAPI + Next.js + LangGraph；根目录含 backend、frontend/electron/mobile/browser-extension、docker-compose.yml、deploy/start/build 脚本。
- **建议动作**：列入实验候选；先审 docker-compose 和核心发布 connector 的真实可用性。

### 7. [jentrix-au/stacks-ai](https://github.com/jentrix-au/stacks-ai) - 76/100
- **分类**：Agent-Native Work Management / MCP
- **做什么**：自托管 Kanban/CRM/support/roadmap 通用看板，UI 操作和 MCP server 共享同一套动作能力。
- **面向谁**：希望让人和 agent 协同管理任务、bug、支持工单、CRM 和路线图的团队。
- **AI native 点**：内建 54 个 MCP tools、scoped tokens/OAuth、idempotency 和 activity attribution，让 agent 成为可审计队友。
- **增长/活跃信号**：2026-06-16 新建，3 stars；README 细节完整，强调 Next.js 16、Prisma 7、Auth.js v5。
- **可运行性判断**：TypeScript/Next.js；根目录有 package.json、pnpm workspace、prisma、src、tests、playwright/vitest 配置、.env.example。
- **建议动作**：加入趋势地图：agent 操作 UI 与同构 MCP API 的产品形态值得跟踪。

### 8. [Keljian/JSE](https://github.com/Keljian/JSE) - 75/100
- **分类**：Local AI Job Search Assistant
- **做什么**：本地优先桌面求职助手：抓取职位、用本地 LLM 匹配、生成个性化申请材料，并用 Kanban 跟踪流程。
- **面向谁**：正在求职、希望本地保存数据并半自动化申请流程的个人用户。
- **AI native 点**：LLM 不只是写简历，而是贯穿职位抓取、匹配评分、企业研究、材料生成和私有知识库复用。
- **增长/活跃信号**：2026-06-17 新建，2026-06-18 有推送；GitHub API 显示 3 stars，文档和启动脚本完整。
- **可运行性判断**：Python + Electron；根目录有 Run.command/Run.bat、requirements.txt、package.json、electron、src、数据库与 scraper 插件模块。
- **建议动作**：Watch；如果继续更新，可作为垂直个人 agent app 案例拆解。

## Watchlist

- [Noshkoto/Noshy](https://github.com/Noshkoto/Noshy) - 72/100，Agent Memory / MCP：面向 agent 的持久记忆层，提供 LLM extraction、hybrid search、knowledge graph、MCP/ICM 兼容。  
  信号：2026-06-16 新建，4 stars；根目录有 Dockerfile、server.py、examples、tests、docs。  
  动作：观察下一轮是否出现用户案例或集成文档。

- [Rohit-Dnath/RAMen](https://github.com/Rohit-Dnath/RAMen) - 71/100，AI Cache / Vector Store / MCP：类似 Redis 的内存数据存储，加入向量搜索、语义缓存和内建 MCP server。  
  信号：2026-06-16 新建，5 stars；有 Makefile、Dockerfile、cmd/internal/docs。  
  动作：Watch 并等待更完整 benchmark / MCP 示例。

- [krishnashakula/browsewright](https://github.com/krishnashakula/browsewright) - 70/100，Browser Agent / Playwright：给 LLM 一个 URL 和目标，由它驱动真实 Chrome、填表并返回结构化数据。  
  信号：2026-06-16 新建，2 stars；README 有 PyPI badge、CI badge、examples、tests。  
  动作：观察 PyPI 包和复杂站点成功率；暂不进 Top 是因为 traction 很早。

- [aws-samples/sample-sop-mcp](https://github.com/aws-samples/sample-sop-mcp) - 70/100，MCP Workflow / SOP Execution：把重复流程变成 agent 可逐步执行的 SOP，每一步产出后再推进，强调审计和门禁。  
  信号：2026-06-16 新建，2 stars；AWS samples 组织下有 CI、docs、skills、tests。  
  动作：Watch；适合作为 agent 工作流审计设计参考。

- [r266-tech/agent-access](https://github.com/r266-tech/agent-access) - 69/100，Agent Access Layer / CLI Registry：中文 agent 访问层，将网站、App、API 和重复联网流程沉淀成 agent-native CLI registry。  
  信号：2026-06-16 新建，9 stars；有 AGENTS.md、plugins、scripts、CONTRIBUTING。  
  动作：Watch；适合跟踪中文 agent 工具生态。

- [juliangeymonat-jpg/mothrag](https://github.com/juliangeymonat-jpg/mothrag) - 68/100，Agentic RAG / Multi-hop QA：确定性 multi-hop RAG，强调 proof tree、商品化 LLM API、无 GPU 和论文级 benchmark。  
  信号：2026-06-17 新建，4 stars；有 docs、examples、benchmarks、paper、tests。  
  动作：跟踪是否出现 hosted demo 或应用集成案例。

## Skip Reasons
- [Hatari130/podcast-bridge](https://github.com/Hatari130/podcast-bridge)：2026-06-17 已进入 Top；今天没有新的增量信号，避免重复收录。
- [team-to-be-found/Clawhunt-profile](https://github.com/team-to-be-found/Clawhunt-profile)：更像黑客松/赏金市场活动资料，当前缺少明确可运行代码。
- [AlessandroFare/fable-frame](https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fable-frame)：主要是 prompt templates / system instructions，产品运行面不足。
- [Tenstu/Pass-LLM-with-LLM](https://github.com/Tenstu/Pass-LLM-with-LLM)：定位为面试/考试破解 harness，应用场景风险较高，且产品化价值弱。
- [sylearn/wtflow](https://github.com/sylearn/wtflow)：更像 Worktrunk 的 Agent Skill 知识包，不是独立产品；保留作流程参考。
- [likithamadala/ai-pm-learning-fleet](https://github.com/likithamadala/ai-pm-learning-fleet)：概念有趣，但当前像个人学习/自维护 agent fleet，用户场景和可运行产品面不足。

## 今日趋势观察
- Agent 产品开始从“单 agent 能做事”转向“本地控制面 + 可审计工作流”：Junction、Foreman、Stacks 都在把 agent 操作变成 UI/TUI/board。
- MCP 不再只是 connector 展示，开始进入支付、SOP、Kanban、语义缓存、记忆层等带状态和权限的业务关键路径。
- 垂直 agent app 的新样例增多：安全运营、内容运营、求职助手等都在尝试把 LLM 嵌进完整业务闭环。

## 今日建议动作
- 先试 `Plaer1/junction`：它最像新的本地多 agent IDE 控制面，适合快速判断 multi-agent workspace UX。
- 对 `yolfinance/yolfi-agent` 做一次 MCP host + CLI 支付链路最小验证，关注 agent commerce 的真实可用性。
- 用 `wellwelwel/blue-spec` 和 `aws-samples/sample-sop-mcp` 对照观察：安全/流程类 agent 正在走向可审计规范化。

## 数据窗口与关键假设
- 数据窗口按北京时间 2026-06-16 10:20 到 2026-06-18 10:20 估算，对应 GitHub created/pushed 的近 24-72 小时。
- 本次使用 GitHub Search API 元数据和 README/root contents spot check；没有 clone、安装、Docker 启动或端到端运行。
- Score 优先考虑新鲜度、可运行性、产品形态、README 完整度和 AI native 业务闭环；stars 很低但产品表面清晰的项目仍可入选。
- 成熟大仓如 Dify、Langflow、OpenHands、Stagehand、LiveKit 只作为趋势背景，不进入 Top，除非出现明确新 release 或异常增长。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-17

**数据窗口**：2026-06-15 00:00 to 2026-06-17 10:45 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub Search API + GitHub repository README/root-page spot checks.

**信息来源**：GitHub Search API queries for created/pushed repositories around agent, MCP, RAG, LLM, automation, code-agent; GitHub repo pages/README spot checks for selected projects. No clone/install/runtime execution.

**关键假设**：优先收录 2026-06-15 之后创建或 72 小时内显著更新、且具备 CLI/MCP/安装脚本/真实用户场景的项目；重复昨日 Top 的项目只在 Skip/Watchlist 说明，不重复抬榜；star/fork 来自 GitHub API/页面快照，未做 clone、install、Docker 或本地运行审计。

## 今日趋势观察

本轮明显集中在 agent 可控状态层：repo-local task memory / skill OS、ChatGPT-to-local-repo MCP bridge、multi-model judge MCP、以及 voice-first personal agent。MCP 项目正在从连接器扩张转向“让现有强模型安全进入本地工作流”的产品包装。

今天的高质量新增项目不再只是“又一个 MCP server”。更值得跟踪的是三类产品包装：一是 agent 长任务所需的本地状态和技能系统，二是把 ChatGPT/Codex/Claude Code 等强模型接进本地 repo 的安全桥，三是将语音、播客、PDF、金融文本等真实输入源接入可持续运行的 agent 工作流。

## Top Projects

### 1. [dongshuyan/compass-skills](https://github.com/dongshuyan/compass-skills) - 88/100

- **分类**：Agent Skills / Local Memory OS
- **做什么**：为 AI coding agent 提供任务澄清、repo-local task forest、用户协作画像三套本地技能。
- **面向谁**：频繁使用 Codex、Claude Code、OpenCode 等 agent 做长任务的工程师和团队。
- **AI native 点**：把 agent 的长期目标、协作偏好、任务 DAG 和风险边界变成可审计的本地工作流。
- **增长/活跃信号**：2026-06-15 创建，GitHub 页面显示约 173 stars/17 forks，API 搜索快照约 191 stars/18 forks；v0.2.0 于 2026-06-16 发布。
- **可运行性判断**：README 提供 npx skills add 安装命令；仓库含 skills、scripts、HTML export、SECURITY.md 和验证状态。
- **建议动作**：作为 agent memory / skill OS 标杆长期跟踪，建议本地安装到一个沙盒 repo 试 task-forest。

### 2. [smixs/agent-second-brain](https://github.com/smixs/agent-second-brain) - 87/100

- **分类**：Voice Personal Agent / PKM
- **做什么**：Telegram 语音/文本/文件输入，自动整理为 Obsidian vault、知识图谱、提醒和日报的 24/7 second brain。
- **面向谁**：重度语音记录、Obsidian、个人 CRM/项目管理用户，以及想自托管个人助理的独立开发者。
- **AI native 点**：用长驻 Claude Code/tmux 会话驱动个人知识系统，agent 负责分类、链接、提醒、夜间整理和自修复。
- **增长/活跃信号**：仓库 2026-06-17 仍在 push；页面约 274 stars/191 forks，181 commits，v3.0.1 release 为 2026-06-14。
- **可运行性判断**：有 bootstrap.sh/setup.sh/upgrade.sh、pyproject、tests、systemd/VPS 安装流程和 vault 模板；需 Telegram + Deepgram + Claude 登录。
- **建议动作**：列为复刻候选：可抽取 voice-to-vault、cron skill、自修复 watchdog 三段工作流做小实验。

### 3. [rebel0789/codexpro](https://github.com/rebel0789/codexpro) - 84/100

- **分类**：ChatGPT MCP Local Coding Bridge
- **做什么**：把 ChatGPT Developer Mode 连接到本地 repo，让 ChatGPT 读取/编辑文件、搜索代码、运行安全验证命令并加载 Codex 风格上下文。
- **面向谁**：有 ChatGPT Plus/Pro Developer Mode、同时使用 Codex 的开发者。
- **AI native 点**：用 MCP + Apps SDK widget 将 ChatGPT web 变成本地 coding agent 表面，支持 handoff 到 Codex。
- **增长/活跃信号**：2026-06-16 创建；API 搜索快照显示 25 stars/4 forks，GitHub 页面稍后显示 2 stars/0 forks，说明计数可能短时波动；6 commits。
- **可运行性判断**：npm install -g codexpro / codexpro setup；仓库含 src、scripts、docs、package.json、SECURITY.md、visual tool cards。
- **建议动作**：安全边界有价值，建议跟踪其 write/bash allowlist 和 ChatGPT Apps SDK card 设计。

### 4. [ba1lly/OpenPrism](https://github.com/ba1lly/OpenPrism) - 82/100

- **分类**：Multi-model Judge MCP
- **做什么**：把多个模型并行组成 panel，再由 judge 汇总为更可靠答案，可作为 CLI 或 MCP server 接入 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等。
- **面向谁**：需要在架构、研究、难问题上做多模型交叉验证的开发者和研究型团队。

## 今日建议动作

runs.dataWindow: 2026-06-13 00:00 UTC to 2026-06-16 02:30 UTC; GitHub new repositories and recently pushed AI-native product candidates
runs.sourceSummary: GitHub Search API; GitHub repository metadata; README; repository root file list
runs.trendObservations: Agent control planes are splitting into desktop collaboration, CLI/process management, and evidence-gated DAG runners; prompt-to-local-app builders and self-hosted voice runtimes showed stronger product shape than generic skill/prompt repos; MCP value is shifting toward complex asset-to-agent tools such as Figma-to-code.
runs.assumptions: Prioritized product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API and complete docs over papers, prompt collections, pure wrappers, marketing repos, and generic SDKs. GitHub API metadata, README, and root file structure were audited live; no clone, install, Docker, or local runtime verification was performed.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-16

## 数据观察窗口

- 窗口：2026-06-13 00:00 UTC 至 2026-06-16 02:30 UTC，重点看新创建仓库、近 24-72 小时 push 活跃仓库，以及有明确产品入口的 AI native 项目。
- 信息来源：GitHub Search API、GitHub repository metadata、README、根目录文件列表。
- 实时审计：已做仓库元数据、README、根目录结构审计；未 clone、未安装依赖、未运行 Docker/CLI/UI。
- 关键假设：GitHub stars/forks 在新仓阶段容易被营销或社区转发放大，本报告优先看可运行入口、产品场景和文档完整度；0-star 但产品形态完整的项目进入 Watchlist。

- [tabtabtabai/awesome-acp](https://github.com/tabtabtabai/awesome-acp)：awesome list 类型，缺少可运行产品入口，跳过。
- [HyeongSubKim/GeneRAG](https://github.com/HyeongSubKim/GeneRAG)：论文/官方研究代码，产品场景弱，跳过。
- [yerkebulangogogo/mcp-goteway](https://github.com/yerkebulangogogo/mcp-goteway)：名称相关但缺少描述与足够 README/产品证据，跳过。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent control plane 正在分化成三层：桌面/远端协作层（Omnigent）、CLI/进程管理层（mngr）、证据门禁与 DAG 执行层（OMK）。
2. “生成可运行本地软件”比单纯生成代码更有产品信号：Ironsmith 把 prompt 直接连到 SwiftUI app bundle，是今天最强的新产品形态。
3. Voice agent 开始从 Python demo 与托管平台转向自托管 runtime：Flowcat 的 Rust 单二进制、SIP/WebRTC、无 hosted control plane 是值得重点跟踪的方向。
4. MCP 项目从“新增 connector”向“把复杂资产变成 agent 工具”移动：Huolala Figma MCP 的设计稿结构化与 asset package 输出比普通 API wrapper 更有产品价值。
5. 本地优先仍是强主题：openloops、c0、cboard、COMPASS 都强调隐私、本地状态、可审计记忆或任务管理。

## 今日建议动作

- 先试 `Ironsmith`：验证 prompt 生成 SwiftUI app 的链路、可编辑性和导出体验。
- 复刻候选选 `Flowcat + Huolala Figma MCP + OMK`：分别代表 voice runtime、design-to-code tool、agent evidence runner。
- 对 `Omnigent / mngr / OMK` 做横评表：维度包括 agent 类型覆盖、沙箱策略、artifact 记录、远端执行、协作 UI、安装复杂度。
- 对 `openloops / c0 / cboard` 建一个“local-first agent memory/task substrate”观察组，等待 7 天活跃与 release 信号。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-12

数据窗口：2026-06-09 18:25 to 2026-06-12 18:25 Asia/Shanghai; GitTrend AI Agent/AI Skills pages updated June 9, GitTrend AI Coding Assistant/AI Infrastructure pages updated June 6, GitHub repository README/release pages checked live on June 12, 2026, and targeted web search for AI agent, coding-agent, MCP, workflow, browser/voice/local AI repositories.

关键假设：Prioritized product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, install instructions, docs/examples/screenshots/releases, visible workflow, and recent GitTrend/GitHub activity. Downgraded prompt-only skill packs, guide repositories, model training/inference-only code without product workflow, repeated abnormal star spikes, and projects already promoted in the last run unless a new release changed their signal. GitTrend star deltas remain directional until GitHub API verification is available.

## Top Projects

1. [nexu-io/open-design](https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design) - Agentic Design Workspace - Score 91
   - 做什么：Local-first open-source Claude Design/Figma-era alternative that turns coding-agent CLIs into a desktop design studio for prototypes, dashboards, decks, images, video and exports.
   - 面向谁：Design-minded product builders, PMs, founders, and coding-agent users who want artifact generation tied to local files, design systems and export workflows.
   - AI native 点：It treats the coding agent as the design engine: skills, plugins, DESIGN.md systems, MCP install targets, BYOK model routing, sandboxed previews and artifact export are native product primitives.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Agent ranked it #5 with +774 stars today; GitHub showed 63.6k stars, 7.1k forks, 263 issues, 136 PRs, 2,228 commits, and release notes for Open Design 0.10.0.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents desktop downloads for macOS/Windows/Linux, one-line agent install, MCP install for Codex/Claude/Cursor/OpenCode/Copilot/Gemini-style hosts, Vercel/self-host paths, screenshots and demo artifacts.
   - 建议动作：Run the desktop app or one-line agent install; test whether a real Codex design-to-HTML handoff can replace today’s ad hoc visual artifact workflows.

2. [aaif-goose/goose](https://github.com/aaif-goose/goose) - Desktop/CLI Agent Runtime - Score 88
   - 做什么：Open-source extensible AI agent with native desktop app, CLI and embeddable API for installing, executing, editing and testing with many LLM providers.
   - 面向谁：Developers and teams that want a durable agent runtime beyond editor autocomplete, especially where MCP extensions and provider choice matter.
   - AI native 点：Goose makes the agent a local operating surface: desktop, terminal, API, 15+ model providers, ACP subscriptions, 70+ MCP extensions, custom distributions and governance under AAIF/Linux Foundation.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Agent ranked it #8 with +591 stars today; GitHub showed 49k stars, 5.2k forks, 4,697 commits, 175 issues, 171 PRs, and latest release v1.37.0 on June 3, 2026.
   - 可运行性判断：README links desktop downloads for macOS/Linux/Windows, a curl installer for CLI, quickstart/tutorial docs, diagnostics, governance, custom distributions and extension docs.
   - 建议动作：Use as a comparison baseline against Codex/OpenCode local workflows; specifically inspect extension management, task state, and MCP permission boundaries.

3. [CopilotKit/CopilotKit](https://github.com/CopilotKit/CopilotKit) - Agentic Frontend / Generative UI - Score 86
   - 做什么：Frontend stack for building full-stack agentic applications with chat UI, generative UI, shared state, tool rendering and human-in-the-loop workflows across web, mobile and chat surfaces.
   - 面向谁：Frontend/full-stack teams embedding agents into real products rather than shipping standalone chat widgets.
   - AI native 点：It makes agent-user interaction a UI protocol: shared state, tool-rendered components, HITL approvals, AG-UI, one backend powering web/mobile/Slack/Teams, and coding-agent setup skills.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Agent ranked it #10 with +468 stars today; GitHub showed 34.8k stars, 4.3k forks, 11,214 commits, 323 issues, 242 PRs, and latest release v1.60.0 on June 11, 2026.
   - 可运行性判断：README has docs/examples links, npx create command, skills installer, framework support table, demo videos, SDK packages and AG-UI starter command.
   - 建议动作：Prototype one thin agent workflow in an existing app; evaluate whether generative UI and shared state reduce custom glue versus plain chat.

4. [CodeGraphContext/CodeGraphContext](https://github.com/CodeGraphContext/CodeGraphContext) - Code Graph MCP Context - Score 84
   - 做什么：MCP server plus CLI that indexes local code into graph databases so AI assistants and developers can query call chains, relationships, complexity and code structure.
   - 面向谁：Developers onboarding to complex repositories and agent builders who need persistent code context outside the prompt window.
   - AI native 点：It turns repository structure into an MCP-accessible graph context layer with multi-language parsing, live file watching, embedded database options and standalone HTML graph visualization.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Coding Assistant ranked it #7 with +404 stars today; GitHub showed 3.7k stars, 694 forks, 1,551 commits, 151 issues, 25 PRs, docs, tests, website and Docker/K8s assets.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents pip install, command verification, embedded DB defaults, codegraphcontext index/list/analyze/watch commands, MCP mode, 22 languages and interactive visualization.
   - 建议动作：Run it on this radar repo and compare answer quality against Graphify/Understand-Anything before choosing a durable code-context tool.

5. [zhukunpenglinyutong/jetbrains-cc-gui](https://github.com/zhukunpenglinyutong/jetbrains-cc-gui) - IDE Agent GUI - Score 82
   - 做什么：IntelliJ IDEA plugin that provides a visual interface for Claude Code and OpenAI Codex with context-aware chat, file references, images, agents, MCP support, diffing and session management.
   - 面向谁：JetBrains users who want Codex/Claude workflows inside their IDE with visible sessions and permission controls.
   - AI native 点：It productizes coding agents as an IDE-native control panel: dual engines, @file context, built-in agent system, slash skills, MCP extension, security controls, diffs, exports and usage stats.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Coding Assistant ranked it #4 with +569 stars today; GitHub showed 4k stars, 506 forks, 1,446 commits and latest release v0.4.5 on June 12, 2026.
   - 可运行性判断：README links JetBrains Marketplace install, local dev via npm/gradle runIde, buildPlugin, changelog, screenshots and active development notes.
   - 建议动作：Track as a JetBrains-side Codex UX signal; install only if current work moves from VS Code/Codex desktop into IntelliJ-heavy projects.

6. [Panniantong/Agent-Reach](https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach) - Agent Internet Reach CLI - Score 80
   - 做什么：CLI/skill package that gives AI agents read/search access across Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu and related channels with install health checks.
   - 面向谁：Researchers, operators and agent users who need social/community search without wiring each platform manually.
   - AI native 点：It packages internet reach as an installable agent capability, including platform-specific adapters, MCP/CLI glue, health checks, dry-run install, cookie-risk guidance and uninstall cleanup.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Agent ranked it #3 with +1.1k stars today; GitHub showed 26.5k stars, 2.2k forks, 282 commits, 27 issues and 14 PRs.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents agent-reach install --env=auto, safe mode, dry-run, uninstall, platform guidance, tests/docs folders and security warnings for cookie-based sources.
   - 建议动作：Use a throwaway account and test one low-risk GitHub/YouTube/Reddit research flow; avoid primary-account cookie paths.

7. [lemonade-sdk/lemonade](https://github.com/lemonade-sdk/lemonade) - Local AI Server / Agent Model Substrate - Score 78
   - 做什么：Local AI server and embeddable runtime for running chat, coding, speech, transcription and image models on user GPUs/NPUs through OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama-compatible APIs.
   - 面向谁：AI app developers and local-agent builders who need private, lower-cost local inference and model discovery across PCs.
   - AI native 点：It makes local multimodal inference a product surface: model manager, API-compatible local server, embeddable binary, app marketplace integrations and hardware-optimized backends.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #7 with +348 stars today; GitHub showed 4.3k stars, 339 forks, 1,103 commits, 251 issues, 73 PRs and AMD-sponsored/community maintenance.
   - 可运行性判断：README links Windows/Linux/macOS/Docker installs, model manager, CLI commands, OpenAI-compatible base URL, mobile clients, docs and supported backend matrix.
   - 建议动作：Keep as local-model substrate candidate; test only after deciding a workflow needs private/offline model serving.

8. [qixing-jk/all-api-hub](https://github.com/qixing-jk/all-api-hub) - AI API Account Operations - Score 75
   - 做什么：Browser-extension dashboard for managing multiple New API/Sub2API relay accounts, balances, usage, price comparison, auto check-ins, credentials and health checks.
   - 面向谁：Power users and small teams using many AI relay accounts or model gateways, especially China-market Claude/Codex/Cursor users.
   - AI native 点：It operationalizes the messy account layer beneath AI-native tools: balance visibility, price routing, key reuse, station recognition, automated check-ins and tool integration.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #3 with +475 stars today; GitHub showed 4.1k stars, 281 forks, 37 issues, 4 PRs, Chrome/Edge/Firefox distribution and user-facing docs.
   - 可运行性判断：README links Chrome/Edge/Firefox stores, stable/nightly GitHub packages, mobile/browser-specific guides, quickstart, supported sites and integration docs.
   - 建议动作：Watch as an ops-pattern reference; do not adopt for core workflows until security and credential-storage model are reviewed.

## Watchlist

- [dontbesilent2025/dbskill](https://github.com/dontbesilent2025/dbskill) - Business Diagnosis Agent Skills - Score 73 - Business-diagnostics skill pack with strong GitTrend velocity, but product surface remains skill/workflow-centric. 建议：Watch; promote only if packaged UI/CLI or repeatable evidence workflow becomes clearer.
- [tw93/Waza](https://github.com/tw93/Waza) - Engineering Habit Skills - Score 71 - Engineering habits converted into Claude-run skills. 建议：Watch for concrete workflows; likely skip if it remains guidance-only.
- [agentscope-ai/agentscope-java](https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java) - Java Multi-agent Framework - Score 70 - Java framework for agent-oriented programming and LLM applications. 建议：Watch as enterprise-language signal.
- [TanStack/ai](https://github.com/TanStack/ai) - Type-safe AI App SDK - Score 70 - Provider-agnostic TypeScript AI SDK for streaming chat, tool calling, agents and multimodal apps. 建议：Keep watching for API stabilization and examples.

## Skip Reasons

- [Leonxlnx/taste-skill](https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill) - Strong GitTrend rank, but still primarily taste/style guidance rather than durable product surface with auditable runtime.
- [affaan-m/ECC](https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC) - Repeated abnormal star velocity and very high headline numbers; requires GitHub API/community validation before promotion.
- [multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills](https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills) - Single CLAUDE.md/prompt-methodology style project; lacks runnable product workflow.
- [yasasbanukaofficial/claude-code](https://github.com/yasasbanukaofficial/claude-code) - Claims to be open-source Claude Code CLI skeleton; high fork/star mismatch and unclear legitimacy/product originality, so not promoted.
- [FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide](https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide) - Guide/template repository; useful education material but outside product-shaped radar focus.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 产品开始明显转向“可见工作台”：Open Design、Goose、CopilotKit、JetBrains CC GUI 都在把 agent 的工作过程从聊天框抽象成桌面、IDE、前端协议或 artifact studio。
2. 代码上下文图谱继续升温，但今天更适合区分 Graphify/Understand-Anything/CodeGraphContext：前两者偏 agent skill 和可视化理解，CGC 偏 pip 可装、MCP 可接、CLI 可验的工程工具。
3. 本地模型和执行基础设施仍在补位：Lemonade 代表“本地多模态 OpenAI-compatible server”，与 sandbox-runtime/just-bash 代表的安全执行层可以组成下一阶段 agent runtime substrate。
4. 中国市场的 AI 运维需求更可见：All API Hub、Agent Reach 都围绕账号、渠道、平台登录态、成本和连接器可靠性，是真实痛点，但也带来凭据和封号风险。
5. GitTrend 的异常高星项目仍多，今天继续把 prompt-only、guide-only、可疑源码复刻和异常星速项目放进 Skip，而不当作产品机会。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：试跑 Open Design 的桌面或 od mcp install codex 路径，验证能否稳定产出 HTML/PPTX/MP4 artifact。
- 第二优先级：把 Goose 作为本地 agent runtime 对照组，比较它与 Codex/OpenCode 的 MCP、权限、任务状态和桌面 UX。
- 第三优先级：用 CodeGraphContext 索引一个熟悉 repo，和 Graphify/Understand-Anything 做同题对比。
- 风险动作：Agent Reach 只用小号/低风险平台测试，All API Hub 先做凭据存储和权限模型审计。

## 信息来源

- GitTrend AI Agent: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-agent
- GitTrend AI Coding Assistant: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-coding-assistant
- GitTrend AI Infrastructure: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-infrastructure
- GitTrend AI Skills: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-skills
- GitHub README/release pages for all Top/Watchlist repositories listed above.

## 实时仓库审计说明

本次做过实时网页仓库审计和 GitTrend 页面检查；没有 clone、install、Docker run、GitHub API 或本地功能试跑。Shell 里的 GitHub API 访问仍失败：代理 127.0.0.1:7890 不可用，直连 DNS 无法解析 api.github.com。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-11

数据窗口：2026-06-08 18:18 to 2026-06-11 18:18 Asia/Shanghai; GitTrend AI Agent/AI Skills pages updated June 9, 2026, GitTrend AI Infrastructure page updated June 6, 2026, GitHub repository README pages, and targeted web search for AI agent, coding-agent, MCP, workflow, sandbox/runtime, RAG and LLM product repositories.

关键假设：Prioritized repositories with visible product surface, runnable UI/CLI/API, install instructions, docs/examples/screenshots/demo assets, and recent growth or update signals. Downgraded pure guides, one-file prompt collections, model training/tutorial repos, abnormal star spikes, and projects without a durable user workflow. GitTrend star deltas are directional until GitHub API-verified.

## Top Projects

1. [builderz-labs/mission-control](https://github.com/builderz-labs/mission-control) - Agent Operations Control Plane - Score 91
   - 做什么：Self-hosted dashboard for dispatching AI agent tasks, coordinating multi-agent workflows, tracking spend, managing skills, and auditing security from one SQLite-backed control surface.
   - 面向谁：Teams running multiple coding/research agents who need task queues, review gates, costs, logs, skills, schedules, and governance in one place.
   - AI native 点：It treats agent work as an operated system: agents, tasks, skills, memory, MCP calls, evals, trust scores, cron schedules, webhooks, alerts, and quality gates are first-class product objects.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #4 with +372 stars today; GitHub showed 5.3k stars, 906 forks, 366 commits, 7 issues and 11 PRs, with docs, examples, tests, Docker, OpenAPI and screenshots.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents one-command local install, manual pnpm dev, Docker compose, GHCR image, hardened compose profile, setup page, API examples and optional gateway mode.
   - 建议动作：Run the Docker path and test whether Codex/Claude/OpenCode tasks can be registered, queued, reviewed and audited without custom glue.

2. [mvanhorn/last30days-skill](https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill) - Agent Research Skill / Social Intelligence - Score 88
   - 做什么：AI agent skill that searches Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, GitHub and web sources, scores signals by real engagement, then synthesizes a grounded last-30-days brief.
   - 面向谁：Operators, researchers, sales/product people and agent users who need recent community truth rather than stale web search summaries.
   - AI native 点：It uses an agent as a cross-platform research engine with source-specific connectors, entity resolution, competitive comparison, HTML brief export and agent-judged synthesis.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Skills ranked it #1 with +3.5k stars today; GitHub showed 39.3k stars, 3.2k forks, 623 commits, 75 issues and 72 PRs.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents Claude plugin install, npx skills add for Codex/Cursor/Copilot/Gemini-style hosts, zero-config sources for Reddit/HN/Polymarket/GitHub, and guided setup for X/YouTube/TikTok.
   - 建议动作：Use it as a radar-source experiment on one topic and compare output quality, citation fidelity and auth friction against this current manual workflow.

3. [safishamsi/graphify](https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify) - Code Knowledge Graph Skill - Score 85
   - 做什么：Agent skill that turns code, schemas, scripts, docs, papers, images and videos into a queryable knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor and Gemini-style assistants.
   - 面向谁：Developers onboarding to complex systems or trying to give coding agents richer project context.
   - AI native 点：It creates a durable graph context layer that agents can query across app code, database schema, infrastructure and docs instead of relying only on current-context text.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Skills ranked it #3 with +1.5k stars today and 63.5k stars; GitHub README shows architecture docs, extraction pipeline, optional Docker MCP Toolkit and SQLite integrations.
   - 可运行性判断：Repository includes skills, docs, tests and architecture references; this run did not clone it, so install/runtime friction still needs direct audit.
   - 建议动作：Benchmark against Understand-Anything and CodeGraphContext on this repo; promote only if graph answers materially improve agent edits.

4. [Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything](https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything) - Interactive Code Understanding UI - Score 83
   - 做什么：Interactive knowledge graph and dashboard that turns code into searchable, askable architecture maps for multiple agent hosts.
   - 面向谁：Developers, PMs and codebase reviewers who need visual exploration and question-answering over unfamiliar repositories.
   - AI native 点：The product wraps code context in a persona-adaptive UI with architectural layers and language concepts, making agent comprehension inspectable rather than hidden in chat.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Skills ranked it #8 with +837 stars today; GitHub shows badges for Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, live demo and homepage links.
   - 可运行性判断：Quick Start and live-demo assets are visible in README; no local run was performed today.
   - 建议动作：Run side-by-side with Graphify on one known codebase; assess whether the UI helps humans validate agent context.

5. [anthropic-experimental/sandbox-runtime](https://github.com/anthropic-experimental/sandbox-runtime) - Agent Process Sandbox - Score 81
   - 做什么：Lightweight OS-level runtime for enforcing filesystem and network restrictions on arbitrary processes without requiring a container.
   - 面向谁：Agent platform builders and tool authors who need local execution controls around shell commands, code interpreters or untrusted workflows.
   - AI native 点：As agents gain more action tools, sandboxing becomes a core product primitive; this provides a focused runtime layer for constraining what agent-launched processes can touch.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #8 with +337 stars today; GitHub showed 4.3k stars and 316 forks under an Anthropic experimental org.
   - 可运行性判断：README and repository surface indicate a lightweight runtime package; this run did not perform install or policy tests.
   - 建议动作：Audit policy expressiveness and macOS/Linux behavior; consider as a dependency candidate for any local agent execution harness.

6. [SWE-agent/mini-swe-agent](https://github.com/SWE-agent/mini-swe-agent) - Minimal Coding Agent CLI - Score 80
   - 做什么：Small Python coding agent that solves GitHub issues or local command-line tasks using a deliberately simple bash-only loop.
   - 面向谁：Researchers and developers who want a transparent coding-agent baseline, fast CLI workflow, or benchmarkable agent scaffold.
   - AI native 点：It pushes product value into model capability plus a minimal, auditable execution loop, making trajectories easier to debug, benchmark and sandbox.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Coding Assistant ranked it #5 with +568 stars today; GitHub showed 5.1k stars, 693 forks, 995 commits and latest release v2.4.0 on June 10, 2026.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents uvx/pipx one-shot CLI, pip install, source install, Python bindings, local/docker/podman/singularity/bubblewrap environments and docs.
   - 建议动作：Use as a baseline in future code-agent evaluations; compare task success and observability against heavier agent shells.

7. [vercel-labs/just-bash](https://github.com/vercel-labs/just-bash) - Virtual Bash Runtime for Agents - Score 78
   - 做什么：TypeScript virtual bash environment with in-memory/overlay/read-write filesystems, many Unix commands, optional network, Python, JavaScript and SQLite support.
   - 面向谁：AI app and agent developers who need safe, embeddable command execution without exposing the host shell directly.
   - AI native 点：It productizes the shell as a controllable agent tool: virtual filesystem, allow-listed network, custom commands, execution limits and typed integration for JS/TS apps.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #9 with +264 stars today; GitHub showed 3.7k stars, 207 forks, examples and a 620-line package README.
   - 可运行性判断：README documents npm install, import { Bash }, custom commands, supported Unix commands, filesystem modes, cancellation and network allow-list configuration.
   - 建议动作：Prototype a safe mini execution tool for local agents and test whether command coverage is enough for real troubleshooting loops.

8. [looplj/axonhub](https://github.com/looplj/axonhub) - LLM Gateway / AI Operations - Score 76
   - 做什么：Open-source AI gateway for calling 100+ LLMs through existing SDKs with failover, load balancing, cost control and tracing.
   - 面向谁：Teams juggling multiple model providers and relay accounts who need observability and routing without rewriting application SDK calls.
   - AI native 点：It is infrastructure rather than an agent app, but it supports AI-native products by making model choice, cost, fallback and tracing operational controls.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #5 with +366 stars today; GitHub showed Docker readiness, multilingual README and docker-compose deployment.
   - 可运行性判断：README includes config.example.yml, docker-compose.yml, render.yaml and Docker Compose deployment steps; TiDB DSN setup suggests some deployment friction.
   - 建议动作：Keep as gateway watchlist-plus; run only if current projects need multi-provider routing or spend tracing.

## Watchlist

- [TanStack/ai](https://github.com/TanStack/ai) - Type-safe AI App SDK - Score 74 - Provider-agnostic TypeScript SDK for streaming chat, tool calls, structured outputs, realtime voice, media generation and framework-native AI apps. 建议：Watch for API stability and examples before adopting.
- [openchamber/openchamber](https://github.com/openchamber/openchamber) - OpenCode Desktop/Web Interface - Score 73 - Desktop and web interface for OpenCode AI agent. 建议：Watch; avoid repeating unless releases show stronger integration depth.
- [agentscope-ai/agentscope-java](https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java) - Java Multi-agent Framework - Score 71 - Java framework for agent-oriented programming and LLM applications. 建议：Watch as Java-enterprise signal, but do not prioritize over product surfaces.
- [qixing-jk/all-api-hub](https://github.com/qixing-jk/all-api-hub) - LLM Account/Relay Dashboard - Score 70 - Dashboard for New-API/Sub2API account balance, usage, auto check-in, key use, price comparison and health checks. 建议：Watch for China-market LLM operations patterns; not a Top product today.

## Skip Reasons

- [Leonxlnx/taste-skill](https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill) - High GitTrend rank, but still reads primarily as taste/style skill guidance rather than durable product surface with auditable runtime.
- [mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills) - Popular skills directory, but mostly reusable engineering habits; product shape is weaker than agent control planes or runnable tools.
- [affaan-m/ECC](https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC) - Repeated abnormal star velocity and very high headline numbers; requires API/community validation before promotion.
- [multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills](https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills) - Single CLAUDE.md/prompt-methodology style project; lacks runnable product workflow.
- [rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch](https://github.com/rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch) - Educational build-from-scratch repository; useful learning content but outside product-shaped radar focus.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 操作控制面变成今天最强的产品形态：Mission Control 把任务、agent、skills、成本、审计、质量门禁和调度集中到一个可运行 dashboard。
2. “agent 能执行命令”之后，安全执行层开始升温：sandbox-runtime 和 just-bash 都在把 shell/process 变成可控、可审计、可嵌入的产品能力。
3. 社交/社区研究 agent 开始产品化：last30days-skill 的价值不在单个来源，而在跨 Reddit/X/YouTube/HN/Polymarket/GitHub 的实体解析、评分和综合。
4. 代码上下文工具继续分化：Graphify 偏 agent 可查询知识图谱，Understand-Anything 偏人可检查的交互式架构图。
5. LLM 基础设施仍活跃，但要区分 agent-native 产品与通用 SDK/网关；今天只把 AxonHub、TanStack AI 放在“支撑层”视角评估。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：试跑 Mission Control 的 Docker 或本地安装路径，确认能否接入一个真实 agent task queue。
- 第二优先级：用 last30days-skill 跑一个“AI Native Product Radar”主题，评估它能否减少人工找源成本。
- 第三优先级：在同一个 repo 上比较 Graphify、Understand-Anything、CodeGraphContext，选一个作为代码上下文实验基线。
- 安全实验：用 just-bash 做一个极小 agent shell tool，记录命令覆盖、网络 allow-list、文件系统隔离和失败模式。

## 信息来源

- GitTrend AI Agent: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-agent
- GitTrend AI Skills: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-skills
- GitTrend AI Coding Assistant: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-coding-assistant
- GitTrend AI Infrastructure: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-infrastructure
- GitHub README pages for all Top/Watchlist repositories listed above.
