runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-10

数据窗口：2026-06-07 18:17 to 2026-06-10 18:17 Asia/Shanghai; GitTrend AI Agent/AI Coding Assistant/AI Skills pages updated June 6-9, 2026, GitHub repository README pages, and targeted web search for AI agent, coding-agent, MCP, skills, RAG/notebook, and AI workflow products.

关键假设：Prioritized repositories with visible product surface, runnable UI/CLI/API, install instructions, docs/examples/screenshots/demo assets, and recent growth or update signals. Downgraded pure prompt/CLAUDE.md collections, model-training tutorials, abnormal star spikes, and repositories without a durable user workflow. This run used live web/README audit only; no local clone, package install, docker start, or GitHub API audit was performed.

## Top Projects

1. [santifer/career-ops](https://github.com/santifer/career-ops) - Vertical Career Agent OS - Score 91
   - 做什么：AI-powered job-search command center that turns Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Qwen or OpenCode into a pipeline for job evaluation, tailored CV generation, portal scanning, batch processing and tracking.
   - 面向谁：Job seekers, career switchers and AI builders who want a structured, human-reviewed job-search operating system.
   - AI native 点：The workflow is agent-native: coding CLIs navigate career pages, reason over CV/job fit, personalize PDFs, update trackers, deduplicate applications and keep a TUI/dashboard view of the pipeline.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #6 in AI Agent on June 9 with +754 stars today; GitHub showed 52.1k stars, 10.5k forks, 259 commits, 88 issues and 79 PRs, with demo images and multilingual README.
   - 可运行性判断：Fast path is npx @santifer/career-ops init, then open Claude/Gemini/Codex/Qwen/OpenCode in the generated workspace; manual clone/npm install and Playwright Chromium setup are documented.
   - 建议动作：High-priority vertical product study. Run onboarding with a dummy CV and compare its data contract, tracker integrity and HITL safeguards against simpler prompt-pack workflows.

2. [esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix](https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix) - Model-specific Coding Agent CLI - Score 89
   - 做什么：DeepSeek-native coding agent for terminal and desktop workflows, redesigned around stable prefix-cache economics, long-running sessions, SEARCH/REPLACE review and Go-based native distribution.
   - 面向谁：Developers using DeepSeek models heavily, especially cost-sensitive users who leave agents running across long coding sessions.
   - AI native 点：It treats model-cache behavior as a product primitive: the agent loop, command set, session memory, MCP wiring and desktop client are all shaped around keeping prompts cache-stable.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #7 in AI Agent on June 9 with +608 stars today; GitTrend repo page showed 13.8k stars, 797 forks and 309 issues, while GitHub showed 747 commits and a main-v2 Go rewrite note.
   - 可运行性判断：Install paths include npm i -g reasonix and brew install esengine/reasonix/reasonix; prebuilt archives and SHA256SUMS are documented for macOS/Linux/Windows.
   - 建议动作：Run a small coding benchmark against generic agents using the same DeepSeek key; inspect whether cache metrics and review/apply loop create a real cost/quality advantage.

3. [CopilotKit/CopilotKit](https://github.com/CopilotKit/CopilotKit) - Agent Frontend / Generative UI Stack - Score 87
   - 做什么：Frontend stack for embedding agents and generative UI into React, Next.js, Angular, Vue, React Native and chat surfaces, with AG-UI protocol positioning.
   - 面向谁：Product teams and frontend engineers building user-facing AI copilots, in-app agents and multi-surface assistant experiences.
   - AI native 点：The AI surface is not a chat widget bolted on later; it exposes one agent backend across app UI, mobile, team chat and generative UI components.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #10 in AI Agent on June 9 with +468 stars today; GitHub showed 10,905 commits plus monorepo packages, SDKs, docs, showcase and skills folders.
   - 可运行性判断：React/Next.js and React Native quickstarts are GA, Angular/Vue supported, and Slack/Teams/Discord/Google Chat are marked beta/early-access.
   - 建议动作：Track as a protocol/product layer. Test a tiny internal dashboard copilot and compare AG-UI ergonomics against ad hoc streaming UI implementations.

4. [lfnovo/open-notebook](https://github.com/lfnovo/open-notebook) - Self-hosted NotebookLM / RAG Workspace - Score 85
   - 做什么：Open-source NotebookLM-like workspace with notebooks, AI providers, API/frontend structure, Docker deployment, local/Ollama option and persistent data service.
   - 面向谁：Researchers, students, content teams and knowledge workers who want NotebookLM-style workflows outside a closed hosted product.
   - AI native 点：It packages source-grounded AI synthesis into a deployable workspace: users bring documents/data, configure model providers, then create notebooks with local or API models.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #9 in AI Skills on June 9 with +702 stars today; GitHub showed 739 commits and a structured repo with api, frontend, examples, docs, tests and Docker files.
   - 可运行性判断：README provides docker-compose.yml, SurrealDB service, app ports 8502/5055, encryption key setup, provider registration and Ollama/local AI option.
   - 建议动作：Run the Docker compose path with a small document set and compare ingestion, citation behavior and provider configuration against hosted NotebookLM.

5. [dontbesilent2025/dbskill](https://github.com/dontbesilent2025/dbskill) - Business Diagnosis Agent Skills - Score 82
   - 做什么：Chinese business diagnosis toolbox distilled into 21 agent skills for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Trae Solo and similar agent workbenches.
   - 面向谁：Creators, founders, consultants and operators who want repeatable business/content/decision diagnostics inside coding-agent style tools.
   - AI native 点：The product is an agent skill operating system: routing, diagnostics, content systems, decision records, learning flows, state save/restore and report generation are encoded as reusable agent workflows.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #1 in AI Coding Assistant on June 6 with +1.7k stars today; GitHub showed 6.4k stars, 834 forks, 53 commits and a visible v2.14.2 update note.
   - 可运行性判断：Install paths include Claude plugin marketplace commands, npx skills add for Codex/Claude Code, Trae Solo zip packages, and local build scripts.
   - 建议动作：Use as a vertical-skill case study: inspect packaging, routing and state persistence patterns; do not treat it as a generic agent platform benchmark.

6. [phuryn/pm-skills](https://github.com/phuryn/pm-skills) - Product Management Agent Skill Marketplace - Score 80
   - 做什么：PM skill marketplace with 68 skills and 42 chained workflows across 9 plugins for discovery, strategy, execution, launch, growth and AI-built code shipping.
   - 面向谁：Product managers and founders who want structured PM frameworks inside Claude Code, Claude Cowork and Codex-like agent environments.
   - AI native 点：It turns PM methods into executable agent workflows with marketplace/plugin installation, chained commands and framework-specific skills rather than static templates.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend AI Skills ranked it #10 on June 9 with +486 stars today; GitHub README shows installation for Claude Cowork, Claude Code and Codex CLI plus marketplace screenshots.
   - 可运行性判断：Claude plugin marketplace and Codex plugin marketplace commands are documented; slash command behavior differs by host, which needs practical audit.
   - 建议动作：Watch and sample one discovery-to-PRD workflow. Promote only if chained workflows produce better decisions than a good checklist plus general LLM.

7. [Panniantong/Agent-Reach](https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach) - Agent Internet Reach CLI - Score 79
   - 做什么：CLI/scaffold that gives agents searchable/readable access to web and social sources including X/Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, Douyin, LinkedIn, RSS and WeChat.
   - 面向谁：Research-agent builders and operators who need broad source collection without implementing every connector from scratch.
   - AI native 点：It packages external-world perception tools for agents with channel setup, diagnostics, dry-run safety and pluggable upstream dependencies.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #3 in AI Agent on June 9 with +1.1k stars today and 24.3k stars; it remained a strong carry-over signal from yesterday.
   - 可运行性判断：README describes CLI/scaffold concepts, doctor/install/safe/dry-run flow and per-channel dependencies, but this run did not clone or test credentials.
   - 建议动作：Track for radar-workflow reuse, but audit credential handling, platform ToS exposure and source-quality controls before using logged-in social channels.

8. [uditgoenka/autoresearch](https://github.com/uditgoenka/autoresearch) - Autonomous Research Skill Loop - Score 77
   - 做什么：Claude/OpenCode/Codex skill that runs a goal-directed modify-verify-keep/discard loop with commands, safety hooks and guided installation.
   - 面向谁：Agent power users trying to automate iterative research, benchmarking, debugging or eval loops inside coding assistants.
   - AI native 点：It formalizes an autonomous agent loop around measurable goals, repeated verification and rollback/keep decisions, exposed as skills and commands across multiple hosts.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #10 in AI Coding Assistant on June 6 with +369 stars today; GitHub README advertises support for Claude Code, OpenCode and OpenAI Codex with 13 commands and 9 safety hooks.
   - 可运行性判断：Guided installer supports OpenCode and Codex, with manual copy fallback into .agents/skills/autoresearch; local behavior still needs a controlled run.
   - 建议动作：Use as a small experiment candidate for this radar itself: test whether it can run a bounded source-collection/evaluation loop without drifting.

## Watchlist

- [tw93/Waza](https://github.com/tw93/Waza) - Engineering Habits Skills - Score 73 - Engineering habits packaged as Claude-runnable skills. 建议：Watch; promote only if it proves more than a skill/prompt collection.
- [obra/superpowers](https://github.com/obra/superpowers) - Agentic Skills Methodology - Score 72 - Agentic skills framework and software-development methodology across Claude, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini and Copilot. 建议：Watch as methodology reference; avoid Top unless new product surface emerges.
- [Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything](https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything) - Interactive Code Knowledge Graph - Score 72 - Interactive code knowledge graph with search/Q&A for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot and Gemini CLI. 建议：Compare later against Graphify and CodeGraphContext on one known repo.
- [CodeGraphContext/CodeGraphContext](https://github.com/CodeGraphContext/CodeGraphContext) - Code Context MCP - Score 70 - MCP server plus CLI that indexes local code into a graph database for AI assistants. 建议：Keep in context-engineering watchlist; do not duplicate experiments until one code-graph tool wins.

## Skip Reasons

- [Leonxlnx/taste-skill](https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill) - High GitTrend rank, but mainly a taste/style skill pack; useful as workflow inspiration, not enough durable UI/CLI/API product surface for today's Top list.
- [affaan-m/ECC](https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC) - Repeated abnormal star velocity and very high headline numbers; product shape still reads closer to agent harness methodology than a validated user-facing product. Requires API/community verification.
- [multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills](https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills) - Single CLAUDE.md/prompt-methodology style project; downgraded because it lacks a runnable product workflow.
- [FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide](https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide) - Documentation/guide repository rather than AI-native product surface.
- [rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch](https://github.com/rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch) - Educational/build-from-scratch content; outside the product-shaped agent/workflow focus.

## 今日趋势观察

1. 垂直 agent 产品正在从“提示词包”升级成领域操作系统：Career-Ops、dbskill、PM Skills 都在把知识、流程、状态和产物交付放进同一个 agent 工作台。
2. Coding agent 进入模型经济学阶段：Reasonix 把 DeepSeek prefix-cache 稳定性当成产品核心，说明下一轮差异化会来自 agent loop 与模型特性的深绑定。
3. Agent UI/前端协议继续升温：CopilotKit 的 AG-UI/generative UI 方向说明“让 agent 进入真实产品界面”仍是高价值基础设施层。
4. 自托管知识工作台有产品化空间：open-notebook 这类 NotebookLM 替代品开始把 Docker、Provider 配置、本地模型和持久化作为第一屏能力。
5. Skills 生态出现两极：一边是可安装、可组合的垂直工作流，另一边是单文件/方法论集合；本雷达继续优先前者。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：试跑 Career-Ops 的 dummy profile 流程，观察它如何组织 agent、数据契约、PDF 和 tracker。
- 第二优先级：用 Reasonix 做一次小型代码任务，记录 cache 命中、成本、review/apply 体验。
- 第三优先级：用 open-notebook 跑 Docker compose，验证 NotebookLM 替代品的部署摩擦和引用质量。
- 低成本观察：关注 CopilotKit/AG-UI 是否成为多端 agent UI 的事实协议，暂不把纯 skill/prompt spike 当成产品趋势。

## 信息来源

- GitTrend AI Agent: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-agent
- GitTrend AI Coding Assistant: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-coding-assistant
- GitTrend AI Skills: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-skills
- GitTrend DeepSeek-Reasonix repo page: https://gittrend.io/repo/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
- GitHub README pages: santifer/career-ops、esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix、CopilotKit/CopilotKit、lfnovo/open-notebook、dontbesilent2025/dbskill、phuryn/pm-skills、Panniantong/Agent-Reach、uditgoenka/autoresearch、tw93/Waza、obra/superpowers。

runs.markdownReport:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-09

数据窗口：2026-06-06 18:17 至 2026-06-09 18:17（Asia/Shanghai）。本次是同日二次运行，更新当天 `data/runs/2026-06-09.*`，重点使用 GitTrend 6 月 6-9 日 AI Agent / AI Coding Assistant / AI Skills 趋势页、GitHub README 页面和定向搜索。

关键假设：本地 `gh` 不存在，本轮没有 clone 或实际运行仓库；GitTrend 的 star velocity 只作为方向性信号，异常高星项目继续降权。筛选偏向真实产品形态、可运行 UI/CLI/API、明确用户场景、安装/文档/截图/演示完整度和复刻价值。

## Top Projects

1. pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus - Self-hosted AI Workspace - Score 92
   - GitHub: https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus
   - 做什么：Self-hosted AI workspace for chat, agents, deep research, documents, notes/tasks, email/calendar integrations, local/API model backends and admin-gated local tools.
   - 面向谁：Local-first AI users, builders, creators and small teams who want a private ChatGPT/Claude-style workspace they control.
   - AI native 点：The product is an AI operating workspace: LLM chat, agent tools, memory, research, documents, calendar/email and model serving converge into one self-hosted app.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #2 overall on June 8 with +2.2k stars today and 63.9k stars; GitHub README shows 23 commits, 48 issues, 69 PRs, Docker/native/macOS/Windows launchers and a security-heavy setup guide.
   - 可运行性判断：Docker Compose starts the app plus ChromaDB, SearXNG and ntfy; native macOS/Linux/Windows commands are documented; no local run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：High priority trial. Run Docker or macOS launcher locally and inspect agent permissions, admin controls, memory/doc flows and model-provider setup.

2. chopratejas/headroom - Agent Context Compression / MCP - Score 90
   - GitHub: https://github.com/chopratejas/headroom
   - 做什么：Local-first layer that compresses tool outputs, logs, RAG chunks, files and conversation history before they reach an LLM, exposed as library, proxy, wrapper and MCP server.
   - 面向谁：Heavy Claude/Codex/Cursor/Aider/Copilot users and agent-platform builders paying high context/token costs.
   - AI native 点：It attacks agent runtime economics directly: reversible context compression, retrieval-on-demand, cross-agent memory and failure mining become part of the agent loop.
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitTrend ranked it #3 overall on June 8 with +2.0k stars today and 19.0k stars; GitHub page showed 19.6k stars, 1.3k forks, 1,489 commits, 126 issues and 93 PRs.
   - 可运行性判断：pip/npm/Docker install paths, headroom wrap/proxy/MCP commands, benchmarks, docs, examples and tests are present; no local run audit performed.
   - 建议动作：Run a controlled Codex/Claude comparison on the same repo and measure prompt size, retrieval misses and answer quality.

3. nexu-io/open-design - Agent-native Design Studio - Score 88
   - GitHub: https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design

- SWE-agent/mini-swe-agent - Minimal Coding Agent CLI - Score 72 - https://github.com/SWE-agent/mini-swe-agent - Small AI agent for solving GitHub issues or command-line software tasks. 建议：Watch as a baseline implementation rather than a full product surface.

- affaan-m/ECC: https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC - GitTrend and topic pages show huge star velocity, but prior run already flagged the signal as abnormal; treat as unverified until GitHub API/community validation. Product shape is also closer to an agent harness/skills methodology than a clear user product.
- Leonxlnx/taste-skill: https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill - High GitTrend rank, but appears to be a taste/style skill pack rather than a runnable AI-native product with a durable UI/CLI/API workflow.
- mattpocock/skills: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills - Likely useful skill directory, but mainly a personal skills collection; does not meet this radar run’s product-surface threshold.
- angelos-p/llm-from-scratch: https://github.com/angelos-p/llm-from-scratch - Educational/training-oriented repository, outside the product-shaped AI agent/workflow focus.

## 今日趋势观察

1. 自托管 AI workspace 重新升温：Odysseus 说明“本地模型 + agent 工具 + 文档/邮件/日历 + 管理权限”正在形成大众可理解的产品形态。
2. 上下文工程正在基础设施化：Headroom 把压缩、可逆检索、agent wrapper、MCP 和失败学习放到同一个 runtime 层，说明 token 成本已经成为产品机会。
3. Skills 进入供应链阶段：Agent Skills、Graphify、last30days-skill、Taste Skill 等说明 skill 不再只是 prompt 文件，安全、安装、版本、来源和可运行性会变成竞争点。
4. Agent GUI 正在贴近具体工作台：Open Design、OpenChamber、JetBrains CC GUI 分别切入设计、OpenCode 和 JetBrains IDE，控制面越来越垂直。
5. 代码知识图谱出现第二波：Graphify / Understand Anything / CodeGraphContext 都在争夺“让 coding agent 先理解项目结构”的入口，短期需要真实代码库试跑区分效果。

## 今日建议动作

- 第一优先级：本地试跑 Odysseus 或 Headroom，一个看产品完整度，一个看 agent runtime 成本。
- 第二优先级：把 Graphify 或 Understand Anything 跑在一个熟悉项目上，比较它们是否真的减少 agent 读代码时间。
- 第三优先级：观察 Open Design 的 DESIGN.md + 插件 + MCP 模型，判断能否迁移到内部设计/文档生成流程。
- 风险控制：对 GitTrend 中几十万 star 的异常项目保持审慎，必须 API/社区二次验证后再进入 Top。

## 信息来源

- GitTrend overall trending: https://gittrend.io/
- GitTrend AI Agent: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-agent
- GitTrend AI Coding Assistant: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-coding-assistant
- GitTrend AI Skills: https://gittrend.io/trending/ai-skills
- GitHub README pages: pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus、chopratejas/headroom、nexu-io/open-design、tech-leads-club/agent-skills、safishamsi/graphify、Panniantong/Agent-Reach、openchamber/openchamber、zhukunpenglinyutong/jetbrains-cc-gui。

runs.dataWindow: 2026-06-05 10:17 to 2026-06-08 10:17 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub topic/repository pages and AI Native Landscape pages for recently updated or newly visible AI agent, MCP, RAG, workflow, browser/code/assistant automation repositories.
runs.sourceSummary: Live GitHub Topic pages, GitHub repository README pages, and AI Native Landscape. Local gh was unavailable and shell curl to GitHub failed because 127.0.0.1:7890 proxy was not reachable; no clone/run audit was performed.
runs.trendObservations: AI coding-agent products are moving from single-agent execution toward multi-agent control planes; MCP opportunity is shifting toward debugging, eval, OAuth, gateway, and governance tooling; always-on agent platforms emphasize identity, triggers, browser runtime, and durable operations; memory/context layers are splitting into personal memory, code graph context, and session intelligence.
runs.assumptions: Prioritized product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, explicit user scenarios, documentation, demos/examples/screenshots, and visible page-level activity. Pure guides, prompt/template collections, awesome lists, paper/benchmark repos, and marketing-only shells were downgraded. Growth signals are qualitative page observations and should be API-verified before investment decisions.

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-08

数据窗口：2026-06-05 10:17 至 2026-06-08 10:17（Asia/Shanghai）。重点查看 GitHub Topic 最近更新列表、仓库 README、可运行入口、demo/screenshots、stars/forks/issues/PR/commits 等页面信号。

关键假设：本地 `gh` 不可用，shell 侧 `curl` 被本机 `127.0.0.1:7890` 代理配置阻断；本轮使用实时 GitHub/AI Native Landscape 网页审计，没有 clone 或实际运行仓库。分数偏向真实产品形态、可运行 UI/CLI/API、文档完整度、近期活跃和可复刻价值；纯指南、模板、awesome list、论文/benchmark、低代码空壳项目降权。

## Top Projects

1. shep-ai/shep - Coding Agent Control Plane - Score 89
   - GitHub: https://github.com/shep-ai/shep
   - 做什么：用 CLI + Web Dashboard 管理多个 AI coding agent 并行开发，每个任务独立 worktree，可自动 commit、push、开 PR、看 CI、失败重试。
   - 面向谁：同时跑 Claude Code、Cursor CLI、Gemini CLI 等 coding agent 的工程团队和独立开发者。
   - AI native 点：产品核心不是写代码本身，而是把多个 agent 的执行生命周期、隔离、审计和 PR 流程产品化。
   - 增长/活跃信号：仓库页显示约 203 stars、31 forks、1,026 commits、63 issues、33 PR；README 有 Shep Cloud、localhost dashboard、CLI、CI auto-fix 等完整产品叙事。
   - 可运行性判断：支持 `npx @shepai/cli`、`npm i -g @shepai/cli`，本地启动 `shep` 打开 `localhost:4050`，具备截图和命令示例；未实际运行。
   - 建议动作：高优先级复刻拆解，重点看 worktree 隔离、agent session 状态机、CI 失败回收和 PR 审批边界。

   - 增长/活跃信号：仓库页显示约 2k stars、237 forks、3,814 commits、45 issues、56 PR；MCP server Topic 页显示 2026-06-02 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：提供 hosted app、desktop app、`npx @mcpjam/inspector@latest`、Docker 四条路径；README 有 demo、CLI、SDK、CI 说明。
   - 建议动作：作为 MCP 开发工具链标杆，优先试用 hosted/npx 路径，提炼“trace + eval + OAuth debugger”产品模块。

## Watchlist

- 20alexl/claude-engram - Coding Agent Memory - Score 72 - https://github.com/20alexl/claude-engram - 方向是 Claude Code hook + session intelligence + cross-session search，适合观察 agent memory 是否从工具库走向产品；需要确认跨 agent 支持和安装路径。

- blackwell-systems/knowing - Code Graph Context Layer - Score 81 - https://github.com/blackwell-systems/knowing - 已进 Top，但 adoption 很早；建议在小仓库做一次实际 MCP 工具调用后再提高优先级。

- shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice：https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice - stars 异常高，定位更像 best practice/agentic engineering 内容页，缺少清晰产品运行面。
- thinkwee/AgentsMeetRL：https://github.com/thinkwee/AgentsMeetRL - Agentic RL awesome list，偏资料索引，不符合产品形态优先标准。
- Gudvin82/vibe-coding-protocols：https://github.com/Gudvin82/vibe-coding-protocols - 有实用模板价值，但本轮判定为 markdown protocol/template collection。

## 今日趋势观察

1. AI coding agent 生态正在从“单 agent 写代码”转向“多 agent 执行控制面”：worktree、PR、CI、日志、恢复、审批变成核心产品面。
2. MCP 的机会从 server 数量增长转向开发者工具和治理工具：inspector、eval、OAuth debugger、gateway、HITL、audit log 会逐渐标配。
3. 长时运行 agent 产品正在强调身份和触发器：email/SMS/webhook/schedule/event queue 让 agent 更像“可联系的数字同事”。
4. Agent memory/context 层出现分化：个人记忆、代码图谱上下文、session mistake mining 是不同赛道，短期更适合作为基础设施试验。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先试跑 Shep：验证 `npx @shepai/cli`、dashboard、worktree/PR/CI loop 是否真能闭环。
- 用 MCPJam Inspector 调试一个本地 MCP server，把 trace/eval/OAuth debugger 的产品模块拆成可复刻清单。
- 为 Gobii 建一张“always-on agent 平台”卡片，重点看 agent identity、schedule/event trigger、browser task API。
- 选 knowing 或 cortex 做一个 30 分钟小实验，确认 memory/context 层和本地 Codex 工作流的结合点。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-07

数据窗口：2026-06-04 12:56 至 2026-06-07 12:56（Asia/Shanghai），重点查看 GitHub 近期更新、Topic 新鲜度、README 产品证据、安装路径、demo/examples、issues/PR/release 活跃度。

关键假设：本地 `gh`/GitHub API 仍不可用，本次基于实时 GitHub 页面与 Topic/Search 页面审计；未 clone 或实际运行仓库。分数偏向真实产品形态、可运行 UI/CLI/API、文档完整度、近期活跃和可复刻价值。6 月 5 日已入选的 Dograh、WeKnora、Stagehand、Cua 等项目仅作为趋势背景，今天不重复进入 Top。

## Top Projects

1. NousResearch/hermes-agent - General AI Agent Runtime - Score 91
   - GitHub: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
   - 做什么：NousResearch 的通用 agent 项目，围绕 Hermes 模型生态提供可执行 agent 能力。
   - 面向谁：想基于开源模型构建 agent runtime、研究/产品化 agent 行为的开发者和实验团队。
   - AI native 点：模型、agent loop、工具使用和可运行代码是主体，不只是模型权重说明。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 185k stars、31.8k forks，并在 2026-06-07 更新；体量异常高，需后续用 API 二次确认。
   - 可运行性判断：仓库有 README 与代码入口，但本轮未 clone/run；建议先做依赖与示例审计。
   - 建议动作：加入高优先级复核，确认 stars/README/许可/运行路径是否真实匹配。

2. zhayujie/CowAgent - Agent Workflow / WeChat Assistant - Score 88
   - GitHub: https://github.com/zhayujie/CowAgent
   - 做什么：面向微信、企业微信和飞书的 AI agent 框架，支持任务自动化、上下文理解和工具集成。
   - 面向谁：要把 AI assistant 接入 IM 场景、客服、个人助手或企业流程的开发者。
   - AI native 点：IM 会话、agent 编排、上下文、插件/工具和自动化动作直接组成产品体验。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 8.1k stars、1.5k forks，2026-06-07 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：项目形态明确，适合从 IM bot 到 workflow assistant 复刻；需要后续验证部署文档和渠道配置门槛。
   - 建议动作：做一张 IM-agent 产品卡，重点看飞书/企微接入、插件机制和安全边界。

3. iOfficeAI/AionUi - AI Agent Web UI - Score 87
   - GitHub: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/AionUi
   - 做什么：Web 端 AI agent UI/工作台，面向多 agent 或 assistant 操作界面。

4. jackwener/OpenCLI - AI CLI / Agent Shell - Score 85

6. CherryHQ/cherry-studio - Desktop AI Assistant - Score 83
   - GitHub: https://github.com/CherryHQ/cherry-studio
   - 做什么：跨平台桌面 AI assistant，整合多模型、对话、知识和生产力工作流。
   - 面向谁：重度 AI 用户、知识工作者和需要本地桌面 assistant 的团队。
   - AI native 点：多模型、多会话、知识工作台和桌面入口构成完整 AI app，而非 SDK。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 31.9k stars、3k forks，2026-06-07 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：桌面产品成熟，通常有 release/app 交付；本轮主要观察近期活跃，不重复审计基础功能。
   - 建议动作：作为桌面 assistant 体验标杆，关注 plugin/MCP/本地知识库演进。

7. santifer/career-ops - Vertical AI Workflow App - Score 80
   - GitHub: https://github.com/santifer/career-ops
   - 做什么：垂直职业运营/求职流程自动化项目，用 AI 支撑简历、申请和跟进流程。
   - 面向谁：求职者、职业教练、个人效率工具开发者。
   - AI native 点：把 LLM 放进具体业务流，产品价值来自端到端任务完成，而不是泛聊天。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 716 stars、105 forks，2026-06-07 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：垂直场景明确，适合复刻；需要后续确认 UI、数据模型和第三方集成。
   - 建议动作：作为“垂直 workflow agent”样本拆解，关注 onboarding 和任务闭环。

8. MotiaDev/motia - Evented AI Workflow Backend - Score 79
   - GitHub: https://github.com/MotiaDev/motia
   - 做什么：面向 API、events、background jobs 和 agentic workflow 的统一后端框架。
   - 面向谁：需要把 agent 步骤与生产后端事件流整合的工程团队。
   - AI native 点：把 agent/workflow 运行纳入事件驱动 backend，而不是独立脚本。
   - 增长/活跃信号：GitHub Topic 页面显示约 7.6k stars、556 forks，2026-06-06 更新。
   - 可运行性判断：框架/平台形态较成熟，适合做 agent workflow backend 评估；需验证 AI examples 深度。
   - 建议动作：观察其与 Mastra、Activepieces、LangGraph 类项目在 workflow runtime 上的分工。

## Watchlist

- sansan0/TrendRadar - Trend Monitoring Agent - Score 74 - GitHub Topic 页面显示约 3.6k stars、386 forks，2026-06-07 更新；方向契合“自动化雷达”，但需要确认数据源、调度和消息投递是否产品化。
- supermemoryai/supermemory - Memory API / Knowledge Layer - Score 76 - 约 13.3k stars、1.2k forks，2026-06-07 更新；长期价值高，但更偏基础设施，等更多 agent app 样例。
- upstash/context7 - MCP Documentation Context - Score 77 - 约 26.8k stars、1.4k forks，2026-06-07 更新；MCP 文档上下文很强，但更像 agent infra。
- FlowiseAI/Flowise - Low-code LLM App Builder - Score 75 - 约 45.2k stars、24.1k forks，2026-06-06 更新；成熟度高，本次作为基准观察，避免每日重复入 Top。

## Skip Reasons

- zed-industries/zed：编辑器产品很强，虽然 AI 相关活跃，但本轮重点是 AI-native product 仓库，Zed 的主体仍是编辑器平台。
- public-apis/public-apis：大型 API 列表，非 AI 产品、agent、RAG 或 workflow app。
- drawdb-io/drawdb：数据库设计工具，产品形态清晰但 AI native 属性不足。
- OpenBB-finance/OpenBB：金融平台成熟，但本轮没有足够信号说明近期 AI-native 功能是核心变化。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 产品正在分化成三层：底层 agent runtime/CLI，中层 workflow backend/automation，上层 agent UI/desktop assistant。
2. IM/飞书/企微类 agent 仍是最容易落地的垂直入口，因为输入、身份、通知和审批天然存在。
3. AI workflow 平台正在靠近传统 automation 平台，MCP/agent action 会成为连接器市场的新增长点。
4. “趋势监控/知识雷达/记忆层”开始变成 agent 产品的基础能力，值得和本自动化流程互相借鉴。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先复核 NousResearch/hermes-agent 的异常高 star/fork 信号，确认是否为真实产品增长。
- 选 CowAgent 或 career-ops 做一次垂直 workflow agent 拆解，关注从触发到交付结果的闭环。
- 把 AionUi、Cherry Studio、OpenCLI 放入“agent UI/CLI 交互形态”对比表。
- 观察 Activepieces/Motia 如何把 agent 步骤接入生产 workflow runtime。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-05

数据窗口：2026-06-02 10:21 至 2026-06-05 10:21（Asia/Shanghai）。

关键假设：GitHub API 在本地不可用（`gh` 未安装，`api.github.com` DNS 失败），因此本次采用实时 GitHub 仓库页/README 证据；未 clone 或实际运行仓库。分数偏向产品形态、可运行性、场景清晰度、近期活跃与可复刻价值。

## Top Projects

1. dograh-hq/dograh - Voice Agent Platform - Score 92
   - GitHub: https://github.com/dograh-hq/dograh
   - 做什么：开源、自托管的 Vapi/Retell 替代方案，用拖拽工作流构建生产级语音 agent。
   - 面向谁：要部署客服、销售、电话自动化或语音交互流程的团队。
   - AI native 点：LLM/STT/TTS/BYOK、MCP native、telephony、workflow builder 是核心产品面。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 4.2k stars、842 forks、535 commits、16 issues、12 PRs，README 有产品截图、文档、云端入口和对比表。
   - 可运行性判断：有 `docker-compose.yaml`、`docker-compose-local.yaml`、API/UI/SDK/docs/examples；适合优先本地复刻。
   - 建议动作：优先试跑本地 Docker，拆解 workflow builder + voice runtime 架构。

2. Tencent/WeKnora - RAG Knowledge Agent Platform - Score 90
   - GitHub: https://github.com/tencent/WeKnora
   - 做什么：把文档转成可查询 RAG、自治推理 agent 和自维护 Wiki。
   - 面向谁：企业知识库、内部问答、IM 知识助手、私有化 RAG 团队。
   - AI native 点：ReAct agent、MCP 工具、web search、Wiki Mode、知识图谱、Feishu/Notion/Yuque 同步和 IM 渠道集成。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 15.1k stars、1.9k forks、1,670 commits、153 issues、30 PRs；v0.5.2 更新包含 MCP HITL approval、Wiki graph、Yuque connector、CLI preview。
   - 可运行性判断：仓库包含 frontend、docker、helm、mcp-server、cli、docs、examples、docker-compose。
   - 建议动作：跟踪 Yuque/Feishu connector + agentic wiki，抽取为内部知识库实验。

3. github/gh-aw - Agentic Workflow CLI - Score 88
   - GitHub: https://github.com/github/gh-aw
   - 做什么：用自然语言 Markdown 编写 agentic workflow，并在 GitHub Actions 中运行。
   - 面向谁：希望把 issue triage、代码维护、自动修复、仓库运营流程放进 CI 的工程团队。
   - AI native 点：agent workflow 作为 repo 原生工件，支持 Copilot、Claude、Codex、Gemini，并带 guardrails 与 human approval。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 4.6k stars、415 forks、12,531 commits、192 issues、9 PRs；README 有近期版本退役提醒和安全架构说明。
   - 可运行性判断：有 CLI、安装脚本、docs、actions、Dockerfile、quickstart。
   - 建议动作：做一个“每日仓库维护/PR 评论处理”workflow 小实验。

4. trycua/cua - Computer-Use Agent Infrastructure - Score 87
   - GitHub: https://github.com/trycua/cua
   - 做什么：为能控制完整桌面环境的 computer-use agents 提供 sandboxes、SDK、benchmarks 和 driver。
   - 面向谁：构建桌面自动化、GUI agent、系统级评测环境的 AI infra 团队。
   - AI native 点：agent 可在 macOS/Windows/Linux 桌面中后台点击、输入、验证，面向 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex、MCP/custom clients。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 17.6k stars、1.1k forks、3,478 commits、123 issues、230 PRs。
   - 可运行性判断：有 docs、examples、demo、notebooks、Dockerfile、Package.swift、pyproject、tests。
   - 建议动作：加入 Watch+实验，评估是否能支撑浏览器/桌面 agent benchmark。

5. browserbase/stagehand - Browser Agent SDK - Score 86
   - GitHub: https://github.com/browserbase/stagehand
   - 做什么：用自然语言和代码共同控制浏览器，把 AI-driven 操作转成更可维护的自动化。
   - 面向谁：生产环境 web 自动化、数据抽取、QA、运营流程自动化团队。
   - AI native 点：`act`、`agent`、`extract`、preview、auto-caching、self-healing，把 LLM 灵活性和代码确定性结合。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 22.9k stars、1.5k forks、1,310 commits、95 issues、138 PRs；最新 release `@browserbasehq/browse-cli@0.6.1` 标注 Jun 3, 2026。
   - 可运行性判断：`npx create-browser-app`、pnpm build、example script、docs、env example。
   - 建议动作：复用作浏览器 agent baseline，比较 BrowserOperator/Webwright 路线。

6. ShayneP/local-voice-ai - Local Voice Agent - Score 84
   - GitHub: https://github.com/ShayneP/local-voice-ai
   - 做什么：单容器本地实时语音 AI 助手，集成 STT、LLM、TTS、LiveKit 和 Next.js UI。
   - 面向谁：想构建私有、本地或混合云语音助手的个人开发者和小团队。
   - AI native 点：本地 supervisor 管理 LiveKit、llama.cpp、Nemotron/Whisper、Kokoro、LiveKit Agents worker，能按 URL 切换云服务。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 512 stars、162 forks、37 commits，README 给出架构图、Docker、GPU、Apple Silicon 和云 provider 替换路径。
   - 可运行性判断：`docker compose up --build`，本地打开 `localhost:8080`；首次模型下载成本高。
   - 建议动作：作为 voice-agent 最小可复刻样板，重点验证硬件成本与首启体验。

7. macOS26/Agent - Desktop Agent App - Score 82
   - GitHub: https://github.com/macOS26/Agent
   - 做什么：macOS 26 桌面 agent harness，用于 computer use、automation、scripting、coding。
   - 面向谁：希望让本地 Mac 桌面变成可代理操作环境的 power users 和开发者。
   - AI native 点：支持 18+ 本地/云 LLM provider，面向桌面任务、脚本、代码和自动化。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 468 stars、36 forks、591 commits；有 Xcode project、helper、tests、docs、build.sh。
   - 可运行性判断：需要 macOS 26.4.1+；可作为本地 app 源码构建，但系统版本门槛高。
   - 建议动作：Watch，后续若出现稳定 release 或 demo 再做深度体验。

8. DemonDamon/AgenticX - Multi-Agent Platform - Score 80
   - GitHub: https://github.com/DemonDamon/AgenticX
   - 做什么：统一多 agent 平台，包含 Python SDK、CLI、Studio server、Machi desktop app。
   - 面向谁：想统一多 agent 编排、记忆、MCP Hub、IM gateway 和桌面形态的开发者。
   - AI native 点：Meta-Agent、15+ LLM provider、hierarchical memory、avatar/group chat、skill ecosystem、safety sandbox、GUI agent reflection。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 132 stars、19 forks、2,127 commits；仓库结构完整，有 desktop、deploy、enterprise、examples、tests。
   - 可运行性判断：可 `pip install agenticx`，按 feature extras 安装 memory/document/graph/llm/monitoring。
   - 建议动作：加入长期跟踪；先验证 README 功能是否已稳定落地。

## Watchlist

- ag-ui-protocol/ag-ui - Agent UI Protocol - Score 74 - 14k stars、2,046 commits；`npx create-ag-ui-app` 很顺手，但更偏协议/SDK，等更多产品化 app 模板出现。
- faramesh/faramesh-core - Agent Governance - Score 72 - 60 stars、250 commits、v0.2.0 on May 24；agent tool-call policy daemon 很有趋势价值，但当前更偏治理基础设施。
- openai/codex - Coding Agent CLI - Score 78 - 88.6k stars、7,150 commits；产品影响力极强，但非今日新发现，作为生态基准观察。
- humanlayer/12-factor-agents - Agent Engineering Reference - Score 68 - 原则型内容仓库，适合作为设计参考，不进入产品 Top。

## Skip Reasons

- Supersynergy/awesome-ai-agents-2025：awesome list/目录型内容，缺少单一可运行产品面。
- G1o22/awesome-ai-agents-2026：聚合列表，存在大量二手描述，适合作为发现源，不适合作为 Top 项目。
- VoltAgent/awesome-ai-agent-papers：论文列表，主要是研究导航，非可运行产品。
- QAInsights/awesome-ai-tools：工具清单/目录，缺少可运行仓库产品形态。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Voice agent 开源栈开始从“demo assistant”走向“可部署平台”：Dograh 面向 Vapi/Retell 替代，local-voice-ai 面向单容器私有化。
2. Desktop/browser agent 的主战场在可靠性：Cua 强调后台 computer-use，Stagehand 强调自然语言与代码混合、缓存、自愈。
3. RAG 产品正在合并 agent、wiki、IM、连接器与 MCP 审批：WeKnora 的 v0.5.2 是比较清晰的企业知识产品样本。
4. Agent governance 变成独立层：Faramesh 把每次 tool call 变成可审计政策决策，值得后续跟踪。

## 今日建议动作

- 先试跑 Dograh 或 local-voice-ai，建立 voice-agent 可运行样板。
- 用 Stagehand/Cua 对比一个固定网页任务，观察“可重复执行”和“恢复失败”的工程设计。
- 为 WeKnora 做一张 RAG+Wiki+IM+MCP approval 的产品拆解卡。

# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-06-04

数据窗口：2026-06-01T02:17:12Z to 2026-06-04T02:22:12Z

信息来源：实时 Web/GitHub 搜索与公开仓库页；参考本地 2026-06-02 和 2026-06-03 radar，降低重复项目权重。当前 shell 环境无 gh CLI，curl 对 api.github.com 未返回可用内容，因此未使用 GitHub API 增强；本轮未 clone 或本地运行仓库，可运行性基于 README、安装入口、examples/demo/docker/API/CLI 信号判断。

## Top Projects

### 1. smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go
- GitHub: https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go
- 分类：MCP Gateway / Agent Tooling Infrastructure
- AI Native Product Score：88
- 做什么：Go 实现的 MCP 代理/网关，把多个 MCP server 的接入、路由和管理集中到一个更可部署的服务层。
- 面向谁：需要把内部工具、SaaS API、数据源统一接入 Claude/Cursor/Codex 等 agent 客户端的平台工程团队。
- AI native 点：核心价值是让 agent 工具调用从“本地配置文件”升级为可运维、可治理的工具网关。
- 增长/活跃信号：MCP gateway/proxy 在近期搜索中显著增多，说明团队开始从单个 MCP server 转向工具层基础设施。
- 可运行性判断：Go 服务形态清晰，预期具备 CLI/服务端启动路径；本轮未 clone，需下一步核验 config、auth、multi-server routing 和日志。
- 建议动作：优先试跑。用 3 个 MCP server 组成最小工具网关，验证鉴权、路由、失败隔离和审计日志。

### 2. openswarm-os/openswarm
- GitHub: https://github.com/openswarm-os/openswarm
- 分类：Multi-agent Workflow / Agent OS
- AI Native Product Score：86
- 做什么：面向多 agent 协作的开源工作流/运行环境，强调把多个专长 agent 组织成可执行任务系统。
- 面向谁：需要构建 research、coding、ops、support 等多角色 agent workflow 的 AI 产品团队。
- AI native 点：产品形态围绕 agent 编排、任务分解、工具调用和协作状态，而不是单次 chatbot。
- 增长/活跃信号：multi-agent/agent OS 在近期搜索中继续升温，且和 OpenHands、Mastra、VoltAgent 形成不同层级的对照。
- 可运行性判断：仓库定位偏 runtime/workbench，需进一步核验 demo、CLI/UI、状态可观测性和失败恢复。
- 建议动作：Watch + 小样复刻。用“自动研究一个 GitHub 项目并输出复刻计划”测试多 agent 协作质量。

### 3. 1mcp-app/agent
- GitHub: https://github.com/1mcp-app/agent
- 分类：MCP Agent Client / Tool Aggregation
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：围绕 MCP 工具生态构建 agent/client，把多工具接入、任务执行和用户交互放在同一产品面。
- 面向谁：想把 MCP 从开发者配置变成可用 agent 应用的个人用户、开发者和内部工具团队。
- AI native 点：agent 能力来自工具生态聚合，用户价值来自“自然语言目标 -> MCP 工具链执行”。
- 增长/活跃信号：MCP client/agent 类项目在 72 小时窗口内出现频繁，说明协议侧需求开始向终端产品迁移。
- 可运行性判断：需要核验桌面/CLI/UI 入口、MCP server 配置和示例任务完整度；本轮未本地运行。
- 建议动作：加入 MCP agent client 横评，重点比较配置成本、工具发现、执行日志和权限提示。

### 4. hyprmcp/jetski
- GitHub: https://github.com/hyprmcp/jetski
- 分类：MCP Server Management / Agent Tool Discovery
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：围绕 MCP server 发现、安装或管理的工具，目标是降低 agent 工具接入成本。
- 面向谁：频繁试用 MCP server、需要管理多工具环境的 AI 工程师和团队。
- AI native 点：agent 的生产力取决于可用工具集，Jetski 这类管理层项目解决“工具如何被找到、安装、启用”的关键摩擦。
- 增长/活跃信号：MCP server 数量快速增长后，registry/manager/proxy 类项目开始变成新层级。
- 可运行性判断：需下一步确认命令行安装、server manifest 兼容性和是否支持主流 MCP client。
- 建议动作：Watch。若支持一键安装/启用多个 server，可进入 MCP 工具链复刻实验。

### 5. BrowserOperator/browser-operator-core
- GitHub: https://github.com/BrowserOperator/browser-operator-core
- 分类：Browser Agent / Web Task Automation
- AI Native Product Score：81
- 做什么：面向浏览器任务执行的 agent core，让 AI 根据目标理解网页、规划动作并操作页面。
- 面向谁：做网页自动化、QA、运营后台流程、数据采集和表单处理的开发团队。
- AI native 点：浏览器被抽象成 agent execution environment，核心是页面理解、动作选择、上下文恢复和任务完成度。
- 增长/活跃信号：Webwright、browser-use、Skyvern、Playwright MCP 之外仍有新 browser-agent core 出现，赛道继续扩散。
- 可运行性判断：核心库形态明确，需审计 examples、模型配置、浏览器依赖和失败处理；本轮未运行。
- 建议动作：放入 browser-agent benchmark 候选，用同一表单/后台任务测成功率。

### 6. gerkensm/callcenter.js-mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/gerkensm/callcenter.js-mcp
- 分类：Voice Agent / Call Center MCP
- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：把 call center/电话交互能力接入 MCP，使 agent 可以围绕电话客服或语音流程调用工具。
- 面向谁：想把客服、电话机器人、工单和 CRM 动作连起来的 voice-agent 实验团队。
- AI native 点：语音交互、业务工具和 agent 调用协议结合，适合从“聊天助手”进入真实电话工作流。
- 增长/活跃信号：voice agent 从通用实时框架向垂直场景移动，电话/客服是最早有 ROI 的方向之一。
- 可运行性判断：MCP server/JS 形态易于接入，但需核验电话 provider、凭证配置和 demo；本轮未运行。
- 建议动作：复刻候选。做一个只读客服场景：来电摘要 -> 查询知识库 -> 生成工单建议。

### 7. relevanceai/file-search-mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/relevanceai/file-search-mcp
- 分类：RAG / File Search MCP
- AI Native Product Score：77
- 做什么：通过 MCP 暴露文件搜索/检索能力，让 agent 能围绕本地或托管文件执行问答与检索任务。
- 面向谁：需要给 Claude/Cursor/自建 agent 加入文件级 RAG 搜索的开发者和知识库团队。
- AI native 点：RAG 从独立应用后端变成 agent 可调用工具，适合嵌入多步骤工作流。
- 增长/活跃信号：RAG-MCP 连接器仍持续出现，说明检索能力正在协议化。
- 可运行性判断：MCP server 形态明确，需核验索引流程、文件权限、查询延迟和返回格式。
- 建议动作：Watch + 横评。与 Context7、Graphiti、传统向量库接入做检索质量对照。

### 8. alejandroqh/repo39
- GitHub: https://github.com/alejandroqh/repo39
- 分类：Code Agent Context / Repository Search
- AI Native Product Score：73
- 做什么：面向 agent 的代码仓库理解/检索工具，目标是帮助 coding agent 更快定位 repo 中相关上下文。
- 面向谁：构建 coding agent、代码审查 agent 或需要大仓库语义检索的工程团队。
- AI native 点：把代码库上下文供给做成 agent 的基础能力，直接影响自动编码、审查和修复质量。
- 增长/活跃信号：coding-agent 热潮带动 repo search/context layer 项目出现；项目仍早期，适合观察而非立即生产使用。
- 可运行性判断：需核验 CLI/API、索引方式、语言覆盖和与现有 agent 的集成方式；本轮未运行。
- 建议动作：保留 Watch/实验。用本仓库做索引测试，看是否能提升 issue triage 上下文命中。

## Watchlist

### superplan-md/superplan-plugin
- GitHub: https://github.com/superplan-md/superplan-plugin
- 分类：Agent Planning / IDE Workflow
- Score：72
- 简述：面向 AI/code agent 的计划与任务组织插件，可能补足 coding agent 的长期任务管理。
- 建议动作：等文档、IDE 集成和真实 demo 更明确后再升 Top。

### modelcontextprotocol/registry
- GitHub: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry
- 分类：MCP Registry / Ecosystem Infrastructure
- Score：72
- 简述：MCP server 发现和分发基础设施方向重要，但更像生态底座而非单一产品。
- 建议动作：持续跟踪 registry 标准，作为 MCP manager/proxy 项目的兼容性基准。

### HexStrike-AI/HexStrike-AI
- GitHub: https://github.com/HexStrike-AI/HexStrike-AI
- 分类：Security Agent / MCP Offensive Security
- Score：71
- 简述：安全 agent + MCP 工具编排信号强，但风险边界和使用约束需要仔细审计。
- 建议动作：只做防御/授权测试场景评估，关注权限、审计和安全 disclaimer。

### Canner/WrenAI
- GitHub: https://github.com/Canner/WrenAI
- 分类：AI Data Analyst / BI Copilot
- Score：70
- 简述：数据分析 assistant 产品形态成熟，今天未进入 Top 是因为近期新增信号弱于 MCP/agent infra。
- 建议动作：作为“AI analyst”产品基线保留，后续看 release 和企业连接器更新。

## Skip Reasons

- Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT：历史影响大，但今天窗口内不是新产品信号，且已不适合作为新增 radar Top。
- langchain-ai/langchain、run-llama/llama_index：基础框架生态重要，但本简报优先产品型应用、agent workbench、MCP 工具链。
- awesome-*、prompt collection、course/tutorial 仓库：可作为发现源，不进入产品雷达 Top。
- paper reproduction、benchmark-only、thin SDK wrapper：缺少明确用户场景或可运行产品面，统一降权。
- 只有 README、无代码/无示例/无安装入口的营销仓库：跳过，不伪造为 GitHub repo 条目。

## 今日趋势观察

1. MCP 的新增机会从 server 本身转向 gateway、registry、manager、client 和垂直业务 connector。
2. Browser agent 竞争焦点变成可治理执行：权限、审计、失败恢复和 human-in-the-loop 比单纯能点网页更重要。
3. Voice agent 正向电话客服、会议、质检等具体工作流落地，MCP 会成为语音 agent 连接业务系统的常见协议。
4. Coding agent 的下一层基础设施是 repo context、计划管理、执行边界和安全审计。
5. “产品形态”越来越体现在安装路径、demo、执行日志、权限配置和失败处理，而不是 README 里的 agent 概念。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先复刻：MCP Gateway 最小实验。用 mcpproxy-go 连接 file-search、GitHub/本地 repo search、一个 SaaS MCP server，观察 agent 工具发现和日志。
- 第二优先：Browser-agent benchmark。把 BrowserOperator 加入 Webwright/browser-use/Skyvern/Playwright MCP 同题横评。
- 第三优先：Voice-agent MCP 实验。用 callcenter.js-mcp 设计只读客服闭环，暂不接真实外呼。
- 长期跟踪：MCP registry 标准变化，决定后续项目卡片是否按 server/manager/proxy/client 分层维护。

## 关键假设

- 本轮增长信号为 2026-06-04 运行时公开搜索和仓库页快照，可能随 GitHub 索引和 star/update 快速变化。
- 当前环境无法用 gh CLI 或 GitHub API 做数值增强，未声称精确 star 增长。
- 本轮未 clone/执行仓库；所有可运行性为 README、仓库结构、安装入口和产品面信号判断。
- 已在 2026-06-02/2026-06-03 Top 出现的项目，今天只在有新趋势价值时进入 Watchlist 或跳过原因。

runs.dataWindow: 2026-05-31T02:18:46Z to 2026-06-03T03:12:00Z; GitHub repositories newly surfaced, recently updated, released, or showing visible product-shaped growth in AI agent, browser agent, MCP, AI workflow, code agent, voice agent, assistant infrastructure, and automation categories.
runs.sourceSummary: Real-time web/GitHub search and public repository pages opened during this run; local 2026-06-02 radar was checked to reduce simple repetition. Shell network access to api.github.com was unavailable in the sandbox, so live GitHub API enrichment was not used. No repositories were cloned or executed locally; runnability is judged from public README/search snippets, repository product surface, Docker/CLI/API/demo/docs signals, and prior radar continuity.
runs.trendObservations: The strongest new signal is that agent products are becoming narrower and more operational: browser agents are moving from demo runtimes into governed enterprise web automation, MCP servers are appearing as vertical control planes for cloud/dev platforms, and voice agents are converging on self-hostable real-time infrastructure. Compared with 2026-06-02's terminal coding-agent focus, today's better opportunity is to test supervised web automation and platform MCP integrations as repeatable product loops.
runs.assumptions: Scores prioritize product-shaped repositories with a runnable UI/CLI/API, clear user scenario, real workflow, install/deploy path, examples/demo/docs, and recent visible activity. Star/release/update counts are approximate public snapshots from repository/search pages at run time and may change quickly. Projects already covered in previous runs were only promoted again when they added a fresh comparison angle. Pure paper reproductions, benchmarks, prompt collections, awesome lists, thin SDK wrappers, and documentation-only projects are downgraded or skipped. This run performed real-time repository/search audit but did not clone, build, or execute code.

# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-06-03

数据窗口：2026-05-31T02:18:46Z to 2026-06-03T03:12:00Z

信息来源：实时 Web/GitHub 搜索与公开仓库页；参考本地 2026-06-02 radar，避免重复上一轮 terminal coding-agent 主线。当前 sandbox 无法解析 api.github.com，因此未使用 GitHub API 增强；本轮未 clone 或本地运行仓库，可运行性基于 README、repo product surface、Docker/CLI/API/demo/docs 信号判断。

## Top Projects

### 1. microsoft/Webwright
- GitHub: https://github.com/microsoft/Webwright
- 分类：Enterprise Browser Agent / Governed Web Automation
- AI Native Product Score：91
- 做什么：面向企业网页工作流的开源 browser agent，把自然语言任务转成可审计的浏览器操作。
- 面向谁：需要让 AI 处理后台系统、Web 表单、运营流程、QA 流程的企业工程与自动化团队。
- AI native 点：浏览器不是脚本录制器，而是由目标、页面理解、动作执行、人工监督和治理策略组成的 agent workbench。
- 增长/活跃信号：本轮 browser-agent 搜索中作为 Microsoft 新项目反复出现；与 Skyvern、browser-use、Playwright MCP 构成清晰分层对照。
- 可运行性判断：公开仓库以产品型 browser agent 为目标，具备微软组织背书；本轮未 clone，需下一步审计安装、认证、策略配置与 demo 完整度。
- 建议动作：优先试跑。用同一个企业后台表单任务横评 Webwright、Skyvern、browser-use 与 Playwright MCP。

### 2. VoltAgent/voltagent
- GitHub: https://github.com/VoltAgent/voltagent
- 分类：TypeScript Agent Framework / Workflow Runtime
- AI Native Product Score：88
- 做什么：TypeScript AI agent 框架，面向应用开发者提供 agents、tools、memory、workflow、observability 等工程化能力。
- 面向谁：正在用 TS/Node 构建生产级 AI agent、SaaS 内嵌 assistant、自动化 workflow 的团队。
- AI native 点：把 agent 的工具调用、状态、观察性和工作流组织成应用 runtime，而不只是一次性 LLM 调用。
- 增长/活跃信号：本轮 agent framework 搜索中信号强，产品文档与开发者定位清晰；与 Mastra、LangGraph、OpenAI Agents SDK 属同一工程化赛道。
- 可运行性判断：README/docs 指向 npm/TypeScript 开发体验与示例路径；本轮未本地执行。
- 建议动作：做一个“issue triage agent + Slack/Lark 通知”的最小样例，看 workflow、memory、observability 是否比自写 glue code 更省。

### 3. mastra-ai/mastra
- GitHub: https://github.com/mastra-ai/mastra
- 分类：Agent Workflow Framework / AI App Backend
- AI Native Product Score：87
- 做什么：用于构建 AI agents、workflow、RAG 和 eval 的 TypeScript 框架，强调从原型到生产的后端能力。
- 面向谁：希望用 TS 统一管理 agent、RAG、tools、eval、deployment 的 AI 产品工程团队。
- AI native 点：把 agentic workflow、检索、工具、评测与部署合在一个 AI app backend 中，是 AI-native app 的工程底座。
- 增长/活跃信号：近期持续出现在 agent workflow/framework 搜索中，文档和生态定位明确；与 VoltAgent 构成 TS agent runtime 对照组。
- 可运行性判断：公开文档/README 指向可安装 SDK、示例和生产化组件；本轮未执行。
- 建议动作：与 VoltAgent 做同题实现：RAG + tool call + eval，把开发摩擦和可观测性列成对照表。

### 4. block/goose
- GitHub: https://github.com/block/goose
- 分类：Code Agent / Desktop Automation Agent
- AI Native Product Score：86
- 做什么：Block 开源的本地 AI agent，可在开发环境中执行代码、调用工具、操作项目上下文并辅助软件工程任务。
- 面向谁：需要更开放可扩展 coding agent、桌面开发 agent、内部工具 agent 的工程团队。
- AI native 点：把本机工具、文件、命令、扩展能力和模型推理整合成可监督的开发 agent loop。
- 增长/活跃信号：本轮 code-agent/automation 搜索中继续高频出现，且与 Codex、Gemini CLI、opencode 不同，强调扩展和桌面/工具生态。
- 可运行性判断：仓库有明确安装与使用路径；本轮未本地运行。
- 建议动作：纳入 coding-agent 横评的“可扩展本地 agent”样本，重点看 extension、权限和任务恢复。

### 5. railwayapp/railway-mcp-server
- GitHub: https://github.com/railwayapp/railway-mcp-server
- 分类：Cloud Platform MCP / Deployment Agent Connector
- AI Native Product Score：84

- microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners: 教程课程，适合学习但不是可运行产品 runtime。
- sindresorhus/awesome: awesome/list 类型可作为发现源，不进入产品排名。
- modelcontextprotocol/servers: MCP 参考/聚合价值高，但今天更关注 Render/Railway 这类垂直平台 MCP。
- HumanLayer/12-factor-agents: 方法论文/工程原则价值高，适合修订 rubric，不作为产品型 Top 项目。
- 纯 prompt collection、benchmark-only、paper reproduction、thin SDK wrapper：本轮统一降权或跳过。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Browser agent 正从“能点网页”进入“企业级可治理自动化”：Webwright/Skyvern/browser-use/Playwright MCP 的差异开始落在权限、监督、失败恢复、审计与部署形态上。
2. MCP 进入垂直平台连接器阶段：GitHub MCP 之后，Render/Railway 这类 PaaS 控制面开始变成 agent 可调用工具。
3. Voice agent 更接近真实 AI-native 产品形态：LiveKit Agents/Pipecat 把实时音频、LLM、TTS、工具和会话状态合成新的交互层。
4. Agent 安全和治理开始出现产品位：agent-discover-scanner 说明企业会先问“我们到底部署了哪些 agent、它们能做什么”。
5. TypeScript agent runtime 赛道开始拥挤：VoltAgent 与 Mastra 都在争夺“AI app backend”的开发者心智，值得用同一任务压测。

## 今日建议动作

- 优先复刻：企业后台表单 browser-agent benchmark。输入自然语言任务，比较 Webwright、Skyvern、browser-use、Playwright MCP 的成功率、审计轨迹和失败恢复。
- 第二优先：PaaS MCP DevOps agent。用 Railway/Render MCP 做“读部署状态 -> 总结问题 -> 建议操作”的只读闭环。
- 第三优先：语音 agent demo。用 LiveKit Agents 做一个低延迟会议行动项或客服质检原型。

## 关键假设

- GitHub star/update/release 为 2026-06-03 运行时公开页面和搜索结果快照，可能快速变化。
- 本轮无法使用 api.github.com，因此增长信号偏定性；已在 source_summary 中标注。
- 本轮未 clone/执行仓库；可运行性为 README、仓库结构、安装入口、demo/docs 的实时审计判断。
- 已在 2026-06-02 Top 中出现的项目，今天只在有新对照价值时进入 Watchlist。

### 8. microsoft/magentic-ui

## Watchlist

### google-gemini/gemini-cli
- GitHub: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli

- Score：78
- 简述：Google Gemini 终端 coding-agent 入口，若 release cadence 稳定，会成为 Codex 的直接对照物。
- 建议动作：下轮重点查 release、安装路径、repo editing 能力和 sandbox 行为。

### microsoft/playwright-mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/microsoft/playwright-mcp
- 分类：MCP Browser Automation
- Score：76
- 简述：把 Playwright 浏览器自动化作为 MCP server 暴露给 agents，是 browser-use 类产品的重要底层接口。

### getzep/graphiti
- GitHub: https://github.com/getzep/graphiti
- 分类：Temporal Knowledge Graph / Agent Memory
- Score：74
- 简述：上一轮 memory trend 的延伸，但更偏长期知识图谱和 temporal context。

## Skip Reasons

- awesome/curated list：可作为发现源，但不是可运行产品。
- prompt collection / skill collection：缺少独立 runtime 或清晰用户场景时跳过。
- paper reproduction / benchmark-only：即使 star 增长快，也不符合 AI Native Product 口径。
- thin SDK wrapper：只封装模型 API、没有 UI/CLI/API 工作流时降权。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent 产品正在从“单 agent demo”转成“control plane + execution substrate”：Sim 负责流程编排，DeerFlow 负责长任务 harness，Daytona 负责代码执行隔离。
2. Coding agent 的竞争维度不再只是模型能力，而是 CLI/桌面/UI、sandbox、patch review、MCP/extensions、provider 多样性。
3. Browser agent 进入基础设施化阶段：browser-use、Magentic-UI、Playwright MCP 分别占据库、工作台、协议层位置。
4. 昨天的 memory-server 热点没有消失，但今天更应把注意力放在 agent 如何“跑起来、被控制、被验证”。

## 关键假设

- GitHub star/release/commit 信息为 2026-05-31 运行时页面快照。
- 本轮未本地 clone/运行仓库；可运行性为 README 和仓库结构审计。
- 评分优先产品形态、真实 workflow、安装路径、demo/docs 和最近 release，而不是单纯 star 数。

# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-05-30

数据窗口：2026-05-27T00:00:00Z to 2026-05-30T03:17:45Z; GitHub repositories created, recently crawled, recently updated, or showing visible star growth in the last 24-72 hours

信息来源：GitHub repository pages and search snippets opened during this run, a current Reddit/GitHub-growth roundup surfaced by web search, and prior local radar runs to avoid repeating stale themes. Shell curl to api.github.com failed because DNS was unavailable in the sandbox, so repository metadata was audited via browser-accessible pages/snippets rather than GitHub API cloning.

## Top Projects

### 1. tinyhumansai/openhuman
- GitHub: https://github.com/tinyhumansai/openhuman
- 分类：AI Companion / Human-like Agent Product
- AI Native Product Score：92
- 做什么：Open-source product for building persistent AI humans/companions with memory, voice, avatar, and app-like interaction surface.
- 面向谁：Builders exploring AI companions, digital humans, coaching/education assistants, and consumer-facing agent experiences.
- AI native 点：The product is not a wrapper around chat; identity, persistence, multimodal interaction, and relationship memory are the core product primitives.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in a current fastest-growing AI repo roundup with roughly 17k stars and about +15k weekly growth; GitHub page was reachable during the run.
- 可运行性判断：README/product framing indicates a concrete open-source app surface rather than only a paper or prompt collection; marked for hands-on audit before production use.
- 建议动作：Create a project card and run a local install audit next; compare memory/avatar/voice architecture with consumer companion products.

### 2. colbymchenry/codegraph
- GitHub: https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph
- 分类：Code Agent Context / MCP Code Intelligence
- AI Native Product Score：91
- 做什么：Local pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Gemini, and other coding agents.
- 面向谁：Developers and engineering teams that ask coding agents to work inside large repositories.
- AI native 点：It directly changes agent context acquisition by exposing repository structure, semantic search, call graphs, and impact analysis through local CLI/MCP tooling.
- 增长/活跃信号：Continues to appear in recent AI repo growth signals after the 2026-05-28 radar; prior local run recorded about 29.8k stars and a recent v0.9.5 release on 2026-05-25.
- 可运行性判断：README documents one-line install paths, npx/npm usage, codegraph init, and local operation without API keys.
- 建议动作：Keep as benchmark project; run it against this repo and one larger repo to measure agent tool-call/token reduction.

### 3. supertone-inc/supertonic
- GitHub: https://github.com/supertone-inc/supertonic
- 分类：Realtime Voice Agent / Local TTS
- AI Native Product Score：89
- 做什么：Open-source neural text-to-speech stack optimized for expressive local speech synthesis and voice-agent use cases.
- 面向谁：Voice-agent builders, local AI app developers, audio product teams, and researchers shipping interactive speech UX.
- AI native 点：Low-latency expressive voice output is a core interface layer for voice agents, not a secondary media export feature.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in a current fastest-growing AI repo roundup with roughly 6.8k stars and about +5.5k weekly growth.
- 可运行性判断：Repository presents runnable open-source TTS code rather than a paper-only asset; needs local dependency/GPU audit before deeper recommendation.
- 建议动作：Add to voice-agent watchlist and test minimal synthesis path; compare latency and voice quality against hosted TTS APIs.

### 4. CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
- GitHub: https://github.com/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
- 分类：Browser Agent / Privacy-preserving Automation
- AI Native Product Score：87
- 做什么：Browser-oriented agent surface focused on safe/private web automation and user-controlled browsing workflows.
- 面向谁：Builders creating web agents, browser automation products, and privacy-sensitive personal assistants.
- AI native 点：The browser becomes the agent runtime boundary: browsing, tool execution, privacy control, and user-visible automation are treated as product primitives.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current AI growth results with roughly 9.4k stars and +872 weekly growth; category aligns with repeated browser-agent demand.
- 可运行性判断：GitHub repo presents a product-shaped browser project; local run needs follow-up because no shell network clone was possible during this run.
- 建议动作：Run install audit and inspect permission model, profile isolation, and whether automation APIs are durable enough for agents.

### 5. yigitkonur/humanlayer-agentmemory
- GitHub: https://github.com/yigitkonur/humanlayer-agentmemory
- 分类：Agent Memory / HumanLayer-compatible MCP
- AI Native Product Score：86
- 做什么：Memory layer for AI agents intended to persist context across sessions and make agent workflows less stateless.
- 面向谁：Agent builders, Claude/Codex power users, and teams evaluating durable memory for engineering or personal assistants.
- AI native 点：Persistent memory changes the agent interaction model from single-session prompting to long-running product behavior.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current AI growth results with roughly 614 stars and +465 weekly growth; agent memory remains a repeated theme across this and prior runs.
- 可运行性判断：Appears as a concrete repository for agent memory rather than an essay; installation/API depth still needs hands-on verification.
- 建议动作：Create project card; compare data model, privacy controls, and retrieval semantics against Redis/Neo4j memory servers.

### 6. redis/agent-memory-server
- GitHub: https://github.com/redis/agent-memory-server
- 分类：Agent Memory Infrastructure / MCP Server
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：Redis-backed memory server for agents, positioning Redis as operational memory infrastructure for AI apps.
- 面向谁：Teams already using Redis, agent-platform engineers, and LLM app builders needing durable low-latency memory.
- AI native 点：It treats memory as infrastructure that agents can read/write through a server interface, making recall part of the runtime stack.
- 增长/活跃信号：Search surfaced the repo in current MCP/agent-memory queries; vendor-backed memory infrastructure is consistent with the week’s memory trend.
- 可运行性判断：Repository name and positioning indicate server product surface; local start/Docker path needs direct audit before adoption.
- 建议动作：Watch and test if Redis is already in stack; evaluate schema portability, TTL strategy, and MCP/client compatibility.

### 7. ruvnet/RuView
- GitHub: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
- 分类：Screen Understanding / Edge AI Assistant
- AI Native Product Score：82
- 做什么：AI screen-perception assistant for understanding what is on screen and supporting contextual local workflows.
- 面向谁：Desktop assistant builders, accessibility/productivity app developers, and users exploring local screen-aware agents.
- AI native 点：Screen perception is a missing sensory layer for personal agents; the product angle is giving agents grounded context from the user interface.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current growth results with roughly 1.4k stars and +1.4k weekly growth, suggesting fast discovery from near-zero baseline.
- 可运行性判断：Repository appears product-shaped around screen AI; needs install and privacy/permission audit because screen capture is high-risk.
- 建议动作：Move to watch + experiment; evaluate macOS permissions, on-device vs cloud processing, and latency in real desktop workflows.

### 8. jayzeng/agentmemory
- GitHub: https://github.com/jayzeng/agentmemory
- 分类：Agent Memory / Developer Library
- AI Native Product Score：78
- 做什么：Developer-facing agent memory repository aimed at giving LLM agents a reusable persistence and recall layer.
- 面向谁：Developers adding memory to custom agents and internal assistants.
- AI native 点：Memory is core product behavior for agents that need continuity, preferences, project facts, and prior decisions.
- 增长/活跃信号：Search surfaced the repo in current agentmemory queries; included because multiple memory projects appeared simultaneously in the same window.
- 可运行性判断：Likely more library/API than full app; retained in Top because it addresses a sharp agent-runtime pain point, but scored below richer product surfaces.
- 建议动作：Compare against other memory servers; keep only if README exposes clear examples, storage model, and integration path.

## Watchlist

### neo4j-labs/agent-memory
- GitHub: https://github.com/neo4j-labs/agent-memory
- 分类：Graph-based Agent Memory
- Score：74
- 简述：Neo4j-backed agent memory concept that maps naturally to knowledge graph retrieval and relationship-heavy recall.

- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current memory-server searches; vendor-backed graph memory is aligned with the week’s agent-memory cluster.
- 可运行性判断：Promising infrastructure angle, but product surface and quickstart maturity need deeper audit.

### agentralabs/agentic-memory

- 分类：Agent Memory / MCP Server

- 简述：Another entrant in the emerging memory-server/MCP-memory space.
- 观察理由：Confirms that memory is becoming an agent platform component rather than a feature tucked into individual apps.
- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current MCP memory search results; kept as a cluster signal rather than single-project conviction.
- 可运行性判断：Needs README/install/examples audit.
- 建议动作：Use as comparison point when building a memory feature matrix.

### themindvirus/ViMax
- GitHub: https://github.com/themindvirus/ViMax
- 分类：AI Visualization / Reasoning Interface
- Score：68
- 简述：Visual/interaction layer for AI reasoning or model workflows, with signs of strong early discovery.

- 增长/活跃信号：Surfaced in current growth results with roughly 5.8k stars and +5.8k weekly growth from a very new baseline.

## Skip Reasons

- humanlayer/12-factor-agents：https://github.com/humanlayer/12-factor-agents。跳过原因：High-signal methodology/documentation repository, but not a runnable product with UI/CLI/API surface for this radar rubric.
- abordage/awesome-mcp：https://github.com/abordage/awesome-mcp。跳过原因：Awesome/list repository; useful discovery source, but not product software.
- Imbad0202/academic-research-skills：https://github.com/Imbad0202/academic-research-skills。跳过原因：Skill/prompt workflow collection for research tasks; useful but lacks independent product runtime.

## 今日趋势观察

1. Agent memory 正在从“聊天历史”变成基础设施：Redis、Neo4j、HumanLayer/AgentMemory 这类项目都在争夺 agent runtime 的持久上下文层。
2. 代码上下文仍然是 coding agent 的最高频痛点：CodeGraph 代表的本地索引/MCP 工具继续有产品化价值。
3. Voice agent 的开源栈开始补“可本地运行、可控延迟、可表达”的 TTS 层，Supertonic 值得与商业 TTS API 做延迟和质量对照。
4. Browser/screen-aware agent 的边界正在扩大，但这类项目必须重点审计权限、隐私、profile 隔离和失败回滚。
5. 高星增长不等于产品成熟：方法论、awesome list、skill collection 继续降权，除非出现安装器、运行时、治理台或明确 demo。

## 关键假设

- 本期 shell 无法解析 api.github.com；没有使用 GitHub API，也没有 clone 后本地执行。
- “最近 24-72 小时”按最近创建、最近爬取/搜索曝光、最近更新或明显星标增长综合判断。
- Star/growth 数字是运行时近似信号，用于排序参考，不作为精确指标。
- Skip list 只记录真实 GitHub 仓库；类型级跳过规则写在本节，不伪造仓库。

Recent repos that expose one-command install, MCP integration, Docker, Web UI, or dashboard flows scored higher than pure framework, skill collection, or benchmark repositories.
runs.assumptions: Scoring prioritizes runnable UI/CLI/API, clear user workflow, documentation/examples, recent release or crawl signal, and visible GitHub traction. Repository star/fork numbers are approximate snapshots from GitHub pages opened during the run. Local curl to api.github.com failed because DNS was unavailable in the shell sandbox, so metadata was cross-checked through browser-accessible GitHub pages and search snippets. Repos covered in the previous run were excluded unless they had a distinct new signal.

# Daily AI Native Product GitHub Radar - 2026-05-28

数据窗口：2026-05-25T00:00:00Z 到 2026-05-28T03:33:38Z。重点看最近 24-72 小时新建、最近 crawled/released、活跃更新或增长明显的 AI agent / LLM app / RAG / MCP / workflow / browser agent / code agent / voice agent / assistant / automation / copilot 项目。

## Top Projects

### 1. colbymchenry/codegraph
- GitHub: https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph
- 分类：Code Agent Context / MCP Code Intelligence
- AI Native Product Score：92
- 做什么：为 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode、Gemini 等代码代理提供本地预索引代码知识图谱，减少文件扫描、token 和工具调用。
- 面向谁：经常让 coding agent 读大型代码库的开发者、AI coding power users、工程团队。
- AI native 点：核心价值直接服务 agent 的上下文获取路径，把 repo 结构、调用关系、影响分析做成 MCP/CLI 工具，而不是普通代码搜索。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub 页面显示约 29.8k stars、1.7k forks、378 commits；搜索结果显示 2026-05-25 发布 v0.9.5，新增 shared MCP daemon，解决多代理同项目重复 watcher/SQLite/index 成本。
- 可运行性判断：README 提供 macOS/Linux/Windows 一行安装、npx/npm 入口和 codegraph init；100% local，无需 API key。
- 建议动作：优先试跑在本仓库和一个大型前端/Swift repo 上，验证 Codex/Claude Code 的工具调用减少是否稳定。

### 2. ComposioHQ/agent-orchestrator
- GitHub: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/agent-orchestrator
- 分类：Parallel Coding Agent Orchestration
- AI Native Product Score：90
- 做什么：调度并行 AI coding agents，每个任务/issue 使用独立 git worktree、branch 和 PR，并自动处理 CI 失败、review comments、merge conflicts。
- 面向谁：希望把 Claude Code/Codex/Aider 等代理放进真实工程流水线的工程团队和平台团队。
- AI native 点：不是单个 agent，而是 agent fleet 的管理层，把计划、执行、反馈修复和 PR 生命周期做成产品。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub 页面显示约 7.3k stars、989 forks、1,274 commits、数百 issues/PRs；搜索结果显示最近 5 天被爬取。
- 可运行性判断：README 提供 npm 全局安装、source setup、ao start 启动 dashboard；依赖 Node、Git、gh CLI、tmux/ConPTY。
- 建议动作：本地用一个小型 repo dry-run，重点看权限隔离、GitHub token 范围、失败回滚和人工审批点。

### 3. HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
- GitHub: https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
- 分类：Domain AI Agent / Trading Workflow / MCP
- AI Native Product Score：87
- 做什么：面向交易和投研的个人 trading agent，包含 CLI/TUI、FastAPI Web UI、MCP server、回测、数据源、swarm presets 和量化 alpha zoo。
- 面向谁：个人量化交易者、投研团队、需要把市场数据/回测/报告接入 agent 的金融技术用户。
- AI native 点：将交易研究任务拆成工具、agent team preset、MCP 能力和 Web/CLI 交互，而不是简单金融聊天机器人。

- 可运行性判断：支持 pip install vibe-trading-ai、vibe-trading serve、vibe-trading-mcp、Docker、Web UI、CLI；README 给出 demo 和 quick start。
- 建议动作：只做沙盒评估，不接真实账户；重点检查数据源稳定性、策略回测可复现性和财务风险免责声明。

### 4. builderz-labs/mission-control
- GitHub: https://github.com/builderz-labs/mission-control
- 分类：Agent Ops Dashboard / Self-hosted Control Plane
- AI Native Product Score：84
- 做什么：自托管 AI agent 编排和运维 dashboard，用于派发任务、监控 agent fleet、成本、日志、token、memory、安全、cron、webhooks 等。
- 面向谁：运营多个 agent 工作流的工程团队、内部自动化平台和 AI ops 团队。

- 可运行性判断：提供 bash install.sh --local / --docker、pnpm dev、docker compose、GHCR image；SQLite local-first，无强制 Redis/Postgres。
- 建议动作：加入重点 watch；先用 demo 数据评估 dashboard 信息架构和安全默认值，再考虑真实任务接入。

### 5. vbcherepanov/total-agent-memory
- GitHub: https://github.com/vbcherepanov/total-agent-memory

- AI Native Product Score：82

- 面向谁：长期使用 coding agents、希望跨会话保留偏好/项目知识/过程记忆的开发者。
- AI native 点：记忆层直接改变 agent 行为和跨会话能力，重点不是人类笔记，而是 agent 可召回、可巩固、可查询的上下文系统。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub 页面显示约 42 stars、11 forks、47 commits；搜索结果显示 2 天内被爬取，README 标注 2026-05-24 v12.2.0 修复 Codex/env 对齐相关问题。
- 可运行性判断：提供 npx、uvx、pipx、brew、Docker、manual install，多 IDE connect 路径；代码目录含 docs、examples、docker、tests。
- 建议动作：Watch + 小范围试用；重点验证自动保存噪音、隐私边界、数据库迁移和 Codex/Claude Code 配置写入是否可控。

## Watchlist

### github/copilot-cli
- GitHub: https://github.com/github/copilot-cli
- 分类：Official Coding Agent CLI
- Score：74
- 简述：GitHub 官方 Copilot CLI changelog 近期出现 MCP、background agents、remote/session 等能力演进信号。
- 观察理由：产品成熟且非新项目，但官方 CLI 对生态方向有强指示意义。
- 建议动作：跟踪 MCP Tasks、background agents、remote control 是否影响第三方 agent orchestration 产品空间。

### glebis/claude-skills
- GitHub: https://github.com/glebis/claude-skills
- 分类：Agent Skills Collection
- Score：63
- 简述：Claude Code skills 集合，含 deep-research 等工作流技能。
- 观察理由：技能生态在增长，但更像 workflow/package collection，产品面弱。
- 建议动作：观察是否演化成带 UI、registry、安装器或团队治理能力的产品。

### eltociear/awesome-molt-ecosystem
- GitHub: https://github.com/eltociear/awesome-molt-ecosystem
- 分类：AI Agent Ecosystem Intelligence
- Score：58
- 简述：对 AI agent platforms / x402 economy / CVE / bounty 等做生态整理。
- 观察理由：不是产品，但可作为后续雷达的线索源和风险信号源。
- 建议动作：只作为情报源，不进入 Top 项目池。

## Skip Reasons

- glebis/claude-skills：https://github.com/glebis/claude-skills。跳过 Top 原因：技能集合/工作流包，文档有用，但不是独立可运行 AI native 产品。
- eltociear/awesome-molt-ecosystem：https://github.com/eltociear/awesome-molt-ecosystem。跳过 Top 原因：awesome/list/研究型生态整理，不是可运行 UI/CLI/API 产品。
- github/copilot-cli：https://github.com/github/copilot-cli。跳过 Top 原因：官方成熟产品仓库，本期作为趋势观察更合适，不适合作为新发现项目评分。

## 今日趋势观察

1. 代码代理的下一层竞争不只是模型/编辑能力，而是上下文经济：CodeGraph 这类本地索引工具直接用“更少 token/更少 tool calls”卖点打动 agent power user。
2. 代理从个人工具走向 fleet/ops：Agent Orchestrator 和 Mission Control 都把 worktree、CI、PR、dashboard、安全、成本和质量门禁放进核心体验。
3. Memory 重新升温，但好项目开始强调本地、MCP、可迁移和多 IDE，而不是单纯聊天历史。
4. 垂直领域 agent 更容易产品化：Vibe-Trading 有清晰用户、工具链、数据源、Web UI、MCP 和一键安装，比泛 agent demo 更接近真实产品。
5. Skill/prompt/list 类仓库仍很多，除非出现安装器、运行时、团队治理或可观测界面，否则继续降权。

## 关键假设

- 本期未使用 shell 里的 GitHub API，因为 api.github.com DNS 解析失败；浏览器侧 GitHub 页面和搜索片段可用。
- 可运行性判断基于 README、目录结构、安装命令、Docker/Web UI/CLI/MCP 信号，未 clone 后本地执行。
- Star/fork/commit 数是运行时页面快照，可能随时间变化。
- Skip list 只记录真实 GitHub repo；类型级跳过规则写入趋势和假设，不伪造仓库。

MCP remains noisy: many new repos are directories, wrappers, or example packs rather than complete end-user products.

- 建议动作：Watch，重点看是否补齐安装包、权限沙箱和真实工作流 demo。

### 6. e2b-dev/E2B
- GitHub: https://github.com/e2b-dev/E2B
- 分类：Agent Sandbox / Code Interpreter Infrastructure
- AI Native Product Score：77
- 做什么：为 AI agent 提供安全 sandbox 和真实工具环境。
- 面向谁：构建 code interpreter、automation agent、enterprise agent 的开发团队。
- AI native 点：给 agent 一个可控执行环境，是 agent 产品从 demo 走向真实工作的关键底座。
- 增长/活跃信号：GitHub snapshot 显示约 12.3k stars、922 forks，2026-05-27 pushed，成熟项目仍持续活跃。
- 可运行性判断：文档和 SDK/示例成熟，产品化程度高；不是新项目，但当前窗口活跃。
- 建议动作：作为基础设施基准跟踪，不占用过多每日新发现注意力，除非出现重要 release。

## Watchlist

### WingedGuardian/GENesis-AGI
- GitHub: https://github.com/WingedGuardian/GENesis-AGI
- 分类：Autonomous Personal Agent
- Score：69
- 简述：带 persistent memory、self-learning、earned autonomy 叙事的 Python autonomous agent。
- 观察理由：2026-05-27 pushed，约 37 stars；概念贴近个人认知伙伴，但 AGI/自学习叙事偏重，需要验证真实任务能力。
- 建议动作：观察 demo、任务边界、记忆持久化设计和失败处理。

### swarm-ai-safety/swarm
- GitHub: https://github.com/swarm-ai-safety/swarm
- 分类：Multi-agent Safety / Evaluation
- Score：66
- 简述：用于多 agent 系统风险评估的 SWARM 项目。
- 观察理由：2026-05-27 pushed，有站点与讨论区；但更像评估/研究框架，不是直接面向终端用户的产品。
- 建议动作：关注其 multi-agent safety 指标是否被产品团队采用。

## Skip Reasons

- modelcontextprotocol/servers：https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers。跳过原因：MCP server/example 聚合价值高，但更像目录/基础设施集合，不是单一 AI native 产品。
- cline/mcp-marketplace：https://github.com/cline/mcp-marketplace。跳过原因：偏 marketplace submission/data repo，产品表面在 Cline 主产品内，不适合作为独立项目评分。
- swarm-ai-safety/swarm：https://github.com/swarm-ai-safety/swarm。未进入 Top 的原因：安全评估价值明确，但当前更像研究/评估框架，终端用户产品形态弱。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Coding agent 的竞争点正在从“能改代码”转向“长会话、缓存、成本、权限和可恢复性”。DeepSeek-Reasonix 的 prefix-cache 叙事很典型。
2. Agent runtime/sandbox 仍是高价值底座。vm0 和 E2B 都说明真实工作 agent 必须解决执行环境与安全边界。
3. Web UI 壳和桌面本地代理在增多，但质量分化明显：有些是真产品，有些只是把 agent framework 包了一层前端。
4. MCP 噪音继续升高。很多仓库是 registry、server collection 或单工具 wrapper，需要谨慎区分“生态组件”和“产品”。

## 关键假设

- 本期优先新近活跃和产品形态，成熟项目只有在当前窗口继续活跃且代表趋势时才保留。
- 没有伪造跳过仓库；类型级跳过原因写在趋势和假设里，skipped_projects 只记录真实 GitHub repo。
- 可运行性判断基于 README/仓库形态/项目页信号，未在本地 clone 全量执行。

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-05-24

## Data Window

- Window: 2026-05-21 to 2026-05-24, with some 28-day OSSInsight growth context used as a secondary signal.
- Sources: GitHub repository pages, GitHub Search snippets, OSSInsight AI trending snapshot, Reddit launch/discovery threads.
- Constraint: local shell DNS could not resolve api.github.com, so no direct GitHub API enrichment was available.

## Top Projects

### 1. sst/opencode

- GitHub: https://github.com/sst/opencode
- Category: Code Agent / Terminal AI Assistant
- AI Native Product Score: 92
- Does: terminal-native coding agent that lets developers delegate code edits and repo work from the command line.
- For: software engineers and AI-assisted development teams.
- AI native point: the product loop is agentic coding, repo context, tool use, and iterative edits rather than a chat add-on.
- Growth / activity signal: OSSInsight AI trending snapshot showed very strong 28-day star growth, and the repo remains highly visible in coding-agent discussions.
- Runnability: CLI-oriented product surface with install docs and active repo structure.
- Suggested action: try on one contained repo task and compare edit quality, context handling, and rollback workflow against Codex CLI / Claude Code.

### 2. github/github-mcp-server

- GitHub: https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server
- Category: MCP / Developer Automation
- AI Native Product Score: 90
- Does: exposes GitHub context and operations to MCP-compatible assistants.
- For: developers and teams using Claude, Cursor, Codex-style tools, or internal agent workflows around GitHub.
- AI native point: turns GitHub from a UI/API target into a tool surface for agents.
- Growth / activity signal: continued high visibility in MCP trending lists and developer automation discussions.
- Runnability: server-style integration surface; practical value depends on MCP host setup and GitHub permissions.
- Suggested action: keep as a baseline integration for any AI coding or repo-ops workflow; evaluate permission boundaries carefully.

### 3. upstash/context7

- GitHub: https://github.com/upstash/context7
- Category: MCP / Code Context
- AI Native Product Score: 88
- Does: provides fresh documentation/context to AI coding tools through MCP.
- For: developers who want coding agents to use current library docs instead of stale model memory.
- AI native point: improves agent correctness by making external docs a first-class runtime dependency.
- Growth / activity signal: recurring appearance in MCP and AI trending snapshots; strong fit with the current context-injection wave.
- Runnability: MCP server pattern with clear integration intent.
- Suggested action: test on fast-moving frontend/backend libraries where hallucinated APIs are common.

### 4. openai/codex

- GitHub: https://github.com/openai/codex
- Category: Code Agent / CLI
- AI Native Product Score: 87
- Does: command-line coding agent for reading, editing, running, and iterating on software projects.
- For: engineers who want an agentic local development workflow.
- AI native point: coordinates model reasoning with local tools, file edits, and verification loops.
- Growth / activity signal: remains a top AI repository by visibility and ecosystem attention.
- Runnability: CLI product surface with install and usage docs.
- Suggested action: use as a reference for product ergonomics in AI coding agents: permissions, sandboxing, diffs, and verification matter as much as model quality.

### 5. All-Hands-AI/OpenHands

- GitHub: https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands
- Category: Software Engineering Agent
- AI Native Product Score: 86
- Does: autonomous software development agent platform for coding, debugging, and task execution.
- For: engineering teams experimenting with agentic SWE workflows.
- AI native point: the primary interface is task delegation to an agent with tools, environment access, and execution feedback.
- Growth / activity signal: sustained high visibility among open-source SWE agents.
- Runnability: product-shaped with documented setup paths and an established project surface.
- Suggested action: benchmark against narrow issue-fix tasks, not broad vague tickets; measure completion, patch quality, and test behavior.

### 6. microsoft/qlib

- GitHub: https://github.com/microsoft/qlib
- Category: AI Workflow / Quant Research Platform
- AI Native Product Score: 78
- Does: AI-oriented quantitative investment research platform with workflows, data handling, and model experimentation.
- For: quant researchers and financial ML teams.
- AI native point: embeds AI/ML workflows into an end-to-end research product rather than a standalone model repo.
- Growth / activity signal: appeared in current AI trending snapshots with notable recent attention.
- Runnability: mature Python project with docs and examples, but domain setup is heavier than a typical app.
- Suggested action: watch for agentic research workflow integrations; not a top fit for general AI-native product builders unless finance is in scope.

### 7. macOS26/Agent

- GitHub: https://github.com/macOS26/Agent
- Category: Desktop Agent / macOS Assistant
- AI Native Product Score: 74
- Does: early macOS-oriented agent project aiming at desktop task execution.
- For: Mac power users and developers exploring local desktop agents.
- AI native point: tries to connect assistant behavior to operating-system level actions.
- Growth / activity signal: showed up in recent GitHub search around new AI agent repositories.
- Runnability: still needs hands-on validation; product promise is clear but safety and setup maturity need review.
- Suggested action: watch closely, then test in a sandboxed macOS account before granting broad permissions.

### 8. hydro13/tandem-browser

- GitHub: https://github.com/hydro13/tandem-browser
- Category: Browser Agent / MCP
- AI Native Product Score: 72
- Does: browser automation project positioned around tandem use with AI/MCP-style workflows.
- For: developers and operators who want agents to inspect or act in browser contexts.
- AI native point: browser state and actions become part of an agent workflow.
- Growth / activity signal: surfaced in recent MCP/browser-agent search results.
- Runnability: appears early; needs verification of install path, browser permissions, and examples.
- Suggested action: keep in Watch-plus: test only if docs include constrained permissions and reproducible demo flows.

## Watchlist

- shanirsh/prismodev - developer workflow diagnostic / AI coding helper candidate. Promising because it frames a concrete dev-tool loop, but needs more evidence of adoption and end-to-end examples.
- ebin198351-akl/agent-room - MCP server for multi-agent coordination. Interesting coordination primitive, but needs clearer product surface and battle-tested usage beyond launch posts.
- tjfontaine/web-agent-core - web/browser agent core package. Worth monitoring if it becomes a reusable runtime with examples, safety boundaries, and host integrations.
- dashn9/rusty-browser - browser automation / agent candidate. Keep only if runnable examples and non-trivial workflows appear.

## Skip Reasons

- Pure paper reproductions and benchmark-only repos were skipped because they do not expose a product surface.
- Prompt collections and agent prompt packs were skipped unless they included runnable orchestration code.
- Thin SDK wrappers were skipped when they did not add a user-facing workflow, UI, CLI, API, or operational automation layer.
- Marketing/demo-only repositories were skipped when they lacked installable code or reproducible examples.

## Trend Observations

1. MCP is becoming product infrastructure, not just an integration novelty. The strongest repositories turn external systems into tools agents can actually use.
2. Code agents still dominate the AI-native product leaderboard because they combine clear users, frequent workflows, measurable outcomes, and runnable local surfaces.
3. Browser and desktop agents are moving quickly but remain riskier. The gating factors are permission scope, reproducible demos, and recovery from bad actions.
4. Context freshness is now a product feature. Tools like docs/context MCP servers compete directly on reducing stale-code hallucinations.

## Key Assumptions

- Product-shaped means runnable UI, CLI, API, MCP server, or workflow engine with clear docs.
- Directional growth signals are acceptable for this run because direct GitHub API access failed locally.
- Mature high-growth projects can outrank brand-new repositories when they better satisfy the product and runnability criteria.

runs.dataWindow: 2026-05-19 to 2026-05-22, GitHub repositories created, updated, or visibly gaining attention in AI agent, MCP, LLM app, RAG, workflow, browser/code/voice agent, assistant, automation, and copilot categories.

runs.trendObservations: The strongest product-shaped signals are shifting from standalone demos to executable agent surfaces: terminal copilots, GitHub Actions agents, hosted MCP, reusable memory layers, and vertical workflow assistants. MCP remains the default integration vocabulary, while more projects are packaging agents as CLIs, web dashboards, chat bots, or deployable services rather than libraries only.
runs.assumptions: Scores prioritize runnable product surface, clear user workflow, README/demo quality, recent GitHub activity, and AI-native depth. Repositories highlighted on 2026-05-21 were not repeated unless they showed a distinct new product signal. Search quality is bounded by unauthenticated web access; activity labels such as updated/created are treated as directional signals, not audited star velocity.

## Trend Observations

# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-05-21

**数据窗口**: 2026-05-18 10:15 to 2026-05-21 10:15 Asia/Shanghai. 主要依据 GitHub AI agent / MCP / AI workflow topic recent-update surfaces 与仓库 README 可运行性检查；shell DNS 无法解析 `api.github.com`，所以增长信号不使用精确 GitHub API delta。

## Top Projects

### 1. [matevip/mateclaw](https://github.com/matevip/mateclaw) - AI Coding Agent - Score 88
- **做什么**: 面向 Claude Code 的本地 GUI/管理层，支持会话、Git worktree、项目上下文和 agentic coding 工作流。
- **面向谁**: 高频使用 Claude Code、希望把终端 coding agent 产品化管理的个人开发者和小团队。
- **AI native 点**: 核心价值不是编辑器外壳，而是围绕 AI coding session、上下文与多分支任务编排组织软件开发。
- **增长/活跃信号**: GitHub topic recent-update 中高位出现，README 有清晰产品定位与运行说明，符合近几天 agent IDE/agent manager 热点。
- **可运行性判断**: 有明确应用形态和安装/运行路径，产品完成度高于普通 wrapper。
- **建议动作**: 本地试用，重点观察 Claude Code 之外的 agent 适配能力、session persistence 和团队协作路线。

### 2. [boxlite-ai/boxlite](https://github.com/boxlite-ai/boxlite) - Agent Automation API - Score 86
- **做什么**: 用 API/SDK/Docker 把 AI 任务放进可隔离运行的自动化环境，面向 agent 执行和浏览器/桌面式任务。
- **面向谁**: 需要把 AI agent 接入生产流程的开发者、自动化团队和 AI SaaS 构建者。
- **AI native 点**: 把 agent 的执行环境、任务隔离、外部工具调用做成产品基础设施，而不是单一 demo。
- **增长/活跃信号**: recent-update surface 上活跃，README 呈现 API、Docker 和开发者入口，具备产品基础设施特征。
- **可运行性判断**: Docker/API/SDK 信号强，可直接进入技术评估。
- **建议动作**: 拉取跑一个浏览器/文件任务 demo，评估与 MCP、Browser Use、CI worker 的边界。

### 3. [AliceLJY/telegram-ai-bridge](https://github.com/AliceLJY/telegram-ai-bridge) - AI Assistant / Messaging Agent - Score 82
- **做什么**: 把 OpenAI/Claude/Gemini/Groq/Ollama 等模型接入 Telegram Bot，提供多模型聊天、上下文、群组和自托管桥接。
- **面向谁**: 希望把多模型 AI assistant 放到 Telegram 工作流里的个人、社群运营者和小团队。
- **AI native 点**: 产品入口是消息流，AI assistant 成为群聊/私聊里的常驻执行层，而不是孤立网页聊天框。
- **增长/活跃信号**: GitHub recent-update 可见，README 覆盖多 provider、部署和 Bot 使用场景。
- **可运行性判断**: 需要 Telegram Bot token 和模型 API key；自托管路径清晰。
- **建议动作**: 放入轻量 assistant watchlist，同时评估权限、安全和群聊上下文隔离。

### 4. [scoutqa-dot-ai/thor](https://github.com/scoutqa-dot-ai/thor) - Research Agent Workflow - Score 80
- **做什么**: 面向研究/问答的 agent workflow，围绕检索、回答、评估或任务执行组织 AI 工作流。
- **面向谁**: 构建研究助手、QA agent、内部知识工作流的开发团队。
- **AI native 点**: 以 agent 任务链和知识/检索闭环为核心，而不是单次 prompt 调用。
- **增长/活跃信号**: 最近更新出现在 AI workflow 相关检索面，项目定位接近可复用 agent product layer。
- **可运行性判断**: README/仓库形态比纯论文代码更接近应用，但仍需进一步跑 examples 验证稳定性。
- **建议动作**: 试跑 example，重点看数据源接入、评估闭环和是否支持企业内网知识源。

### 5. [vassiliylakhonin/agenda-intelligence-md](https://github.com/vassiliylakhonin/agenda-intelligence-md) - Meeting / Agenda AI Workflow - Score 78
- **做什么**: 将议程、会议材料或 markdown 工作流结构化为 AI 可处理的会议智能流程。

- **增长/活跃信号**: 最近更新可见，切中 AI workflow 从聊天转向业务文档流程的趋势。
- **可运行性判断**: 更像工具型 workflow；需要检查 CLI/API 包装深度和示例输入输出。
- **建议动作**: Watch + clone，看是否能稳定处理真实会议 markdown 与 action item 输出。

### 6. [RileyCraig14/nexus-agent](https://github.com/RileyCraig14/nexus-agent) - MCP / Agent Commerce - Score 75
- **做什么**: 围绕 agent、MCP server 和 pay-per-call/服务调用的实验性连接层。
- **面向谁**: MCP server 作者、agent platform 构建者和探索 agent monetization 的开发者。
- **AI native 点**: 试图把 agent 工具调用变成可分发、可计费、可组合的服务能力。
- **增长/活跃信号**: MCP recent-update 相关搜索面出现，方向与 agent commerce / MCP marketplace 趋势一致。
- **可运行性判断**: 早期项目，需确认 API、示例和真实交易闭环。
- **建议动作**: Watch，不急于集成；等 demo、协议边界和安全模型更清楚。

### 7. [Panniantong/Agent-Reach](https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach) - Browser / Web Agent - Score 74
- **做什么**: 面向 web 数据获取、网页任务或浏览器自动化的 AI agent 项目。
- **面向谁**: 需要自动浏览网页、采集信息、执行轻量 web workflow 的开发者。
- **AI native 点**: 让 LLM 参与网页理解和行动决策，替代固定规则脚本。
- **增长/活跃信号**: AI agent topic recent-update 中出现且有较高累计 star 可见度，说明不是一次性空仓库。
- **可运行性判断**: 需要进一步验证最新 README 的安装、demo 和反爬/登录场景能力。
- **建议动作**: 作为 browser-agent 方向备选，和 Browser Use、Open Operator 类项目横向比较。

### 8. [MustafaKemal0146/fetih](https://github.com/MustafaKemal0146/fetih) - Security / Autonomous CLI Agent - Score 72
- **做什么**: 偏安全/CLI 场景的 agent 工具，可能覆盖侦察、自动化检查或命令行辅助。
- **面向谁**: 安全研究、红队实验、自动化检查工具链使用者。
- **AI native 点**: 将 agent 作为命令行任务执行和分析的核心控制层。
- **增长/活跃信号**: GitHub AI agent recent-update 中新近活跃；安全 agent 仍是持续升温方向。
